text_EN:
#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#It's been a while since the last time I was here, when I met Jun...

......

Why isn't Remi here yet? Is she still going through docking procedures?

Hey! Where did all these people come from?

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#I think there's going to be some sort of performance, an opera called "Melody of Starsong", or something like that.

I've heard this is real, local Thousand Peaks culture, right?

Should we try to get a seat?

#AVATAR:Girl_Blush#(Helius and Terra's love story... So awkward... Should I...?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#好久没有回来了...这是遇到李莫的地方...

......

菈米亚还没有跟我们下船吗，是被入港程序困住了？

...啊！这边怎么突然这么多人？

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#应该是有戏剧要公演... 叫做「龙脉长歌」？

这是你们群山文化中的一环吗，想挤进去看看吗？

#AVATAR:Girl_Blush#（龙脉长歌描写的是乙皇与后土的爱情故事...我该...）

segments: It's been a while since the last time I was here, when I met Jun...
Why isn't Remi here yet? Is she still going through docking procedures?
Hey! Where did all these people come from?
I think there's going to be some sort of performance, an opera called "Melody of Starsong", or something like that.
I've heard this is real, local Thousand Peaks culture, right?
Should we try to get a seat?
(Helius and Terra's love story... So awkward... Should I...?)
好久没有回来了...这是遇到李莫的地方...
菈米亚还没有跟我们下船吗，是被入港程序困住了？
...啊！这边怎么突然这么多人？

应该是有戏剧要公演...
叫做「龙脉长歌」？
这是你们群山文化中的一环吗，想挤进去看看吗？
（龙脉长歌描写的是乙皇与后土的爱情故事...我该...）

text_EN: Melody of Starsong was a love story, through and through, and it made me a little uncomfortable. I was surprised to see Eda fully engaged. I never knew that she liked love stories.
text_CHS:
龙脉长歌的故事是完全的爱情神话，
这让我有点不适。
但我意外的，是艾妲看得非常投入，
她比我想像中还喜欢这种题材。

segments: Melody of Starsong was a love story, through and through, and it made me a little uncomfortable. I was surprised to see Eda fully engaged. I never knew that she liked love stories.

龙脉长歌的故事是完全的爱情神话，
这让我有点不适。
但我意外的，是艾妲看得非常投入，
她比我想像中还喜欢这种题材。

option_title_EN: Okay... Let's go.
option_title_CHS: 我们...一起去就可以

text_EN: The crowds grew larger and larger, and by the time Remi found us, we had been pushed to the outer perimeter. We could hear the beautiful melodies coming out of the temple, but only barely made out the performance on stage.
text_CHS: 人群越来越多，等到菈米亚找到我们时，我们已经被人群挤到外围，只听到神殿传出悠扬的音乐声，只能依稀看到公演的过程。

segments: The crowds grew larger and larger, and by the time Remi found us, we had been pushed to the outer perimeter. We could hear the beautiful melodies coming out of the temple, but only barely made out the performance on stage.
人群越来越多，等到菈米亚找到我们时，我们已经被人群挤到外围，只听到神殿传出悠扬的音乐声，只能依稀看到公演的过程。

option_title_EN: Let's wait for Remi and we'll all go together.
option_title_CHS: 等菈米亚回来一起去吧

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountProfessor_N##NONAME#And that is why we believe the Lumen Civilization is so distantly removed from our human ancestors...

And next, I've received some wonderful news. We are very, very lucky to have some important guests here at the college.

Everyone present, I'm sure you've heard of the Red Chamber crew?

#AVATAR:MountStudent_N##NONAME#Red Chamber?! Professor, how'd you get them? We've got so many questions!

#AVATAR:Girl_Blush#We told them we were just coming to look for intel, but the school snuck this in. What are we going to do?
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountProfessor_N##NONAME#这就是为什么我们认为古代的龙脉文明，跟人类的祖先相距甚远的原因...

接下来，我收到重要的消息，有一群难得的贵客拜访我们大学

研讨会的大家，都听过红楼商船队吗？

#AVATAR:MountStudent_N##NONAME#红楼吗，教授你怎么找到他们的，我们探勘有超多问题想要跟他们讨论！

#AVATAR:Girl_Blush#我们只有说要打听龙脉的消息，是校方安排的吗，这怎么办？

segments: And that is why we believe the Lumen Civilization is so distantly removed from our human ancestors...
And next, I've received some wonderful news. We are very, very lucky to have some important guests here at the college.
Everyone present, I'm sure you've heard of the Red Chamber crew?
Red Chamber?! Professor, how'd you get them? We've got so many questions!
We told them we were just coming to look for intel, but the school snuck this in. What are we going to do?
这就是为什么我们认为古代的龙脉文明，跟人类的祖先相距甚远的原因...
接下来，我收到重要的消息，有一群难得的贵客拜访我们大学
研讨会的大家，都听过红楼商船队吗？
红楼吗，教授你怎么找到他们的，我们探勘有超多问题想要跟他们讨论！
我们只有说要打听龙脉的消息，是校方安排的吗，这怎么办？

text_EN: Eda was a bit embarrassed sitting in on the conference. The discussion on the origins of lumen continued for several hours. She was a bit annoyed at the whole thing, but she was lively, and spoke with confidence. I still remember how vividly engaged she was.
text_CHS: 艾妲有点尴尬的坐上研讨会的一席，当天关于龙脉起源的辩论持续了数个小时，说起这段往事时，艾妲多少有点无奈，但她神采飞扬讨论的样子，却一直让我记在心中。

segments: Eda was a bit embarrassed sitting in on the conference. The discussion on the origins of lumen continued for several hours. She was a bit annoyed at the whole thing, but she was lively, and spoke with confidence. I still remember how vividly engaged she was.
艾妲有点尴尬的坐上研讨会的一席，当天关于龙脉起源的辩论持续了数个小时，说起这段往事时，艾妲多少有点无奈，但她神采飞扬讨论的样子，却一直让我记在心中。

option_title_EN: ...Whatever. Let's get this over with.
option_title_CHS: ...就参加吧

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_N#(Crappers, can't find Eddie... Did she head off to look for intel?)

#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#...Hey, why is Jun gone too?

#AVATAR:MountJournalist_N##NONAME#Ah, young lady. I've confirmed your vessel ID number. You're the technician for the Red Chamber crew, right?

I'm with the Daily Lumen, and lots of young people are dying to hear your story.

There's a witch and a young runner in your crew, if I'm not mistaken...

Are they a couple? Is there any chance I could interview them?

A relationship between a witch and a runner, that's a real hot topic. If you get me in touch, I'll pay you with some decent intel...#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_N#（糟糕，跟姐姐走散了...是去哪里打听龙脉消息了吗？）

#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#...为什么李莫也不见了...

#AVATAR:MountJournalist_N##NONAME#这位小女孩，我确认了你们的船籍编号，你是红楼商船队的技师吧？

我是龙脉日报，太多年轻人想要听你们的报导，你们船队有一位女巫，还有个年轻探勘人...

他们是一对吗？有办法采访他们吗？

女巫与探勘人的恋情...这绝对是个热门的话题，作为回报，我可以分享一些最近龙脉的情报...#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#

女巫与探勘人的恋情...这绝对是个热门的话题，作为回报，我可以分享一些最近龙脉的情报...

text_EN:
The day we got interviewed, the reporter told Eda that she'd been looking for her for a long time and had once met the Red Chamber's technician. "Boy, did she have a terrible temper," she said.

I always thought that if Remi didn't hate me so much, the journey would have gone a bit smoother.

But I still miss those days.
text_CHS:
那天来采访的记者跟艾妲说，
她找了艾妲很久，还遇到红楼的船师，
那位女孩脾气似乎不太好。
我常想如果菈米亚没有讨厌我，
旅行或许会更顺利一点，

但如今我却只有怀念那时的日子。

But I still miss those days.

但如今我却只有怀念那时的日子。

option_title_EN: Couple? Relationship? Get the hell outta here!
option_title_CHS: 什么鬼恋情，滚出我视线！

text_EN: #AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#Warning: Incoming solar flare from star Ignis arriving in 30 seconds.#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#
text_CHS: #AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#警告，来自烛龙的恒星闪焰，即将于30标准秒后抵达#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Doctor_Enough#Runners, do you need help...?

Eh? I thought this was a vessel in distress... Didn't expect it to be you kids.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#It's the Lumen Association Patrol Squad that Doc runs. We're saved!

#AVATAR:Doctor_Angry#Listen, even though association regulations state that we'll help any crew with a Thousand Peaks citizen...

You better tell us why this happened or we're tossing you into the belt.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Doctor_Enough#探勘人，需要帮忙吗...？ 我还想说是什么紧急落难，需要临时支援...没想到是你们这群头痛的小鬼#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#是医生率领的龙脉协会巡逻队，这下获救了！

#AVATAR:Doctor_Angry#听着，虽然依据龙脉公约，只要船队有群山公民，我们都会提供人道支援

但你们最好解释落难的理由，不然绝对把你们丢在小行星带 #EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#You the transport crew? Put the container in Warehouse Four.

Please follow protocol and separate the packages according to the instructions.

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Eddie, do we really have to help United Mining with these shipping jobs?

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, we already promised them we'd do it. Let's just get it done.#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#是运输队吗？请把货柜放在第四号仓库，请遵照秩序，听从分装指示

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#姐姐，我们真的有必要协助矿业联合做这种货运工作吗

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，我想法不同，竟然我们答应了对方，还是尽量做到吧#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#This is a warning to the vessel ahead. You are in United Mining military airspace. Please present a valid military visa.

If you refuse to cooperate, you will be punished according to military law.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(Their ships are taking up the entire spaceway... It'd be really difficult to try escaping now.)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#警告前方的龙脉探测船，本空域为矿联军事重区，请提交合法军事签证

若拒绝配合，将以军法处置#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（轨道上都被船舰占满了...这要逃可能都很困难）

You have the right to pay a fee in order to be rescued, or to remain drifting in this location.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#通告步入领空的落难船只，依据群山自治公约第十四条规定，

你有权给付罚金接受救援，或于此地继续漂流#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Eddie, I'm getting unidentified signals from the ship ahead. Looks like bounty hunters!

#AVATAR:BelterRobberB_N##NONAME#You the people listed in this bounty? You got nerve for the hell you raised with that trashy ship of yours!

Surrender now so we can get this over with. And don't try anything funny.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#姐姐，前方飞船讯号无法辨识 应该是追杀悬赏来的奖金猎人！

#AVATAR:BelterRobberB_N##NONAME#悬赏上的肥羊就是你们吗？开这台破烂也敢惹事，胆子很大嘛！

不用在那边想花样了，直接停船投降，咱们大家都省事#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#Neverlasting paths... My Binarii prayer disc is broken... What am I going to do?

Are the gods telling me that all these years of salvaging scraps have been... meaningless?

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(I heard the founder of Shiratsuka salvages debris in the hopes that he'll one day see his lover again...)

(It sounds like the relic means a lot to him...)

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(Binarii prayer disc... Isn't that the strange disc I picked up at the East Ocean Interstellar Transport Station?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#...二向无常...用来祷告的引魂盘怎么会碎掉...这怎么办？

是神明告诉我，这几年的打捞作业都没有意义吗...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（听说白冢的建造者透过打捞废船，希望能再见他的爱人一面...）

（神像坏掉对他打击应该很大...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#We're getting an unknown communication request. I'm putting it through now:

#AVATAR:BelterScavengerA_N##NONAME#My dearest East Ocean prince and his pretty little witch. We heard you blew up Bones' old haunt.

Amazing stuff. You think we could board your ship and get a photo with you?#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Bounty hunters again... Is the whole galaxy trying to get that reward?

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(Red Chamber is just a radar vessel fitted for high-level detection and communication.)

(There's no way we can take them head-on...)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#红楼收到不明的通讯请求，现在解析出来：

#AVATAR:BelterScavengerA_N##NONAME#亲爱的瀛海贵族与女巫，听说你们炸了白帮的老巢

这么厉害， 不如让我登船打个照面吧？#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#又是赏金猎人...现在是全世界都在悬赏我们吗？

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（红楼只是雷达船，只有侦查与通讯能力好一点，不能跟他们硬碰硬...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Girl_Impatient#What are we doing here? I should be focusing on my master...

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#You... I recognize that voice... You're the witch who sang for us last time.

By the song of stars, Praesidio moves. You've got a lot of fans, you know. Wanna give it another shot?

Not up for it? What if the whole crew sings with you?

I'll even arrange a special program just for you.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#Oh geez...
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Girl_Impatient#我说，来这里做什么，当务之急是找到师父吧...

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#你...声音好耳熟...你是上次那位唱歌的女巫吗？

万道龙守，唯歌而动，好多人在打听你的消息...再为我们唱一次吧？

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#这下麻烦了...

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#May Ignis shed light upon your good deeds, runners from afar...

We've only just returned from the caves, and we've got plenty of lumen relics for sale.

Real quality stuff... I'll give you a good deal.

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#(Selling stolen lumen relics right in front of Ignis. Only in Silk Oasis...)

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#Ignis above, we gotta get rid of these fast. C'mon, we all help each other out around here. Whatta you say?#AVATAR:Girl_Think#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#愿烛龙光照，今日众善奉行，远道而来的探勘人...

我们刚从龙脉归来，手边尽是龙脉遗迹中的上等货...便宜卖给你吧

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#（竟然在烛龙的面前贩卖龙脉遗迹的赃物，真不愧是丝洲...）

#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#Endless lumen, light the way... Welcome... stranded comrades of the Peaks. We are always ready to assist those in need.

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#I'm getting unidentified signals from a trading vessel claiming to provide fuel for stranded ships... What do we do?#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#龙脉常在，风水引路...欢迎...群山落难的伙伴...我们随时可以援助

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#一艘讯号无法辨识的商船，自称可以协助民间的落难船...这该怎么办？#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#Eddie, some merchant vessel in distress is trying to contact us. They wanna trade with us or something.

...The ship's insignia looks like some kind of capybara.

#AVATAR:CabyMerchantB_N##NONAME#Endless lumen. We've just escaped from a pirate attack. Our ship needs to be repaired immediately!

Please! If you help us, we'll give you some valuable intel. We're begging you!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_N#(Lumen intel again... Something doesn't feel right.)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#姐姐有艘落难的贸易船主动和我们通讯，要求和我们进行交易

...这船徽有点像是某种豚类

#AVATAR:CabyMerchantB_N##NONAME#龙脉常在，我们刚从海盗的突击逃出来，船需要立刻维修！

如果大人愿意的话，我们手边有珍贵的龙脉情报，帮帮我们吧！#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_N#（又是龙脉的情报...感觉不太对劲）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#What the hell, we're already short on freighters, and you want us to increase production?

There's no planning around here!

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#(Feels like they're having issues with the production line. There's no way we'll get any Banshee intel here. Let's get going...)

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#Hey, what's your job? What the hell are you doing sneaking around like that?#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#搞什么鬼，运输船就是不够了，还要我们增产？做事情有没有规划！

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#（感觉这里的产线出了点状况，别妄想打听黑龙的消息，早点离开吧...）

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#喂，你们是哪个单位的，在哪里鬼鬼祟祟做什么#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Businessman_N##NONAME#Hey! Don't the people of the asteroid belt have any rights?!

how could you all be negotiating without the Myrian Ignis Guild?

Let us have a seat at the table, no need to be so secretive!

Who do you think does all the dirty work for you people?

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#Is that... Lamar? What's he doing here?

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#The chairman has ordered that only the Ironwind Trade Council, the Rodin family, and Lumen Association are allowed at this meeting.

If you don't leave, you'll be charged with obstruction of justice and arrested.#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Businessman_N##NONAME#小行星带就不是人吗，你们的贸易谈判没我们万道烛龙商会怎么行，让我进去吧，搞什么密会？

也不看看我们接了你们多少台面下的案子...

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#这不是拉马吗...他在这里做什么？

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#议长有令，本次会议仅邀请铁岚城贸易市议会、罗登家族、以及龙脉协会

若再不离开，会以妨碍公务将您逮捕#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#民间的龙脉探测船吗？ 前方是矿联专属矿场的空域，立即停船受检。#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_N##AVATAR:Girl_N##EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#Eddie, there's a huge fleet of United Mining vessels ahead.

They want us to turn on our comms system immediately... There's nothing we can do!

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#This is a warning to the vessel ahead. Please stop immediately for an inspection.

It was reported that an old lumen seeking vessel fled United Mining airspace after sending illegally modified signals.

The ship was posing as a high-ranking official, which is a serious violation of military law.

Please cooperate with our interrogation and hand over your ship's visa.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(They're already on the line. Sending a modified signal now is going to be very risky...)
text_CHS:

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#敬告前方的飞船，请立刻停船接受临检

根据通报，最近一艘伪造身份的旧式龙脉探测船，于矿业联合空域游窜

该船伪造高官的识别讯号，已严重触犯军法，请配合盘查，并提交贵船的签证数据#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（现在通讯已经接通了，变造讯号的成功率低很多...）

text_EN:
I hate to say it, but if it had to do with Banshee, it was almost guaranteed that we would be duped.

If we were lucky, something like this would happen. We got some intel on a cave, but it definitely wasn't Banshee.
text_CHS:
不得不说，每次只要用黑龙当理由，
我们就很难逃过被诈骗的命运。

运气好点时会像这次一样拿到龙脉方位，
但永远不会是黑龙。

text_EN:
"Oh no, no, no. There are 66 members in the Capybara Merchant Society. Whoever that was, it was either my friend, or my friend's friend."

He started backing away as he spoke, and before I could ask any more questions, he was gone.
text_CHS:
「没没没，我们豚鲸商社有66位...如果你曾经见到谁，一定是我朋友的朋友。」

他边说边走，当我还想追问时，却已经不见人影。

option_title_EN: Excuse me, have we met before?
option_title_CHS: 老鼠兄弟，我们是不是哪里见过？

text_EN:
When I met back up with the crew, Eda was doing an interview with a reporter. The Daily Lumen apparently wanted to do some special report on us...

"Thank you so much. This wonderful story of yours will certainly touch the hearts of Mount Aurora's youth."
text_CHS:
那天等我回到集合点时，
艾妲正在跟一位记者进行访谈，
听说龙脉日报希望为我们做一篇特别报导...

「谢谢，有你们这么好的故事为矿脉背书...朝山的年轻人会因为你们而感动的。」

text_EN:
After a period of suffocating silence, we received a message: "Miss Eda, please forgive us for disturbing the journey of a First Class United Mining Officer."

Eda looked annoyed. Remi, on the other hand, was beaming with self-satisfaction.
text_CHS:
一阵令人窒息的沉默后，对方的通讯来电：

「尊贵的矿联一级士官，艾妲女士，请原谅我们打扰您的航行之旅。」

我记得艾妲一脸受不了，还有菈米亚得意的表情。

segments:
After a period of suffocating silence, we received a message:

"Miss Eda, please forgive us for disturbing the journey of a First Class United Mining Officer."
Eda looked annoyed. Remi, on the other hand, was beaming with self-satisfaction.

一阵令人窒息的沉默后，对方的通讯来电：

「尊贵的矿联一级士官，艾妲女士，请原谅我们打扰您的航行之旅。」

我记得艾妲一脸受不了，还有菈米亚得意的表情。

option_title_EN: Send a modified signal to make them think we're also a United Mining vessel.
option_title_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为我们也是矿业联合船舰

text_EN:
For a while, we thought we had gotten lucky and passed through enemy lines, but a rail cannon sniped us from a distance.

The last thing I remember was a flash of red light...
text_CHS: 我们一度以为侥幸的冲过火网，但是巨大的磁轨炮却从远方狙击而来，我印象只剩一片红色的闪光...

segments: For a while, we thought we had gotten lucky and passed through enemy lines, but a rail cannon sniped us from a distance.
The last thing I remember was a flash of red light...
我们一度以为侥幸的冲过火网，但是巨大的磁轨炮却从远方狙击而来，我印象只剩一片红色的闪光...

option_title_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
option_title_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！

text_EN:
As I grew older, I would look fondly back on the times we spent taking up odd jobs to fund our search for lumen.

The man checked the cargo to make sure nothing was missing, before paying for our delivery.
text_CHS:
老了的我，常会怀念跟艾妲冒险时，
为了筹备资金四处打工的日常。

对方打开了货柜后一一验货，
发现品项没有遗漏后，将酬劳盘点给我们。

segments:
As I grew older, I would look fondly back on the times we spent taking up odd jobs to fund our search for lumen.

The man checked the cargo to make sure nothing was missing, before paying for our delivery.

老了的我，常会怀念跟艾妲冒险时，
为了筹备资金四处打工的日常。

对方打开了货柜后一一验货，
发现品项没有遗漏后，将酬劳盘点给我们。

option_title_EN: The goods are right here.
option_title_CHS: 你的货物都准备好了

text_EN:
"Don't waste my time, kids."

He shooed us away after realizing he mistook us for someone else.
text_CHS:
「小朋友别浪费我们时间。」

发觉自己认错人，对方随手将我们打发。

segments:
"Don't waste my time, kids."

He shooed us away after realizing he mistook us for someone else.

「小朋友别浪费我们时间。」

发觉自己认错人，对方随手将我们打发。

option_title_EN: I have no idea what you're talking about...
option_title_CHS: 我不清楚你在说什么...？

text_CHS: （不会发生）

segments: （不会发生）

option_title_EN: Pose as a civilian ship by sending a modified signal.
option_title_CHS: 试着发送伪装讯号过去，伪装自己是一般民间船

text_EN:
The old signal modifier failed to convince them. They immediately saw through the trick, and responded with a barrage of attacks.

Although we managed to escape, Red Chamber took quite a few hits.
text_CHS:
破旧的通讯器材似乎没有奏效，
对方瞬间拆穿了我们的伪装讯号，瞬间炮火齐上，
虽然逃脱成功，红楼却受了严重的伤。

segments:
The old signal modifier failed to convince them. They immediately saw through the trick, and responded with a barrage of attacks.

Although we managed to escape, Red Chamber took quite a few hits.

破旧的通讯器材似乎没有奏效，
对方瞬间拆穿了我们的伪装讯号，瞬间炮火齐上，
虽然逃脱成功，红楼却受了严重的伤。

text_EN:
The ship took multiple hits as we charged through the enemy line.

After some panicked maneuvering, we managed to escape enemy fire.
text_CHS:
穿越的过程我们遭受数次射击，
一阵惊慌之下我们勉强穿过了火网。

segments:
The ship took multiple hits as we charged through the enemy line.

After some panicked maneuvering, we managed to escape enemy fire.

穿越的过程我们遭受数次射击，
一阵惊慌之下我们勉强穿过了火网。

option_title_EN: We've got no choice. Let's charge through and take a few hits.
option_title_CHS: 顾不得装甲受损了，冲过去吧

text_EN: From what I remember, their communications officer seemed confused about his mistake, so they just decided to let us go.
text_CHS: 印象中，对方通讯官发现自己弄错有点不解，却依然放行了我们。

segments: From what I remember, their communications officer seemed confused about his mistake, so they just decided to let us go.
印象中，对方通讯官发现自己弄错有点不解，却依然放行了我们。

option_title_EN: Pose as a civilian ship by sending a modified signal.
option_title_CHS: 试着发送伪装讯号过去，伪装自己是一般民间船

text_EN:
As soon as our credits were transferred into the electronic account, we were bombarded with enemy fire. Panicked, Remi dodged the attack, and we were lucky enough to escape...

It was then that I realized that pirates are pirates. It was best to keep dealings with them to a minimum.
text_CHS:
信用点才刚透过电子户头落款，对方鱼雷就打了出来，菈米亚惊慌的闪避，最后运气很好的逃脱...

从那时我知道，海盗果然是海盗，
不能随意打交道。

segments: As soon as our credits were transferred into the electronic account, we were bombarded with enemy fire. Panicked, Remi dodged the attack, and we were lucky enough to escape...
It was then that I realized that pirates are pirates. It was best to keep dealings with them to a minimum.

信用点才刚透过电子户头落款，对方鱼雷就打了出来，菈米亚惊慌的闪避，最后运气很好的逃脱...

从那时我知道，海盗果然是海盗，
不能随意打交道。

option_title_EN: Bounty hunters are in it for the money. Try to bribe them.
option_title_CHS: 追悬赏的都是为了钱，试着贿络他们

text_EN:
Remi didn't really want to sing, but she did it for Eda. I was so used to Remi shouting and screaming that I was shocked to hear how beautiful her voice was.

She sang softly, but it was full of feeling, and harmonized with Eda perfectly.
text_CHS: 菈米亚虽然不情愿，却还是答应了艾妲的要求·。跟她平常骂人的声音不同，她唱歌的声音很细，小声却满腹感情，与艾妲完美的合音。

segments:
Remi didn't really want to sing, but she did it for Eda. I was so used to Remi shouting and screaming that I was shocked to hear how beautiful her voice was.

She sang softly, but it was full of feeling, and harmonized with Eda perfectly.
菈米亚虽然不情愿，却还是答应了艾妲的要求·。跟她平常骂人的声音不同，她唱歌的声音很细，小声却满腹感情，与艾妲完美的合音。

option_title_EN: Remi is always listening to me sing. How about having her join me this time?
option_title_CHS: 菈米亚听我唱歌那么多次，跟她一起唱吧

text_EN:
What a terrible experience.

After my "performance", even Remi didn't want to be too mean to me.
text_CHS:
那是很灾难的经验，
连菈米亚都难得的不想责备我。

segments:
What a terrible experience.

After my "performance", even Remi didn't want to be too mean to me.

那是很灾难的经验，
连菈米亚都难得的不想责备我。

option_title_EN: Let's see how the whole crew sounds!
option_title_CHS: 全船队一起试试看好了...

text_EN: We lined up like drones and saw the lumium we were responsible for taken by a robotic arm and arranged on an export rack with millions of barrels. Eda looked away. Compared to the colossus that was United Mining, we were nothing.
text_CHS: 我们如机械般列队，看到我们负责处理的汜气，被机械手臂架到几万桶的出货架陈列，艾妲别过头去，面对矿业联合的巨大，我们什么都不是。

segments: We lined up like drones and saw the lumium we were responsible for taken by a robotic arm and arranged on an export rack with millions of barrels. Eda looked away. Compared to the colossus that was United Mining, we were nothing.
我们如机械般列队，看到我们负责处理的汜气，被机械手臂架到几万桶的出货架陈列，艾妲别过头去，面对矿业联合的巨大，我们什么都不是。

option_title_EN: Jun always keeps his word. I suppose that's a good thing.
option_title_CHS: 答应人的事尽量做到，是李莫的优点

text_EN: Even though we had promised we'd help, we simply left. Back then, I could accept whatever decision Eda made.
text_CHS: 尽管口头答应了对方，但我们还是离开了，当时我认为只要是艾妲说的，我都可配合。

segments: Even though we had promised we'd help, we simply left. Back then, I could accept whatever decision Eda made.
尽管口头答应了对方，但我们还是离开了，当时我认为只要是艾妲说的，我都可配合。

option_title_EN: Remi's right. We'll figure out what to do with the container.
option_title_CHS: 菈米亚说得对，货柜私下处理掉就好

text_EN:
Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.

That day we were unfortunate enough to experience this firsthand.
text_CHS: 群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有愤怒与天罚的神话，我们终于体会到了。

segments:
Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.

That day we were unfortunate enough to experience this firsthand.
群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有愤怒与天罚的神话，我们终于体会到了。

option_title_EN: Raise the shields to full power!
option_title_CHS: 启动汜气装甲最大电磁输出功率！

text_EN:
Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.

We sat and panicked in the safety shelter, as the ship's alarms blared and all systems went haywire.
text_CHS:
群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有愤怒与天罚的神话。

躲在避难室的我们听见船内的警报，电子零件失灵引发的异常，顿时觉得恐慌。

segments:
Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.

We sat and panicked in the safety shelter, as the ship's alarms blared and all systems went haywire.

群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有愤怒与天罚的神话。

躲在避难室的我们听见船内的警报，电子零件失灵引发的异常，顿时觉得恐慌。

option_title_EN: Wait it out in the anti-radiation shelter.
option_title_CHS: 躲进船内抗辐射的避难室，撑过去

text_EN:
The signal from our old signal modifier was cracked and we were met with enemy fire.

Although we managed to escape, Red Chamber suffered a good amount of damage.
text_CHS:
破旧通讯器材的讯号被解析出来，
对方的炮火齐上，
虽然逃脱成功，红楼也受了不小的伤。

segments:
The signal from our old signal modifier was cracked and we were met with enemy fire.

Although we managed to escape, Red Chamber suffered a good amount of damage.

破旧通讯器材的讯号被解析出来，
对方的炮火齐上，
虽然逃脱成功，红楼也受了不小的伤。

text_EN:
They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of enemy fire.

Even though we managed to charge through, the ship was severely damaged. We weren't even sure how much longer we'd be able to keep flying...
text_CHS:
讯号在瞬间被拆解出来，对方的火炮齐射。

尽管最后侥幸的冲过火网，但是船基本上受伤严重，当时我们都怀疑自己还能航行多久...

segments: They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of enemy fire.
Even though we managed to charge through, the ship was severely damaged. We weren't even sure how much longer we'd be able to keep flying...

讯号在瞬间被拆解出来，对方的火炮齐射。

尽管最后侥幸的冲过火网，但是船基本上受伤严重，当时我们都怀疑自己还能航行多久...

text_EN:
I still remember the response they sent back... "First Class Detection Officer Edalune Grant, we've received your request and will safely escort you to a resupply point."

When Eda heard the word "officer", an awkward look appeared on her face.
text_CHS:
记得通讯传来了这样的信息..

「艾妲拉姆・葛兰特一级探测士官，仅收到您发出的救援，我们会安全地将您护送至可补给的地点。」

听到士官时，艾妲露出有点别扭的表情。

segments:
I still remember the response they sent back... 

"First Class Detection Officer Edalune Grant, we've received your request and will safely escort you to a resupply point."
When Eda heard the word "officer", an awkward look appeared on her face.

记得通讯传来了这样的信息..

「艾妲拉姆・葛兰特一级探测士官，仅收到您发出的救援，我们会安全地将您护送至可补给的地点。」

听到士官时，艾妲露出有点别扭的表情。

option_title_EN: Pose as a United Mining patrol crew that needs some help.
option_title_CHS: 发出矿联的军用伪造讯号，假扮自己是需要救援的巡逻队

text_EN: They grazed the side of our ship with their rail cannon before leaving us with a warning and taking off. As expected, things didn't always go as planned.
text_CHS: 对方的磁轨炮直接扫过红楼的侧翼，留下了警告信息后离去，事情果然不会那么顺利。

segments: They grazed the side of our ship with their rail cannon before leaving us with a warning and taking off. As expected, things didn't always go as planned.
对方的磁轨炮直接扫过红楼的侧翼，留下了警告信息后离去，事情果然不会那么顺利。

text_EN:
After the fee had been taken from our credit account, a small rescue vessel towed Red Chamber to a supply station.

Throughout the whole journey, we didn't get a single message over the comms system. It was like they wouldn't even acknowledge our existence.
text_CHS: 信用帐户扣缴后，对方的救援小队将红楼一路拖回可以补给的地方，直到抵达补给点后，通讯端连一次问候也没有。

segments: After the fee had been taken from our credit account, a small rescue vessel towed Red Chamber to a supply station.
Throughout the whole journey, we didn't get a single message over the comms system. It was like they wouldn't even acknowledge our existence.
信用帐户扣缴后，对方的救援小队将红楼一路拖回可以补给的地方，直到抵达补给点后，通讯端连一次问候也没有。

option_title_EN: The way things are looking, paying them off seems like the best option...
option_title_CHS: 事到如今，除了缴款也没有更好的办法了···

text_EN: We listened to them reminisce about their days in the military as they towed us back to a resupply point.
text_CHS: 商船将我们带回了可以补给的地方，运输红楼的过程中，电讯一端的对方聊着自己过往从军的经历。

segments: We listened to them reminisce about their days in the military as they towed us back to a resupply point.
商船将我们带回了可以补给的地方，运输红楼的过程中，电讯一端的对方聊着自己过往从军的经历。

option_title_EN: Let Remi do the negotiating.
option_title_CHS: 让菈米亚交涉看看

text_EN:
The pirates made their intentions clear, as their boarding vessel smashed into our ship.

While we managed to fight them off, the ship took considerable damage.
text_CHS:
那时红楼突然遭到登陆艇的撞击，是伪装的海盗。

尽管最后击退了对方，却受到了严重的伤害。

segments:
The pirates made their intentions clear, as their boarding vessel smashed into our ship.

While we managed to fight them off, the ship took considerable damage.

那时红楼突然遭到登陆艇的撞击，是伪装的海盗。

尽管最后击退了对方，却受到了严重的伤害。

text_EN: As soon as we declined, we were met with a barrage of enemy fire. Fortunately this was expected, and the ship took minimal damage.
text_CHS: 我们一拒绝，对方的炮火就落了下来，但幸亏决定得早，红楼只有些许损伤。

segments: As soon as we declined, we were met with a barrage of enemy fire. Fortunately this was expected, and the ship took minimal damage.
我们一拒绝，对方的炮火就落了下来，但幸亏决定得早，红楼只有些许损伤。

option_title_EN: Better to decline the offer. They could be pirates...
option_title_CHS: 怕是海盗，不要贸然接受援助...

text_EN: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end as they towed us back to the nearest space station. Dealing with stranded ships seemed to be a regular occurrence for them.
text_CHS: 通讯一段有着细碎的抱怨声，他们似乎很常处理这种遇难的船只，默默地将我们带回最近的空间站

segments: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end as they towed us back to the nearest space station. Dealing with stranded ships seemed to be a regular occurrence for them.
通讯一段有着细碎的抱怨声，他们似乎很常处理这种遇难的船只，默默地将我们带回最近的空间站

option_title_EN: Ask for assistance.
option_title_CHS: 请求对方的协助

text_EN: Announcing that we were the Red Chamber crew was not only enough for the squad to escort us back for resupplies, they even offered us some fuel.
text_CHS: 察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅将我们带回补给处，更为我们将油量做了一定的补给

segments: Announcing that we were the Red Chamber crew was not only enough for the squad to escort us back for resupplies, they even offered us some fuel.
察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅将我们带回补给处，更为我们将油量做了一定的补给

option_title_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
option_title_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

text_EN: Eda was unable to convince them. For some reason it raised their suspicion, and after a brief moment of silence, they left without a word.
text_CHS: 艾妲交涉失败，对方认为我们可能是别有意图的民间船，沉默后自行离去。

segments: Eda was unable to convince them. For some reason it raised their suspicion, and after a brief moment of silence, they left without a word.
艾妲交涉失败，对方认为我们可能是别有意图的民间船，沉默后自行离去。

我们被包围了！

Our modified signal was cracked and we were immediately bombarded.

The Red Chamber's light armor stood no chance and was riddled with holes.

我只记得我们的伪装讯号被解析出来，
然后是一阵炮火声，
红楼薄弱的装甲瞬间被打穿。

Our modified signal was cracked and the sounds of enemy fire piercing the hull reverberated throughout the ship.

The flames of the explosion looked like a beam of white light...

然后是船体被炮火贯穿的巨响。
爆发的火焰，在我眼中却像是一道白光...

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#Endless lumen, light the way... Welcome... stranded comrades of the Peaks. We are always ready to assist those in need.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#I'm getting unidentified signals from a trading vessel claiming to provide fuel for stranded ships... What do we do?#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#龙脉常在，风水引路...欢迎...群山落难的伙伴...我们随时可以援助#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

text_EN: We listened to them reminisce about their days in the military as they towed us back to a resupply point.
text_CHS: 商船将我们带回了可以补给的地方，运输红楼的过程中，电讯一端的对方聊着自己过往从军的经历。

segments: We listened to them reminisce about their days in the military as they towed us back to a resupply point.
商船将我们带回了可以补给的地方，运输红楼的过程中，电讯一端的对方聊着自己过往从军的经历。

option_title_EN: Let Remi do the negotiating.
option_title_CHS: 让菈米亚交涉看看

text_EN:
The pirates made their intentions clear, as their boarding vessel smashed into our ship.

While we managed to fight them off, the ship took considerable damage.
text_CHS:
那时红楼突然遭到登陆艇的撞击，是伪装的海盗。

尽管最后击退了对方，却受到了严重的伤害。

segments:
The pirates made their intentions clear, as their boarding vessel smashed into our ship.

While we managed to fight them off, the ship took considerable damage.

尽管最后击退了对方，却受到了严重的伤害。

text_EN: As soon as we declined, we were met with a barrage of enemy fire. Fortunately this was expected, and the ship took minimal damage.
text_CHS: 我们一拒绝，对方的炮火就落了下来，但幸亏决定得早，红楼只有些许损伤。

option_title_EN: Better to decline the offer. They could be pirates...
option_title_CHS: 怕是海盗，不要贸然接受援助...

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantC_N##NONAME#Hey runner, you need some help?

According to association regulations, if any member of your crew is a Thousand Peaks citizen, we will provide you with any assistance you need, no questions asked.

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#It's the Lumen Association Patrol Squad! They asked if we need any help.#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantC_N##NONAME#探勘人，需要帮忙吗？依据龙脉公约，不论身份，只要船队有群山公民，我们将会提供人道支援

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#是龙脉协会的巡逻队，他们询问我们是否需要协助！#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#

segments: Hey runner, you need some help?

是龙脉协会的巡逻队，他们询问我们是否需要协助！

text_EN: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end as they towed us back to the nearest space station. Dealing with stranded ships seemed to be a regular occurrence for them.
text_CHS: 通讯一段有着细碎的抱怨声，他们似乎很常处理这种遇难的船只，默默地将我们带回最近的空间站

option_title_EN: See if we can convince them to help us...
option_title_CHS: 试着拜托对方看看，请求协助...

text_EN: Eda was unable to convince them. For some reason it raised their suspicion, and after a brief moment of silence, they left without a word.
text_CHS: 艾妲交涉失败，对方认为我们可能是别有意图的民间船，沉默后自行离去。

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#We are notifying the distressed vessel ahead, according to Article 14 of the Thousand Peaks' Treaty of Autonomy...

You have the right to pay a fee in order to be rescued, or to remain drifting in this location.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#通告步入领空的落难船只，依据群山自治公约第十四条规定，

你有权给付罚金接受救援，或于此地继续漂流#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

text_EN:
I still remember the response they sent back... "First Class Detection Officer Edalune Grant, we've received your request and will safely escort you to a resupply point."

When Eda heard the word "officer", an awkward look appeared on her face.
text_CHS:
记得通讯传来了这样的信息：

「艾妲拉姆・葛兰特一级探测士官，仅收到您发出的救援，我们会安全地将您护送至可补给的地点。」

听到士官时，艾妲露出有点别扭的表情。

option_title_CHS: 发出矿联的军用伪造讯号，假扮自己是需要救援的巡逻队

text_EN: They grazed the side of our ship with their rail cannon before leaving us with a warning and taking off.  As expected, things didn't always go as planned.
text_CHS: 对方的磁轨炮直接扫过红楼的侧翼，留下了警告信息后离去，事情果然不会那么顺利

text_EN:
After the fee had been taken from our credit account, a small rescue vessel towed Red Chamber to a supply station.

Throughout the whole journey, we didn't get a single message over the comms system. It was like they wouldn't even acknowledge our existence.
text_CHS: 信用帐户扣缴后，对方的救援小队将红楼一路拖回可以补给的地方，直到抵达补给点后，通讯端连一次问候也没有。

option_title_EN: The way things are looking, paying them off seems like the best option...
option_title_CHS: 事到如今，除了缴款也没有更好的办法了···

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(I heard Eda saying that we've been running on a tight budget. There must be some way to make some credits...)

#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#What do you want? You want to shoot yourself into space? No way that's happening, you're way too heavy.

But the spaceway sweeper needs a hand. If you wanna earn some quick credits... go for it.#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（听艾妲说，最近船队的预算很紧，有没有可以赚钱的方法...）

#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#...怎么了，找我们柜台有事吗？想把自己打到宇宙吗？你太重了，不行

航道清洁船倒是缺点人手，看你了#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN:
"You'd like to help? What's that supposed to mean? Are you going to do it or not?"

He went on about all the space debris on the spaceway and how they needed someone to clean it up.

I did a pretty good job cleaning up the space debris and found out it was a lot like cave running. It looked like I had finally found a job I was good at.
text_CHS:
「想做就做，还什么愿不愿意。」

对方碎念了几句，直说最近轨道上满满的宇宙垃圾，需要有人去协助清理。

我协助的过程非常的顺利，清理宇宙垃圾跟探索龙脉很像，我应该是找到了我拿手的工作。

text_EN:
"You'd like to help? What's that supposed to mean? Are you going to do it or not?"

He went on about all the space debris along the orbit and how they needed someone to clean it up.

Cleaning up space debris wasn't difficult, but just when I was halfway done, a random piece of debris nearly sent me flying and messed up my rhythm...
text_CHS:
「想做就做，还什么愿不愿意。」 对方碎念了几句，直说最近轨道上满满的宇宙垃圾，需要有人去协助清理。

清理的工作不难，但当我将航道上的垃圾清理到一半时，突然的碎片撞击让我差点飞出去，打乱了我的节奏...

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterManB_N##NONAME#I've been seeing you wander around for a while now. Are you looking for a name?

May Helius' blessings be upon you. Unfortunately, not all who have fallen have their names recorded here.

If you have the time, we believe it's every Peaker's duty to contribute to the list. Obviously, you'll be paid for your effort.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(We came here for lumen intel, but they think we're families members of the deceased...)

(...Should I ask Jun to help them out?)#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterManB_N##NONAME#看你在这里晃了好一阵子，你是在找某个名字吗？

乙皇赐福，不是每一个为冲突逝去的英魂都有留在这里

有空的话，行个群山人的义务，把英魂的名字刻在广场，钱不会少给你的

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（原本想打听龙脉消息，却被当成冲突后的受难者了...）

（...该请李莫帮忙吗？）#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN:
Although East Ocean and Thousand Peaks both fought against United Mining during the war, the sheer amount of casualties listed before me helped me understand why they harbored such hatred toward outsiders like me.

I was paid for my time afterward, but it wasn't a joyful experience.
text_CHS:
尽管瀛海当年作战的对象，
多半是矿业联合，少有群山本地居民，
但看见名单上，龙脉冲突的死难者的惊人数量，
我多少能体会外地人被厌恶的原因。

事成我得到些报酬，但没有多开心。

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantB_N##NONAME#Red Chamber? The trading vessel? So pleased that you've come here.

There's been a huge increase in the number of runners and our logistics has reached max capacity.

We need to better understand the needs of traders. How about doing some consulting for us? We would pay you well.

#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#(Traders? I do have several years of experience selling plants with my master.)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantB_N##NONAME#红楼商船队吗，真开心你们来到这里，

最近探勘人数量激增，物流量快到极限了，我们要了解民间行商的想法

有空的话给我们点建议吧，就当赚点外快？

#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#（行商...我有几年前，与师父一起进行花卉贸易的经验）

(Traders? I do have several years of experience selling plants with my master.)

有空的话给我们点建议吧，就当赚点外快？
（行商...我有几年前，与师父一起进行花卉贸易的经验）

text_EN:
Eda spent an entire day discussing Thousand Peaks' trade routes with the director of the logistics center. The topics ranged from improving the current business model to how to enter the black market.

If she wasn't so determined to find her master, she'd be an excellent businesswoman.
text_CHS:
印象中，艾妲花了一整天跟物流中心的经理沟通群山的贸易路线图，包括如何转运，以及黑市间的贸易要如何进行。

如果她不是坚持寻找师父，或许会是个好商人。

segments: Eda spent an entire day discussing Thousand Peaks' trade routes with the director of the logistics center. The topics ranged from improving the current business model to how to enter the black market.
If she wasn't so determined to find her master, she'd be an excellent businesswoman.
印象中，艾妲花了一整天跟物流中心的经理沟通群山的贸易路线图，包括如何转运，以及黑市间的贸易要如何进行。
如果她不是坚持寻找师父，或许会是个好商人。

Still, Eda was not happy that we were doing work for United Mining.

text_EN:
"We will not do any work for United Mining!"

Not soon after I had agreed to the work, Eda found out and had the contract terminated. Both parties were not happy, and we even had to pay a fee for violating the contract.
text_CHS:
「别帮矿业联合做任何事！」

我才答应对方没多久，艾妲发现我接下来这差事，直接跟对方理论后将劳动契约终止，弄得双方很不愉快，还付出了违约金。

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#Things workin' out for you in the Peaks? There's a bunch of unlucky bastards in the bar that fate just don't seem to care for.

Tell you what. You tell us a tale and I'll pour you a drink.

And if you're short on credits, I got plenty of work around here.

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#(We do need the money... If Jun doesn't mind, the pay in Silk Oasis isn't that bad.)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#怎么，在群山的冒险还顺利吗？酒吧里多得是不受命运眷顾的倒霉蛋，

说点你的故事，为自己换杯酒吧

还是手头有急需，那也不要紧，要不要来帮我做点事？

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#（手头有点紧，李莫如果不介意的话，丝洲的工作报酬不会太差）

text_EN:
The barkeep took me into a secret door around back. Inside was a massive dryer and shredder used for making smokeable sticks. It turned out that this was where the real money came from. I helped him package the goods as fast as I could.

After I finished up, the barkeep was quite happy with the results and paid me as he had promised.
text_CHS:
老板领我走下后面的密门，
里面藏着大型的烘干机与切丝机，
那是用来制作私烟的器具，
原来这才是老板真正的收入，
我迅速地协助分装。

事成后对方十分满意，给了我...

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#You're from out of town, aren't you? It's people like you that started the war. Don't really want to get involved with you...

Ah, screw it. There's too many ships that need to be disassembled. You can start working whenever.#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#你外地来的吧？就你们这些人搞什么龙脉冲突...真不想跟你接触...

算了，垃圾山缺工，就不计较那些了，等着解体的废船多著呢，随时都可以上工#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN:
I don't know how many ships I took apart, but after hours and hours of tough work, I reached the goal set by the manager.

"Well, well, well. Didn't think outsiders could work as hard as us Peakers!"

He handed me some decent pay as he commended my work.
text_CHS:
我不知道我协助拆解船只多久，经过漫长的努力，
总算达成了垃圾山工头规定的目标。

「没想到，外地人也有不错的。」

工头一边说，一边给了我一笔不小的奖励。

option_title_EN: (It doesn't matter what his views are, I need to contribute to the crew...)
option_title_CHS: （不管他怎么说，我得努力帮上红楼...）

text_EN:
I didn't have much experience dismantling ships. What's more... I couldn't stop thinking about my dear Khun. It took a long time before I got the job done.

The manager kept grumbling about how unreliable outsiders were. He eventually paid, but it was a lot less than what we agreed upon.
text_CHS:
我没有多少解体船的经验...
而且这会让我一直想起鲲，
最后花了不少时间才做到对方的期待。

工头抱怨着外地人不可靠，
最后把预定的报酬减少了不少。

text_EN:
"Pffft... Work is work, kid. There's money to be made."

The manager was not happy. He told me to get out of his face and stop blocking the path.
text_CHS:
「啐，有工作就不错了，还嫌东嫌西。」

工头相当不满，叫我快点离开他面前，不要挡路。

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#Neverlasting paths. Child of East Ocean, so you've noticed as well?

Countless souls of fallen ships have passed through the subspace rift. To this day, they are still stuck in the dimensional fracture.

Stranded, they search for a way out, day after day. Perhaps you will help them, child of East Ocean...

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#He can tell I'm from East Ocean and he still wants me to help? It must be something that only I can do...

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#He's asking if you want to work, dummy. They want you to see if the stuff that shoots out of the rift is worth anything.#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#二向无常，瀛海的孩子...你也注意到了吗？

亚空间的裂口中，无数落难废船的灵魂至今依旧在徘徊

他们搁浅在次元的缝隙之中，日复一日地寻找出口...如果能拥有瀛海人的你帮忙...

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#他认出我是瀛海人，还需要我帮忙观测...是什么只有我才能做到的事吗？

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#问你要不要打工，帮他们确认亚空间喷出的废料有没有价值。#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN:
"Neverlasting paths, what comes may not be what you ask, and what you ask may not come to pass..." There were about ten people in the observatory, chanting Myrian scriptures as they operated various devices.

I finally spotted the remains of some post-war transporter on my screen. The elders mentioned something about blessings from Binarii before bringing it in and disassembling it. They left us with some scraps to commemorate our fateful encounter.
text_CHS:
「二向无常，无往而遇，遇而无往...」 观测站聚集了十来人，他们一边颂扬万道经典，一边操作各种观测仪器。

最后我从屏幕中捕捉一艘战后货运船的残骸， 老人直说是二向庇佑，他们将之打捞并解体， 留了一些废料给我，作为彼此相遇的纪念。

text_EN:
"Neverlasting paths, what comes may not be what you ask, and what you ask may not come to pass..." There were about ten people in the observatory, reading Myrian scriptures as they operated various devices.

I spotted the remains of what looked like an East Ocean vessel on my screen, and I couldn't help but think about Khun, which I had destroyed with my own hands. Unable to concentrate, they eventually just let me go.
text_CHS:
观测站聚集了十来人，他们一边颂扬万道经典，一边操作各种观测仪器。

结果屏幕中我看到类似瀛海船只的残骸， 让我一直想到被我亲手毁掉的鲲， 无法专心，终于老人请我停手离去。

text_EN:
"This is the kind of story that will inspire them," she said.

I spent some time telling the story about how I was tricked into Bones' base back then. It was a little embarrassing, but the investigators clearly enjoyed listening to my adventure.
text_CHS:
「我们就是需要这类激励人心的故事。」她说。

我花了点时间说起当年在矿场上如何被骗，白帮又是如何设局，尽管丢脸，但稽查员却听得像是冒险剧情一样，对我的分享非常满意。

text_EN:
I spent some time telling the story about how I was tricked back then, but I struggled to recall the details, and the investigators lost interest as the story went on.

Afterward, the head of the Investigation Bureau told me that I should be proud of my contributions, however small, to making Fortune 9 a safer place.
text_CHS:
我花了点时间说起当年如何交易被骗，但总有些细节想不起来...

最后稽查处的人们意兴阑珊，处长事后告诉我要以自己的贡献为傲，就算是小小努力，但长久下来，九禄的治安迟早会改头换面。

最后稽查处的人们意兴阑珊，处长事后告诉我要以自己的贡献为傲，就算是小小努力，但长久下来，九禄的治安迟早会改头换面。

text_EN:
"That's a shame, I'm sure your story would have been very valuable."

The head of the Investigation Bureau looked clearly disappointed as she returned to her mission.
text_CHS:
「好吧，听不到你们的分享真可惜。」

稽查处长的眼中难掩失望，回头继续她的任务。

text_EN:
"Most trading vessels get lost on United Mining spaceways. It's unlikely the perpetrators were pirates...'

Eda presented her report and the patrol officer did not look pleased. The United Mining military's crooked practices were nothing new. They made up all sorts of excuses to make it hard on runners.
text_CHS:
「失事的商船，几乎都是矿业联合的航线...犯人我想不是海盗...」

分析结束后，巡逻局的人对艾妲的报告感到无奈，这不是第一天的事情，对方就像是有牌的流氓，会以各种名义压迫探勘人。

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#Hey runner, you carry yourself pretty well, and that body of yours ain't too bad.

I think you're the exact guy we need. There are some pretty important people from United Mining heading in.

We don't have enough hands onboard to do the job. Basically, we need someone to help us provide some... special services.

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(Special services... What is she getting at?)

#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#Ah, yes... If you've got any lumen jinseng on you, it'd help a lot with the job.#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#那边的探勘家，看你的气质和仪态，应该出身不错吧？

我就是需要你这样的人，有矿联的大人物要来了

我们现在人手不足，帮个忙，我们需要有人...特别服务

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（特别服务...是指什么...）

#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#对了...如果你手边有龙参，对这工作会很有帮助。#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

这里是兔窟通讯台...只要订阅我们频道，群山最动人的嗓音将陪你每日行船
...最神秘的歌手...只闻其声不见其人的「梅」，将为你献唱脍炙人口的音乐剧「万道长歌」...
（兔窟的广告也太扯，通讯频道被盖台成这样也太海盗...）
这歌手又是谁，想唱就唱，让人有点厌烦...
姐姐，你别心情不好，我帮你黑进他们的数据库如何？

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Serious#We're getting signals from a refugee ship...

This airspace is near Guifang, so it's full of drifting satellites and refugee camps... I think we should ignore them.

#AVATAR:BelterMissionaryA_N##NONAME#Please... you have to help us...

They discovered we were followers of Myria Terra, so they kicked us out of the slums.

We've been drifting for four days and we're almost out of food... P-Please... help...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#(It's only because witches worship Myria Terra that her followers get hassled around here.)

(It must be so hard for them to get by...)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Serious#有艘难民船向我们发送讯号...

这一带空域靠近鬼方，有不少漂流的卫星跟难民基地...建议是不要理会比较好

#AVATAR:BelterMissionaryA_N##NONAME#收到信号的人，帮帮忙...

我们因为被发现是万道后土的信徒，被贫民窟的领事赶了出来

这是流浪第四天，马上就要断粮了...帮帮我们...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#（只是因为女巫信仰了万道后土，现在信徒在龙脉冲突的区域，应该很难生存...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#There are way too many people in the square. What's going on?

"Commemorating the 6th anniversary of United Mining's victory in the Lumen War."

#AVATAR:Girl_ClosedEyes#The Day of Glorious Remembrance... They're celebrating the takeover of Thousand Peaks.

I think the container we got from the United Provision Farm was for this.

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#Hey! Get out of the way! If you're not here to help, scram!

The parade's about to start... There's 5,000 people in this thing, yet the food's not nearly enough!#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#广场人也太多了，这是什么活动，「纪念行星矿业联合龙脉冲突胜利六周年」...

#AVATAR:Girl_ClosedEyes#光荣纪念日，庆祝他们统治群山

上次在矿联粮食农场接的货柜，就是要送来这里

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#你们别挡路，如果是来帮忙的，就快，不是就闪远点！

游行要开始了...明明是五千人的游行，但食物根本不够！#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#Lumen seeking vessel, I'm a supplier working with the United Mining military.

The military is low on armor, and I'm required to confiscate some armor plates from you.

This is completely legal, please cooperate.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#Scoundrels! Let me pretend to be with the military. They won't dare touch us!

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#But that might not work. If we have enough armor, let's just give them what they want.

#AVATAR:Girl_Impatient#(Why do they always have completely different suggestions...?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#收到讯号的龙脉探测船，我是矿联军特约供应商

为了军事需要，我要征收你的装甲组件，这是合法的物资调拨，请配合#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#根本流氓，让我试试看，只要试着伪造成军船，他们就不会动手了！

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#伪造也有失败的可能，如果装甲还宽裕，我建议是照他们的做

#AVATAR:Girl_Impatient#（这两人意见为什么总是分歧...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#This is a warning to the lumen seeking vessel in orbit. The asteroid you are approaching is in United Mining airspace.

If you wish to continue forward, please provide the appropriate visa.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, what do we do? Do we really want to fight with them?

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Pffft... Fight with them? You want to get blown to smithereens?

Eddie, we're in military airspace, and the guard ship has its sights on us.

We should probably send them a modified signal.

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#Jun doesn't understand how the spaceways work around the Peaks. Go easy on him.

The doctor told us to upgrade our signal modifier. She must have known we'd run into situations like this...
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#警告轨道上的龙脉探测船，你接近的小行星位于矿联管理的轨道，如要继续前进，请提交你的电子签证#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，这该怎么办， 跟他们拼了吗...

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#啐，拼什么你想被轰成碎片吗？

姐姐，我们被巡逻军事空域的警备船逮到了，我可能要试着伪造讯号

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#李莫不懂群山人的航行方式，别骂他

「建议你们改装红楼的讯号变造系统」，医生就是怕发生这种事吗...

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#This is a warning to the lumen seeking vessel at 12 o'clock. You are entering restricted airspace.

Leave immediately, or we will open fire.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#United Mining?! Did you mess up the navigation again?

Don't forget what happened last time at the cave!

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#I already told you! Red Chamber's computer is like a gazillion years old!

It's almost impossible to prevent these errors...

I'll try to see if a modified signal will fix this... I'll take care of it. Trust me!

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(Remi's been making a lot of mistakes lately... What am I supposed to do?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#警告，12点钟方向的民间船，你即将进入管制的轨道空域，请立即返航，否则将依法开火#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#为什么会遇到矿业联合，航道计算又失误了吗！

别忘了上次在龙脉——

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#我说过了！红楼的计算机是龙脉冲突的古董...误差很难控制...

我会试着用讯号变造装置解决...交给我，我不会失败的！

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（该怎么做...最近菈米亚状况不太好...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#Warning: A large amount of debris has been detected in the spaceway.

Objects Identified: 43... 56... 162... 3874... Number is increasing rapidly...

Anti-collision system has been activated. Top-speed constraints are in place.

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#Eddie, some ships heading towards the processing plant say a container fell into the spaceway, and now synthescepter parts are all over the place.

There's way too many ships trying to dock. It'll probably take a while to clean up. Should we just go around them?

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Maybe I could help? I could do some scavenging...

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#Totally! Throwing you out into the spaceway to collect thousands of scraps sounds great!#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#警告，航道出现大量漂流物...数量：43...56...162...3874...急速增加中...

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#姐姐，前往加工厂「龙洞」的船只互相发出讯号，说有货柜意外掉落，龙鸣仿声器的零件散落在轨道上

现在要停泊的船只乱成一团...这打捞估计要不少时间，要绕路吗？

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#有我能帮忙的地方吗，感觉是打捞的任务...

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#可以啊，我不排斥帮你丢到轨道上协助打捞那几千片残骸...#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_N#Eddie, we're getting a signal from a ship saying they're a special correspondent from the Daily Lumen.

Why is the signal quality is so bad? I'm gonna open the channels.

#AVATAR:MountJournalist_N##NONAME#Is this... the R-R-Red Chamber? I'm from the Daily Lumen.

We've got our h-hands on some... important intel... W-We've got to contact the association i-immediately...

But our sh-ship's... long-range communication module... is having issues... Can you help us send it?#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

我们船...的远端通讯器异常...可以协助我们发送吗？#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

姐姐，刚刚确实有引擎的特征掠过我们轨道...
应该是不久前逃过海关的龙脉探测船...
我们该帮他们吗？
（够了，害了师父还不够吗？）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#Glory to the united! This is Unity News! Research indicates that witches become deformed after inhaling too much lumen.

They are the emissaries of Myrian's idols, skilled at eliminating the will of the people, true living war machines.

To prevent tragedies like the war from occurring again, there is an amendment to the Lumen Mining Act currently in place.

We propose stripping the witches of their rights and placing these weapons under the jurisdiction of United Mining...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#This is absurd. These Unity News vessels just cruise around North Mount Malefica, spreading rumors about witches...

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#Hack into their system, Remi.

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#United Mining is the one backing Unity News. This isn't like the asteroid belt.

Paralyzing their system might be risky...#AVATAR:Girl_Chide#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#天佑矿联，这里是统合新闻台！ 根据最新研究指出，女巫由于吸食大量汜，身体已跟人类不同

他们为万道的伪神执行使命，势在消灭人的意志，是真正的活体兵器

为防龙脉冲突的悲剧再次发生，龙脉指定法修正案势在必行

我们提议剥夺女巫的公民权，将兵器纳入矿业联合管辖...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#这也太夸张了，79号统合新闻台透过高速飞船四处绕行大巫山轨道，大量散播谴责女巫的言论...

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#黑客他们，菈米亚

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#统合新闻台背后是矿业联合，跟小行星带不一样，瘫痪是有风险的...#AVATAR:Girl_Chide#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#Lumen seeking vessel ahead, please provide your IDs immediately and cooperate with the search.

Recently, there's been a series of pirate ambushes on the transport routes.

We have good reason to believe these pirates have been cooperating with witches.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#Eddie, our route is overlapping with United Mining lumenide freighters.

Normally it shouldn't be a problem, but Red Chamber is a lumen seeking vessel, so they're being tough on us.

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#If there is a witch aboard, please comply with the Lumen Mining Act, Amendment One...

Which states that witches will no longer be able to legally operate lumen seeking vessels, and must be replaced as soon as possible.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#Hey! You're the ones that caused this—
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#前方的龙脉探测船，请尽速出示身份证明，配合搜索

最近运输船队的航行屡遭黑帮偷袭，研判为跟探测汜的女巫合作#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#姐姐，我们的航道跟矿联汜水运输船队的航道重叠了

原本应该没事，但因为红楼是龙脉探测船，被刻意刁难...

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#若贵船队有女巫， 请理解依据龙脉指定法修正案

女巫未来将不具备驾驶龙脉探测船的相关权利，请尽速替换船员#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#明明一切都是由你们造成——

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterManA_N##OUTFITS:BelterManA_SpaceSuit##NONAME#Gosh darn it... What the hell happened to the antenna? Did that repair man steal it?

Putting this on the new guy... What're they trying to do to me?

What am I gonna do now...? The show's about to start...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#Eddie, ever since we station here the network signal has been pretty weak.

Still, the shortwaves are picking up their signal. I'm gonna play it.

#AVATAR:BelterManA_N##OUTFITS:BelterManA_SpaceSuit##NONAME#Hey you! The lumen seeking vessel over there! Can we borrow your comms system?

May Ignis shed light upon your good deeds.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_N#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterManA_N##OUTFITS:BelterManA_SpaceSuit##NONAME#...完蛋了，天线怎么会不见，是上次外包的维修工人偷的吗？

把这些事情丢给一个新人，是要我背锅吗？

我该怎么办...节目就要播出了...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#姐姐，从停泊基地台轨道至今，网络讯号似乎都极度微弱

短波中倒是有收到他们的讯号，我直接播放出来

#AVATAR:BelterManA_N##OUTFITS:BelterManA_SpaceSuit##NONAME#那边的龙脉探测船，可以借你们的通讯设备吗！ 愿烛龙光照，今日众善奉行#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_N#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#That a synthescepter? You seem a bit puny for a runner... but that's neither here nor there. What'll you be betting on?

Listen here. The last record set was 200 standard meters... in just 5 standard minutes.

See that statue? That's the current record holder, the Nasty Dirtbag. He's a Peaker hero!

#AVATAR:Girl_ClosedEyes#Jun, don't be fooled. They're just trying to reel you in. You'll see this stuff all over the Peaks.

#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#Girl, you don't need to talk for the boy.

I get it, he's an outsider... and probably a bit of a coward.#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#你那是龙鸣仿声器吧，探勘人...瘦弱成这样，来我们斗技场是想赌什么？

告诉你，上次的洞穴探勘最深纪录是200标准尺，5标准分内

看见那雕像吗，上面的纪录保持人 「混乱土鬼」，我们群山的英雄！

#AVATAR:Girl_ClosedEyes#李莫，别被这种事挑衅，这在群山很正常。

#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#女孩你还替他说话，探勘人你根本不敢吧...外地来的胆小鬼吗？#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#What a lovely complexion... Have you ever thought about acting?

We're looking for some actors for our historical drama "The Witch". It's all the craze in the belt right now.

How about acting as an extra? The pay's pretty good. We take real good care of our actors!#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#嘿，美丽的女孩，头发那么漂亮...

我们刚好节目缺人，是小行星带当红的历史剧场「女巫」

有兴趣让我们做临演录影吗？片酬不会差，我们电台出手最大方了！#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#Eddie! We like never ever come to places like this. Plus, I've been feeling pretty lucky lately.

Check it out! The biggest prize is lumen intel...

If we got enough credits, how about... you know...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#(I'm not a big gambler, but Jun hasn't been feeling too well recently. Maybe this will cheer him up...)

#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#Jun, you want to experience some real Thousand Peaks culture?

You've helped us make a decent amount of money scavenging. Take these credits and use them however you want!#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#姐姐我说···难得都来到这里了，我觉得最近的运气不错

而且你看，最大奖品是龙脉的消息...

如果手边的信用点也够的话，不如...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#（我是不做这种事的人，但李莫状况不好，或许这可以让他转换心情...）

#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#李莫，要不要来感受群山人的文化

你帮我们拾荒了不少，就当感谢你，这部分信用点你就自由运用吧！#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountWorkerA_N##NONAME#Lumen intel? If I knew I wouldn't be working here.

But I do have a lot of excavation arms that need to be shipped. You a trading vessel crew?

Tell you what. You take this to Guifang and I'll pay you nicely for it.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(We will be going back at some point... Should we do it?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountWorkerA_N##NONAME#龙脉的消息，知道的话我还需要在这干活吗？

倒是有很多协助挖掘的义体手要送到矿场，你们商船队吗？

把这些货送到鬼方去，事后再拆一笔报酬给你

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（迟早会回到鬼方... 要帮这个忙吗？ ）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#Jun, let's go. These people have rough lives...

There's no way we'll get any lumen intel here.

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, I really want to do something to help the crew. Let me at least try...

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#Young traveler, you don't look like you're from around here. From where do you come, noble?

So you're looking for intel... Pray tell, have you heard the story of Ignis?

Our lives are tough, but Ignis' light and blessings take much of the suffering away...#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#李莫，走了啦，这里的人日子那么苦...

打听什么龙脉消息，不可能的

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，我希望能多少帮上船队，让我试试看...

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#旅人，你不像我们群山人，是哪来的贵族子弟吗...

你在寻找龙脉消息，那你知道烛龙的故事吗？

日子虽苦，但只要有它的光芒与赐福，生活就好过许多...#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#*Cough*... *cough*... Apologies. You're the crew I've been hearing about, the one with the witch aboard, am I right?

This is Plum, the singer for Rabbit Hole Newswire.

Anyway, could you help me out with the next performance of "Ignis' Genesis"?

I know you want to stay low, but your identity does not matter to us...

After all, all witches must be good at singing.

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#(She can tell I'm a witch... but she doesn't know that I didn't make it through the Tower because of my throat...)

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#(After Eddie talked with Doc she's been in a bad mood. Maybe I should encourage her to give it a go?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#咳咳...抱歉，你们是传闻中，有女巫的探勘船队吧...

我是「兔窟二」上为人们献唱的歌者「梅」

能不能替我完成下次颂唱「烛龙创世经」的节目？

我知道你要低调，但我们不会排斥你的身分...毕竟女巫都是好的歌者

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#（她认出我是女巫...但她不知道，我只是个不能好好唱歌的女巫...）

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#（姐姐跟医生聊完后，心情一直很糟，要不要推她一把？）

To ensure a smooth performance, please respect the traffic beacons and dock according to the instructions provided.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Smile##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(The final act is going to be held in the Culture Foundation? I hope we can all go see it together...)

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#This story stinks. But I've already seen the first two parts... so I guess if Eddie wants to go, we'll go.

#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#(I can't wait to find out what happens between Helius and Terra! I've been waiting for this for so long!)

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Doctor_N#"The 16th Witch Detection Squad mistakenly shot down a civilian vessel, which lead to large scale conflict with Zhao Ghe."

They even went so far as to identify our squad...

How nice of them to leave out our names.

What a shame, Eda... It seems the names of us sinners have been left out of this "historic" memorial.

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#Doctor, it wasn't your fault...

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#Eddie, how about I use my wrench to do a number on this wall?#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

#AVATAR:Doctor_N#「第十六女巫探测队误伤民间船，导致与朝歌的大型冲突」

连我分队都写出来...真是只差没把船员写上去而已

可惜了，艾妲，看不到我跟红两个罪人的名称

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#医生，这不是你们的错...

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#姐姐，不如让我用扳手把整面墙敲掉#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountJournalist_N##NONAME#It's an honor to be graced with the presence of such great members of the association.

I would love to interview you, but I'm simply too busy... United Mining is trying to amend the Lumen Mining Act.

We're planning on publishing a special edition, hoping that public opinion will make them back down.

...Unfortunately, we don't have enough people to get it done...

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#Eddie! We can't give up a chance to catch United Mining with their pants down!

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#I know there's no intel involved, but these people need help, Eda.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(Wow... Can't believe they agree. But... are they going to be able to work together?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountJournalist_N##NONAME#协会的大红人光临，我倍感荣幸，很想访问你们有没有新的故事，却抽不开身...

龙脉指定法修正案要强行通过，我们打算出特刊，用舆论让矿联知难而退

...但数据太多，人手真的不够...

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#姐姐，让矿业联合难堪的机会呢

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，虽然没有龙脉的情报，但这些人需要帮助

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（难得两人想法一致...但这两人一起安全吗...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Girl_ClosedEyes#Jun, you don't need to come with me. It's safer on the ship.

Plus, your injury from the last cave probably hasn't fully healed yet.

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#But I'm worried about you... This place isn't safe.

Also, I doubt there would be any reliable intel at a restricted research facility.

(Eh? Who's this?)

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerB_N##NONAME#You two! You're here for the academic conference?

You're all aware of the difficult issue of emotions in lumen, which some even claim are spirits.

Well, there's finally a way to clean up these ancient consciousnesses.

The presentation on "Consciousness Extraction" will soon start. Come on in!

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#(Consciousness extraction... No wonder United Mining's lumen is getting harder and harder to sense...)

(This probably has nothing to do with Banshee...)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Girl_ClosedEyes#李莫...你不用跟着我来的，回船上比较安全

况且上次在龙脉，你的受的伤应该还没好

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#我会担心你...这里不会太安全

再说这是被管制的研究中心，不太可能打听到可靠的情报

（...咦...这谁？）

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerB_N##NONAME#两位！来参加研讨会的吗？

你们也知道混合汜气会混杂着情绪，还有人说是灵魂这恼人的问题吧？

终于有办法把那些远古意识给清乾净，最新的「意识抽离法」要发表了，快点进来吧！

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#（意识抽离...难怪矿业联合的龙脉...越来越难被感受到...）

（这应该跟黑龙的任务无关...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#Eddie, we may have a media pass, but we still have to be careful in these military zones.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#You just worry about Red Chamber. If I can find some info on the ship used for Master's mission here...

It might give us more clues to the location of Banshee... Hey.

What're those people up ahead talking about?

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#May fire and iron light the stars... Our views on caves are more similar than you might think.

There's plenty of room for cooperation...

#AVATAR:TowerElder_N##NONAME#By the song of Terra, may Myria be with you always. You know witches are United Mining's most reliable partner...#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#姐姐...就算你有媒体证，进入军事地点还是要万事小心

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#你顾好红楼就可以，这里造船厂，如果能找出师父参加黑龙任务时，使用的龙脉探测船型号...

应该有机会找到通往黑龙的线索...咦？

前面是在说什么？

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#愿铁火于星辰闪耀...我们的分歧比你想像的更小...在龙脉问题上，我们有很多合作的空间...

#AVATAR:TowerElder_N##NONAME#后土行歌，万道常在，我们女巫是矿联最好的伙伴...#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#...Sorry, Jun, my attitude could have been better last time.

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#It's fine, I don't mind.

But I am worried about the intense security around here. Are you sure we need to go in?

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#This is one of United Mining's most important caves. They must have sent a lot of witches to survey this place.

My master may have been one of them...

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#Hey. You the exploration crew sent to help? Our comms system is totally screwed.

Help us send out our signals so we can blast these spirits to high heaven and start mining the damn cave!#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#...抱歉，李莫，我上次说话比较不客气

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#我不在意，我比较在意我们一定要进来这吗，这里戒备那么森严...

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#这里是矿联的重点矿场，应该有派过不少女巫巡查过

师父很有可能来过这里...

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#喂、是来支援的探测队吗？

我们通讯器坏得彻底，就靠你们发送讯号，把那些该死的神明炸飞，我们矿场就能开通了！#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantC_N##NONAME#Red Chamber? Will you be docking here? That's wonderful!

It just so happens that we're looking for runners to help us tune these newly developed synthescepters.

You've got an experienced East Ocean runner aboard, don't you? Could he come help us test them out?

#AVATAR:Man_Excited##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#The Peakers are finally starting to accept me... Eda, I'd love to go help.

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#Haha! I'm not sure how good he is, but boy does he know how to cause trouble.

If you don't want your data to get screwed up, you should probably find someone else. But it's up to you!

#AVATAR:Girl_ClosedEyes#Will you two cut it out? I'll decide.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantC_N##NONAME#红楼？你们是借港停泊吗，真太开心了，我们的新仿声器刚好差个探勘人来调校

你们船队有位超厉害的瀛海探勘人对吧，能帮我们测试吗？

#AVATAR:Man_Excited##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#我渐渐也被群山人认可了...艾妲，我希望能帮这个忙

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#我们探勘人厉不厉害我不知道，找麻烦倒是很会

不希望实验数据坏掉的话，要不要找别人呢？

#AVATAR:Girl_ClosedEyes#好了两位，我来决定就好

#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#(Those two are gone again? Didn't they say we'd leave right after checking out the cave?)

#AVATAR:MountCitizenA_N##NONAME#Are you the Red Chamber crew? Excellent! We're currently in the process of moving the spirits to another location...

But one of the witches we were working with stomped off after someone was a bit hard on her.

...You know how it is. Those displaced by the war have a tough time forgiving witches.

If I'm not mistaken, your captain is a witch. Could you help us out? I promise, we'll treat you well.#AVATAR:Sister_Serious#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#（这两人怎么又不见了，不是说参观一下矿场就走吗？）

#AVATAR:MountCitizenA_N##NONAME#你们是船队红楼吗？太好了，我们矿场正在进行神灵移驾的动作，但合同中的女巫因为被刁难被气走了

...你知道，龙脉冲突的遗族很难原谅她们

印象中你们的船长，也是个女巫...帮个忙吧，我保证不会让人刁难你们#AVATAR:Sister_Serious#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUJournalist_N##NONAME#Thank you very much for taking the time to do this interview, President.

Your explanation of the Lumen Mining Act will surely make it easier to promote in the Peaks.

#AVATAR:MountTheTenA_N#Well, it's only possible if we all work together. Thank you so much. Now, I'm afraid I'm quite busy and have to be going.

......

(What the hell am I doing helping promote this act... this law designed to oppress witches!)

#AVATAR:MountTheTenA_N#Hey... What's this?

What are you doing here? What about the Banshee Mission?

Ah, forget it. Listen, you have a hacker onboard, right? In one hour they're going to broadcast that show I just recorded...

Do not let that broadcast get out. Trust me, it'll be good for both of us.#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

......

别让那种东西播出来...听好，这件事对彼此都有帮助，女孩#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#Why isn't there anyone looking after Pipeline 3? Who's the witch in charge of this factory? Tell her to come over!

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#Excuse me... I heard that the superiors are looking for a cave called "Banshee"? Have you heard anything about it?

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#Huh? Which group are you with? Can't you see I'm busy?

Have you seen the witches they sent last week? I told my bosses that these so-called war machines are useless!

#AVATAR:Girl_Unwilling#(War machines? Wasn't it because of my master that you were able to win the war?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#三号汜水源头，没人管了吗？ 管工厂的女巫呢，叫她们出来！

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#打扰，听说高层这阵子，在寻找叫做「黑龙」的矿脉，你有听说过吗？

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#你们哪一班来的...什么鬼黑龙，没看我在忙吗？

有看见上周被派来的女巫吗？我就跟上层说不要启用这些活体兵器！

#AVATAR:Girl_Unwilling#（竟然说得出口活体兵器...你们的胜利不就是师父帮你们打仗...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#You have violated the lumen plant export restrictions, lady.

I'm warning you again, your actions and attitude is an obstruction of justice.

#AVATAR:TowerWanderer_N##NONAME#You can say it as many times as you want. You listen to me!

Our herbs are for healing people! But your restrictions just give you more money for war!

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(I thought only witches were in the plant trade...)

(I'm sure I could help her somehow... How would Master handle this?)

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Eddie, don't involve yourself... Master used to handle all the negotiations.

If we stick our noses in this, we're gonna get in trouble too.#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#你们已违反龙脉花卉的出口限制，再说一次，你现在的行为与言语，已经妨碍公务的执行

#AVATAR:TowerWanderer_N##NONAME#说几次都行，听好你的矿业联合！

我的花卉是要拿来救人的药草，但你的管制是要来帮你发战争财的！

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（花卉贸易...我以为这是只有女巫才会做的生意...）

（我应该可以帮帮她...记得以前师父是怎么处理的？)

I'm warning you again, your actions and attitude is an obstruction of justice.
You can say it as many times as you want. You listen to me!
Our herbs are for healing people! But your restrictions just give you more money for war!
(I thought only witches were in the plant trade...)

说几次都行，听好你的矿业联合！

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#Eddie, we got an encrypted message from Benzel's intel network.

Looks like an immigration vessel nearby tried to force their way through a customs barrier and ran into some trouble...

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#My name is Arrigo. I'm a former member of United Mining's new squad of witches who recently deserted.

They're waging war once more...

I heard you're a pupil of Red's... So, you must know how I feel about war...

Please, I'll give you lumen intel for your trouble...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#(It seems like almost all the witches are drafted...)

(Why am I the only one who has always avoided it?)

(Am I so useless... that I can't even help my master?)

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#Please! Hurry up... customs is coming! Are you helping or not?!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#姐姐，透过斑鸠的情报网络，红楼收到了一段加密信息委托

看来是附近的移民船，想要强制冲过海关逃亡，但遇到了困难...

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#...我叫艾琳达，我是刚刚逃出了矿联新女巫队的成员...他们又想打仗了

听說你是红的徒弟...一定懂我不想作战的心情...

拜托，我们有龙脉情报作为谢礼...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#（女巫几乎逃不过被征召...为什么只有我...可以躲过这些）

（是因为我很没用，所以连师父都帮不了吗...？）

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#拜托快回答，海关马上要追来了，帮不帮忙，说一声！#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, these ruins are dangerous. I'll go with you. After all, it's my job to do the running.

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#This is United Mining, to all vessels who have received this broadcast, please leave the airspace immediately!

We are about to start dismantling the Witching Tower. Do not attempt to obstruct the work, or disturb the crew.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#Eddie, they won't let us dock.

We're going to get fined if we don't leave. Let's get going.

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#...Eda used to live here. If it's not a high fine, she probably has her own thoughts on the matter.#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#这里是矿联公务船，请听到广播的所有船只，立刻离开现在的空域！

这里即将进行巫塔的拆除作业，请不要妨碍公务，干扰施工团队#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#姐姐，矿业联合禁止我们停泊

这样下去会有罚锾产生，要不要早点离开？

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#···这里是艾妲曾经居住的家，如果金额不高，她会有她的想法#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

#AVATAR:Girl_N#(If Jun has the supplies, it wouldn't hurt to have him try to get it...)

#AVATAR:Girl_N#（如果李莫的拾荒设备都充足的话，试试看也不一定是坏事...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#So, young man, you've come to Ignis No. 2 to test your luck, eh?

We do things differently from Ignis No. 1. You don't have to lift a finger. Just let your fortunes shine and treasures will come.

#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#The excavation squad commissioned to take the cave, Excidium, is one of the best in the belt.

Just invest a little, whatta you say? I'm sure they'll pay you back real nice.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#(Boy, are they slick... I should let Jun decide.)#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#年轻人，你来烛龙二号找运气吗？

我们这里跟一号可不一样，不用你亲自动手，只要你出手如光，一点代价即可

#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#今天被委托的探勘团「大荒」，可是小行星带的一流的探勘队

就投资一把，谁知道他们会帮你捞到什么呢？

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#（也太会做生意了吧...这让李莫决定好了。）#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#You look like a tough guy... You think you can take on our cave?

We do things differently from Ignis No. 2. You do all the work yourself, really... soak up the experience.

The mine's already reached 100 standard meters. Secret treasures of Myria await... Exciting, huh?

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#Still... a runt like you... Are you really going to be able to find anything?

I doubt you'll even make it past 50 meters...#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#不怕死的，想要挑战我们烛龙矿场...

这里跟二号不同，你可以亲自动手，亲自体验

现在矿场已经挖到100多标准尺深，万道的秘密宝藏就在眼前...谅你不可能不兴奋

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#但凭你这种瘦弱的体格，真的找得到什么有价值的东西吗？

我怕你连50标准尺的深度都下不去了...#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#I need to do more to help out. This old United Mining sentry station should have some spare parts lying around.

Huh? Is someone here?

#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#Brother, you don't look like you're from the Relief Foundation.

If you're here to scavenge, don't mess with the spirits of our fallen warriors.

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(It's the people responsible for gathering the remains of soldiers from the battlefields of war...)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#...我必须帮上艾妲她们，矿业联合的废弃哨站应该能找到飞船的零件

怎么有人...？

#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#兄弟，你不像我们龙脉遗族抚恤会的人，如果你是来拾荒的，小心别动到勇士们的英灵

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（是龙脉冲突后，清理战场的拾骨人...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#Young man, are you here to mourn the heroes of the belt as well?

Take your Praesidio Astrolabe and pray to our lords Praesidio. Then throw it in the pond, and they will watch over you.

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(This Praesidio sanctuary must have been built to show appreciation for the Ring Liberation Front...)

(Didn't think there'd be someone taking care of it...)

#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#Did you forget your astrolabe? Not a problem...

So long as you remember our motto... "Endless lumen, light the way..."#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#

#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#年轻人，你也是来悼念我们小行星带的勇士们吗？

握起你的龙守星盘，把想说的话告诉龙守，丢进池中就可以了

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（这应该是感谢星环自由战线，特别为他们建立的龙守圣地...）

（没想到还有人看守...）

......

Eda, can you hear me?

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountWorkerA_N##NONAME#By the blessings of Helius, just the man I need.

Jun, of the Red Chamber crew, right?

Perfect timing. Could you give us a hand and help us figure out what happened to this soil?

#AVATAR:MountWorkerA_N##NONAME#The Lumen Association was commissioned to fix the whole joint, but United Mining really screwed up this old refinery.

The pulse of the lumen is a mess... Can't even get a reading on the soil or the water...

#AVATAR:Man_Smile##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, the refinery is probably built on a lumen cave. With my excavation skills, I'm sure I could help.

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#We're looking for caves. Let's head to Mt. Aurora and quit wasting time here.#AVATAR:Girl_Think#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountWorkerA_N##NONAME#乙皇赐福，给我遇见大人物了，你是红楼船队的李莫...

来这里刚好...能不能帮我们看看这土壤发生什么事？

#AVATAR:MountWorkerA_N##NONAME#龙脉协会委托整修这里...但这老精炼厂被矿联破坏的乱七八糟了

脉象乱成一团...土质跟水质根本分析不来啊...

#AVATAR:Man_Smile##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，精炼厂应该是建立在龙脉上，探勘是我的强项，可以帮忙

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#重点是寻找龙脉，前往朝山吧， 别浪费时间#AVATAR:Girl_Think#
