text_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Finally... I found it. My clan's residence from when they were still in the Peaks.

...It must have been raided. The whole place looks like it was turned upside down.

A fate such as this should not have befallen a clan as honorable as ours.
text_CHS:

...应该是匆忙中被抄的吧，东西感觉被查过一轮，乱成这样

荣耀的鸢家，不该如此...

#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#Hold it, scavenger. You've entered asteroid belt territory, and this is the sacred graveyard of our fallen brothers.

Put down whatever you've got on you and leave immediately.

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(Oh no... Guerilla fighters. It looks like they're cleaning up the remnants of some battle...)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#别动，这位拾荒人 你已经进入小行星阵线的地盘了 这边是兄弟们神圣的墓碑 立刻放下你手边的拾荒器材，离开这里

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（这里是游击队的地盘，这下麻烦了。 他感觉是在清理过去战争的遗物...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#I'm getting an abnormal communication request. It's coming from a ship inside the ruins...

It's from the Rumani Clan... but I thought they had all disappeared long ago...

#AVATAR:BelterMissionaryA_N##NONAME#May the god of wine bring merriment to the pantheon of deities... Thank you for receiving this message.

This is Shiyaa of the Rumani Clan, servant to the princess.

We have been on the run for many years. At this age, I am unable to continue fleeing from United Mining's assassins...

I wanted to return here to end my days in peace. It must be fate that we have met.

Would you be so kind as to fulfill my final request?#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#Eddie, 16 years ago, the Rumani Clan pretended to be United Mining's ally in order to attempt an assassination.

I'm not sure they can be trusted...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#...She doesn't look like a bad person.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#收到了异常的通讯要求，来源在是废墟之中的船...船籍...

是应该已经灭亡的...吉普赛家族...

#AVATAR:BelterMissionaryA_N##NONAME#愿酒神与银河诸神同在...谢谢你们接受通讯，我是吉普赛家族的遗民，公主的随从，席雅。

我们已经流亡了数年，如今年纪够大，再也躲不了矿业联合的追杀...

想回来这里求安息，相见有缘，不知道能不能答应我们最后的请求...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#姐姐，吉普赛家族是十六年前，假同盟之名，试图暗杀矿业联合失败的势力，作风反覆，不一定可信...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#...看起来不像坏人

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuitHelmetOff#The tunnel is blocked... I'd better take another path.

Wait... is that someone on the other side?

Hey! Is someone in there?

#AVATAR:YingManA_N##NONAME#Okay everybody, pull yourselves together. Someone's here!

Hey! Over here!!

We're the Lumen Association's 347th excavation party, Nomadic Rhythm. We got trapped on the other side of the tunnel.

The control panel for the lumium valves is trapped under all those rocks. We'll tell you how to release more lumium.

That should be able to blow open the tunnel. Please, help!#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

我们是龙脉协会协会编号347的探勘团「流浪节拍」，被困在坑道另一头了。

你那边有组气阀面板，压在石堆中。照我们指示释放汜气，应该能炸开通道。 帮个忙吧！#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#A Koomsung stronghold... They were once such a powerful faction, but the war has left nothing but pulverized ruins.
text_CHS: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#有名金城舰队基地，在冲突后也只剩下被炸毁的废墟了吗...

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterManA_N##NONAME#Tsk... Someone found us...

Hey! You with the Lumen Association? Or are you free runners, like us?

What's with that face? We're just blasting a few holes to get to the good stuff! That's how everyone does it!

What, you gonna do something about it?#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterManA_N##NONAME#啐，居然会被人看见...

喂！你是哪条道上的？龙脉协会认可的探勘家，还是跟我一样的自由探勘人？

干嘛一脸惊讶，不过就是破坏龙穴而已，谁不是这样干

难道你想抓我吗？#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#Take the documents! We can pick them later... or buy them! Let's go!

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#We're not with the Lumen Association, we're just runners...

......

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#贵重的文物带走就好，那些再采，大不了用买的也行，走了！

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Looks like a fight broke out here... there are even traces of explosives.

Someone was trying to blow the Myrian gate open... I wonder if the pirates are still inside?
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#这是...爆破和打斗的痕迹...
有人想直接炸开龙门...盗采者还在里面吗？

text_EN:
#AVATAR:YingManA_N##NONAME#Why hello there, stranger. By the looks of your outfit, you must be a part of the Red Chamber crew.

I've seen your Lumen Association reports. Quite a crew you've got there... quite a crew.

This cave is way bigger than we expected. Would you, by any chance, want to help out with some archaelogical research?

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuitHelmetOff#Are you... Lagrée? The leader of the Rodin expedition party... I can't believe you've heard of us. What an honor.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:YingManA_N##NONAME#陌生的探勘人，您好

看服装，你应该是红楼团成员吧？我看过龙脉协会的报告，你们不简单啊

这个龙穴的规模超乎预期，你愿意协助我们的考古研究吗？

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuitHelmetOff#您是...德拉格雷？探险世家罗登最著名的领队...您居然听过我们的名字， 真是太荣幸了。

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#Eh? Nothing! I'm just trying out the machine. Who knew the transmutation engine would start up?

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#What are these college students from Mt. Aurora doing? Are they trying to blow up the cave?
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantB_N##NONAME#整个地板...都在震动，图鲁斯你做了什么？

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#我没有啊，我只是在测试机器，谁知道风水机关就动起来了！

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#这些朝山来的大学生在干什么，想炸掉龙穴吗？

text_EN: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Is there something... flowing through these walls of lumenite? Are the lights playing tricks on me? No, it's alive...
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#汜晶岩壁里，有东西在...流动？
光线的错觉吗？不对，那是...活的？

text_EN: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#That's weird. The eco-scanner is working on the other plants, so it isn't broken. Is this... a new species in the pond?

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(What luck... running into United Mining now... I'm just going to try and slip away without letting them see me.)

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#A civilian lumen seeking vessel? Don't worry, we're not going to arrest you this time.

Perfect timing. We're going to blow that Myrian gate open, but we don't have anyone to help us place the explosive.

Do us a favor and place the bomb in that groove up there.

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(How high is that? You want me to risk my life for you?)#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（怎么这么不巧，在这里遇到矿联的人... 小心的撤吧，别给他们发现）

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#那边是民间探勘人吗？ 没事，这回我们不想逮捕你。

你来得正好，我们要把这扇龙门炸了。 那边墙上的凹槽，你帮我们去把炸药装进去。

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（那个高度...是想要我代替你们冒险吗？）#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#To commemorate the 6th anniversary of the end of the Lumen War, the troupe performing "Melody of Starsong" will be holding a disaster relief charity benefit.

Today's performance is the second act, "Songless Heaven, Songless Earth".

This will be their 4th performance from the Thousand Peaks tour...

#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#Melody of Starsong! This must be the next part of the story!

Come on! Hurry up and sit down, or all the seats are going to get taken!

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Uh, okay? I'm sitting, but I don't know what's so great about this opera.

#AVATAR:Man_Smile##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(It's that opera that Eda was really into...)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#（广播）纪念龙脉冲突终战六周年，龙脉长歌赈灾义演

本次是龙脉长歌贰部曲「天地无歌」，是群山巡回的第四场...

#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#龙脉长歌，这应该是继上次的贰部曲

你们还不快点坐下，要没位置了！

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#姐姐我坐下了，但我真不懂这剧有什么好看..

#AVATAR:Man_Smile##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（是上次艾妲看得蛮开心的 神话剧...）

#AVATAR:MountTheTenB_N#Well, well. The witch of the Red Chamber. What brings you here? Isn't your mission more important?

Hmph. Since the children are here, I won't say any more.

We are holding a class on Myria. Would you like to share your thoughts with the kids?

Surely your wealth of experience with lumen gives you a unique perspective on it.

#AVATAR:Girl_Surprised#(Isn't he the vice-president for the Council of Ten? What's he doing working as the dean?)

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(I never thought he'd be doing something like this. I guess I was wrong about him...)

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(These children are all orphans of the war. I'm a witch... Are they even going to be able to accept me?)

#AVATAR:MountTheTenB_N#好呀，红楼船队的女巫，你怎么会来到这里，去执行你任务重要点吧？

算了这次在孩子面前，不说你们了

我们正在上一堂万道课，愿意与孩子们分享你心中的万道吗，见多识广的你，眼中的龙脉想必与我们不同

#AVATAR:Girl_Surprised#（这不是十人会的副会长吗？原来他是这里的院长...）

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（原来他是这样的人...我错怪他了）

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（都是战后孤儿，作为女巫，这群孩子接受得了我吗...）

segments: Well, well. The witch of the Red Chamber. What brings you here? Isn't your mission more important?
Hmph. Since the children are here, I won't say any more.
We are holding a class on Myria. Would you like to share your thoughts with the kids?
Surely your wealth of experience with lumen gives you a unique perspective on it.
(Isn't he the vice-president for the Council of Ten? What's he doing working as the dean?)
(I never thought he'd be doing something like this. I guess I was wrong about him...)
(These children are all orphans of the war. I'm a witch... Are they even going to be able to accept me?)

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Eda, there's an old, broken ship in the distance... "May the power of law bring justice to industry..."

By the looks of this insignia, it's probably a transport vessel from the London Trade Alliance. What do you want to do?

#AVATAR:Girl_N#(The London Trade Alliance was a famous merchant faction before the war. If there are any containers inside, they're probably filled with some useful stuff...)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#艾妲，矿场深处的有一艘破旧的船舰... 「愿律法支撑商业的天平...」 看这徽章，应该是伦敦商业联盟的运输船

有建议的处理方式吗？

#AVATAR:Girl_N#（商业联盟是战前知名的行星商人势力，如果有什么遗留的货柜，对旅行应该帮助很大...要想一下...）

text_EN: Containers were scattered all over the floor of the spaceship. Perhaps they were rushing to escape and didn't have the time to take the goods. It took a long time, but we were eventually able to bring them back to Red Chamber.
text_CHS:
印象中，飞船的深处是散落一地的货柜，
可能是过去逃难时来不及带走的货物。
虽然多花了点时间，但总是将它们带回来了。

可能是过去逃难时来不及带走的货物。
虽然多花了点时间，但总是将它们带回来了。

option_title_EN: Let Jun try. You can't survive these journeys without scavenging.
option_title_CHS: 让李莫试试，在万壑旅行，拾荒是必要的。

text_EN: Back in those days, if it wasn't a cave, most of the time Eda didn't want to waste time on it.
text_CHS: 记得当时只要不是龙穴，艾妲多半认为，不需要多花时间在这些地方。

option_title_EN: It might be something, but we still shouldn't waste any time on it.
option_title_CHS: 虽然可惜，但还是别乱来好了。

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#All you runners do is look for lumen. There's no intel here for you.

The hull of this ship was cast from the souls of my brothers, and yet it's on the verge of collapse.

I can't just let it crumble into the void of space. If you've got any damaged armor plates lying around...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(The ship looks worse than I imagined. There's no way it'll hold on for much longer...)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#只知道寻找龙脉的探勘人，这里没有你要的情报

你看到的这船，龙骨是由兄弟们的灵魂所铸，如今随时都要崩塌...

我不能放着它散落回宇宙的大海， 如果你手边有破损的装甲组件...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（船舱比想像中还破旧，这看来是撑不久了...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#Eddie, we're coming up on an unidentified object. Analysis has revealed that it's about 2 standard meters long...

The signal is really weak, should we try to salvage it?#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#姐姐，轨道上的不明物体与我们即将交会，分析是长约2标准尺的物件...

讯号微弱，要试图捕捉吗？#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

讯号微弱，要试图捕捉吗？

text_EN:
The boarding vessel received the mother ship's docking signal at the same time we sent them a signal prohibiting them from docking.

While they were trying to figure out what was going on, Red Chamber sped away.
text_CHS:
收到母船的登陆讯号，
同时又收到伪造的禁止登入讯号，
趁着对方正感到困惑时，
红楼迅速远离。

segments:

While they were trying to figure out what was going on, Red Chamber sped away.

同时又收到伪造的禁止登入讯号，
趁着对方正感到困惑时，
红楼迅速远离。

option_title_EN: Trick the boarding vessel into turning back by sending it a modified signal.
option_title_CHS: 发送伪造讯号给登陆艇，欺骗他们折返

text_EN:
"That's a gas planet, not Earth. It looks like the terrestial planets of this solar system disappeared long ago!"

The robot was clearly upset, but perked up to thank us, handing us a little model as he said, "Here! This is for you!"
text_CHS:
「...这是气体行星，不是地球，这个太阳系的类地行星，好像很久之前就消灭了。」

机器人哀伤的说着「但为了感谢你，这个送你！」

他打起精神拿了一个模型给我，那是...

option_title_EN: Um... West Mount Tonitrus?

text_EN: The signal got sent and the ship disappeared from our radar. We never saw them again.
text_CHS:
讯号一拍过去，
对方的船体就消失于雷达之中，
再也没有回来。

segments: The signal got sent and the ship disappeared from our radar. We never saw them again.

讯号一拍过去，
对方的船体就消失于雷达之中，
再也没有回来。

option_title_EN: Pose as a civilian ship and tell them they've mistaken us for someone else.
option_title_CHS: 变造自己讯号为民间船，并告知对方认错人了

text_EN:
As a witch, Eda made it a point to get involved with incidents like this. She had Remi send the ship ID to the Myrian Ignis Guild and promised the slums supplies if they would take them back.

They didn't have much to thank us with, but they insisted on giving us what they could.
text_CHS:
艾妲因为女巫的身份，觉得自己一定得管这件事，她要求菈米亚将船的编码转成万道烛龙商会，
以承诺未来会有补给为条件，让贫民窟的人重新接受了难民。

对方没什么能答谢我们，但坚决感谢船队的她给了...

对方没什么能答谢我们，但坚决感谢船队的她给了...

option_title_EN: Get in contact with the slums' consul to try and help.
option_title_CHS: ...协助跟贫民窟的领事沟通

text_EN:
The security on the service vessel broadcasting the signal wasn't very complicated. It wasn't long before Remi hacked into Rabbit Hole Newswire and got the information on their mysterious singer.

The information popped up and Eda stared at the screen, suprised at what she saw.
text_CHS:
发送讯号的业务船安检并不复杂，菈米亚很快的黑入了「兔窟二」，没两下就找到了兔窟最宝贵的神秘歌手数据。

数据一出来后，艾妲却愣住了，那原来是...

segments: The security on the service vessel broadcasting the signal wasn't very complicated. It wasn't long before Remi hacked into Rabbit Hole Newswire and got the information on their mysterious singer.

数据一出来后，艾妲却愣住了，那原来是...

option_title_EN: Well, they shouldn't be forcing all these ads on us. Let them have it, Remi.
option_title_CHS: ...谁叫他们到处盖台，就照你說的做

text_EN:
Our modified signal worked, and they were convinced we were scammers just like them. Given that we were one and the same, they happily chatted with us about how many runners they'd tricked on this trip alone.

"Those dishonorable liars!!!" I was visibly upset that someone could do such a thing. But Remi, she acted like she'd seen it a million times.
text_CHS:
我们成功模拟了伪造讯号。
对方不疑有他，当我们是自己人，
得意地聊着他们这趟又骗了多少探勘人。

「这些没荣誉的骗子！」

我记得我骂出的话。菈米亚却好像习以为常。

「这些没荣誉的骗子！」

我记得我骂出的话。菈米亚却好像习以为常。

option_title_EN: Pretend like we're one of them to figure out if they're trying to trick us.
option_title_CHS: 先伪装成同业，确认他们是不是骗子

text_EN:
They were hidden amid some space debris, but Eda was able to locate them almost immediately. That allowed us to quickly put some distance between us and them.

I didn't bring it up... but that's when I understood what people meant by "human radar".
text_CHS:
尽管隐身在宇宙垃圾群中，
红楼却瞬间捕捉了对方的位置，
这信息让我们快速的远离他们追踪的航道

尽管那时没说，但我却理解了活体雷达的意思

option_title_EN: Let's use the reso-scanner to locate the vessel and avoid an attack.
option_title_CHS: 以防万一被攻击，先用龙脉共振仪找出对方船的位置

text_EN: When they realized we were with the military, they couldn't seem to wrap their heads around it, but they let us go.
text_CHS: 对方发现我们原来也是矿业联合军，尽管不解却放我们走了。

segments: When they realized we were with the military, they couldn't seem to wrap their heads around it, but they let us go.
对方发现我们原来也是矿业联合军，尽管不解却放我们走了。

option_title_EN: Remi's right. Let's pose as a military vessel.
option_title_CHS: 相信菈米亚...发送伪造的军船讯号

text_EN:
To make sure we didn't set off any anti-theft mechanisms, Remi tested it with multiple modified signals. After we didn't get a response, we pulled the container in.

It turned out to be a smuggling container that some illegal excavators lost. Some bumbling pirate had left their life support device inside, so it started emitting a warning signal...
text_CHS:
以防触发任何防盗机构，菈米亚修改了通讯编码后试探多次，没回应后才打捞起来。

那是龙脉盗采遗失的走私货，但不知道哪位糊涂的家伙，遗忘了维生装置在里面，才会发出警讯...

那是龙脉盗采遗失的走私货，但不知道哪位糊涂的家伙，遗忘了维生装置在里面，才会发出警讯...

option_title_EN: Send out a signal and see if the automated response is working.
option_title_CHS: 先发送讯号过去，看自动询答器还能不能运作

text_EN:
The parade began, and the Lumen Association took the stage, praising the role the Lumen Mining Act played in establishing peace for the Peaks. Seeing the happy looks on the people's faces was a stark contrast to the United Mining that I knew.

After a day of hard work, there was a celebration dinner. The catering crew was not only given decent pay, we were also given a copy of the history drama that was played that day. Eda did not participate, of course.
text_CHS:
游行盛大的开始，龙脉协会也上台致词，感谢龙脉指定法带来的和平荣景，看到民众欢喜的表情，跟我认识的矿业联合实在很冲突。

当天结束后是忙碌的庆功宴，粮食组除了交货金额，还发一份当天投影的历史剧影碟。 当然，艾妲没有参加。

Eda did not participate, of course.

当天结束后是忙碌的庆功宴，粮食组除了交货金额，还发一份当天投影的历史剧影碟。
当然，艾妲没有参加。

option_title_EN: We've got the shipment of food you're looking for.
option_title_CHS: 你们的粮食货柜我们带来了

text_EN: We still had quite the journey ahead of us, so we calculated a new route that avoided the chaotic orbit. Later on, we heard that more than a few collisions occurred. I hope there weren't any casualties.
text_CHS:
毕竟还有路要赶，红楼算出新航道，
无视了混乱成一团的轨道，
事后听说有发生几起碰撞意外，
只希望无人伤亡。

segments: We still had quite the journey ahead of us, so we calculated a new route that avoided the chaotic orbit. Later on, we heard that more than a few collisions occurred. I hope there weren't any casualties.

无视了混乱成一团的轨道，
事后听说有发生几起碰撞意外，
只希望无人伤亡。

option_title_EN: Oh, cut it out. Just get out of orbit.
option_title_CHS: 别说闲话，避开轨道就好

text_EN:
After realizing it was their mistake, they muttered a few sarcastic remarks and let us go.

"Hmm? I'm surprised the higher-ups haven't gotten rid of all those old lumen seeking vessels yet."

"Don't start the engines, you might blow yourselves up."
text_CHS:
判断是自己人，对方髓口几句挖苦，
就放我们通行了。

「想不到，上面还没把这种龙脉探测船淘汰」
「小心别点火，不然引擎自己爆炸啊」

text_EN: Suspicious that we weren't who we said we were, they requested Red Chamber to send out another signal. Although they eventually let us go, avoiding the prying eyes of United Mining was more difficult than I'd imagined.
text_CHS: 似乎是怀疑我们的身份，对方重复要求红楼送出讯号，尽管最后放行了我们，但要躲着矿业联合的眼睛探勘，果然不是太容易的事。

option_title_EN: Send them a modified signal and pretend to be a United Mining vessel.
option_title_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为是矿业联合船舰

text_EN:
Remi sent out a modified signal, and it worked, but they weren't totally convinced. So, they pretended like they would help us check our equipment and forced us into an inspection.

As Eda showed them around Red Chamber, she did her best to hide her fury.
text_CHS:
菈米亚发出了伪造的编码，
尽管成功，但对方怀疑心不减，
要求以协助检查设备，强制拜访，

我还记得艾妲一边跟对方介绍红楼，
一边隐忍着愤怒的样子。

text_EN: We succeeded in buying Arrigo some time, but the second crew continued the chase. Not long after, I read in the Daily Lumen about a witch being charged with serious offenses. After hearing about it, Eda was so upset that she didn't speak for days.
text_CHS:
我们的确拖了点时间，但对方第二队却持续追捕。
不久后，我于龙脉日报看到判处重刑的女巫新闻，有好阵子艾妲连话都不想说。

我们的确拖了点时间，但对方第二队却持续追捕。
不久后，我于龙脉日报看到判处重刑的女巫新闻，有好阵子艾妲连话都不想说。

option_title_EN: Let them come aboard to buy her some time.
option_title_CHS: 让他们上船盘查，拖对方时间

text_EN: The Red Chamber was able to send over the message immediately. To thank us for helping out, the correspondent gave us one of her valuable leads, which turned out to be some lumen intel.
text_CHS: 红楼成功在第一时间把讯号传给了协会，龙脉日报的特派员为了感谢我们，将一个手上重要的线报给了我们，那是龙脉的情报。

segments: The Red Chamber was able to send over the message immediately. To thank us for helping out, the correspondent gave us one of her valuable leads, which turned out to be some lumen intel.
红楼成功在第一时间把讯号传给了协会，龙脉日报的特派员为了感谢我们，将一个手上重要的线报给了我们，那是龙脉的情报。

option_title_EN: You can use our ship as a relay station. No problem.
option_title_CHS: 我们的船可以借你们当中继站

text_EN: Using a forged military visa, Remi was able to get into the backend of their system, and their wireless signal was soon paralyzed. She even managed to pull out a top-secret file from one of their folders.
text_CHS:
靠着伪装的军用签证，
菈米亚竟然成功摸进了对方后台，
没多久就瘫痪了对方的无线讯号，
更从对方的系统中摸出了一份机密档案。

segments: Using a forged military visa, Remi was able to get into the backend of their system, and their wireless signal was soon paralyzed. She even managed to pull out a top-secret file from one of their folders.

靠着伪装的军用签证，
菈米亚竟然成功摸进了对方后台，
没多久就瘫痪了对方的无线讯号，
更从对方的系统中摸出了一份机密档案。

option_title_EN: Just do something, anything!
option_title_CHS: 做点什么就对了！

text_EN: We pretended to be high-ranking military officials, and the transport crew was unable to stop apologizing. Eda reprimanded them so much that they ended up paying us to not let anyone know about their mistake.
text_CHS:
我们将自己伪装成高级军官，
运输队对自己的误认连番致歉，
在艾妲斥责下，甚至付出了封口费，
只希望我们别说出他们的丑事。

segments: We pretended to be high-ranking military officials, and the transport crew was unable to stop apologizing. Eda reprimanded them so much that they ended up paying us to not let anyone know about their mistake.

我们将自己伪装成高级军官，
运输队对自己的误认连番致歉，
在艾妲斥责下，甚至付出了封口费，
只希望我们别说出他们的丑事。

option_title_EN: Pose as a high ranking military officer and reprimand them.
option_title_CHS: 伪装自己是高级军官，骂回去

text_EN: The modified signal didn't work too well. We were able to bide enough time to move away from the boarding vessel. However, the mother ship attacked, and Red Chamber was hit pretty hard.
text_CHS:
伪造讯号不算太成功，
只有争取到极短的时间远离登陆艇轨道，
对方母船的炮火掠过了红楼装甲，
造成了不少伤害。

segments: The modified signal didn't work too well. We were able to bide enough time to move away from the boarding vessel. However, the mother ship attacked, and Red Chamber was hit pretty hard.

伪造讯号不算太成功，
只有争取到极短的时间远离登陆艇轨道，
对方母船的炮火掠过了红楼装甲，
造成了不少伤害。

text_EN:
As soon as they received the signal, they responded immediately. "Hey dummy dumbs, we coming for your ship!"

A hail of gunfire rained down on us, and it took all of Remi's skills to get us out of there.
text_CHS:
讯号才刚出去，红楼就收到了讯号

「傻子等着船给我们回收吧」

海盗的火网整片撒了过来，菈米亚费尽心力，才成功脱出交战的空域。

segments:
As soon as they received the signal, they responded immediately.

"Hey dummy dumbs, we coming for your ship!"
A hail of gunfire rained down on us, and it took all of Remi's skills to get us out of there.

讯号才刚出去，红楼就收到了讯号

「傻子等着船给我们回收吧」

海盗的火网整片撒了过来，菈米亚费尽心力，才成功脱出交战的空域。

text_EN:
Eda tried to pose as the Myrian Ignis Guild and get them help, but it didn't work.

To this day, I still pray that they made it out.
text_CHS:
艾妲希望透过伪造成烛龙商会，去帮忙说情，
但计划没有成功。

希望他们能度过难关，至今我依然祈求。

segments:
Eda tried to pose as the Myrian Ignis Guild and get them help, but it didn't work.

To this day, I still pray that they made it out.

艾妲希望透过伪造成烛龙商会，去帮忙说情，
但计划没有成功。

希望他们能度过难关，至今我依然祈求。

text_EN:
It came as no surprise that the firewall on the illegal base station's service vessel wasn't easy to get past.

As soon as one of Remi's operations failed, they counter-attacked, hacking into Red Chamber and causing multiple systems to go haywire.
text_CHS:
对方是非法基地台「兔窟二」的业务船，上面的防火墙当然不好惹。

一个操作失误，对方的系统便反向入侵了红楼。造成了多处系统失灵。

segments:
It came as no surprise that the firewall on the illegal base station's service vessel wasn't easy to get past.

As soon as one of Remi's operations failed, they counter-attacked, hacking into Red Chamber and causing multiple systems to go haywire.

对方是非法基地台「兔窟二」的业务船，上面的防火墙当然不好惹。

一个操作失误，对方的系统便反向入侵了红楼。造成了多处系统失灵。

text_EN: The modified signal failed and I remember us flying off in a panic. Even though we got away, the ship fired off several rounds and managed to puncture Red Chamber's armor with a few holes.
text_CHS:
伪造的讯号失败了，
记得在一阵惊慌中，我们急忙驾船远离，
对方的炮火却炸坏了红楼装甲数个洞。

segments: The modified signal failed and I remember us flying off in a panic. Even though we got away, the ship fired off several rounds and managed to puncture Red Chamber's armor with a few holes.

伪造的讯号失败了，
记得在一阵惊慌中，我们急忙驾船远离，
对方的炮火却炸坏了红楼装甲数个洞。

text_EN:
Eda tried to pin down their location, but it must have taken too long. They got suspicious and immediately opened fire.

Red Chamber barely got away.
text_CHS: 艾妲试图捕捉对方的位置，但可能是花了太多时间，对方怀疑我们的身份，随即对我们展开攻击。红楼好不容易才脱险。

segments:
Eda tried to pin down their location, but it must have taken too long. They got suspicious and immediately opened fire.

Red Chamber barely got away.
艾妲试图捕捉对方的位置，但可能是花了太多时间，对方怀疑我们的身份，随即对我们展开攻击。红楼好不容易才脱险。

text_EN: Each time Remi's modified signals failed to work, it got harder for us to trust her in situations like this.
text_CHS: 当时的我们，面对每一次伪造讯号的失败，变得越来越难信任菈米亚。

segments: Each time Remi's modified signals failed to work, it got harder for us to trust her in situations like this.
当时的我们，面对每一次伪造讯号的失败，变得越来越难信任菈米亚。

text_EN: As soon as the signal went out, the container's auto-safety mechanisms were triggered and it exploded into a million pieces. Some of the flying fragments hit Red Chamber pretty hard.
text_CHS: 讯号一出去，货柜的自动安检系统运作了起来，爆裂后的碎片击中红楼的甲板。

segments: As soon as the signal went out, the container's auto-safety mechanisms were triggered and it exploded into a million pieces. Some of the flying fragments hit Red Chamber pretty hard.
讯号一出去，货柜的自动安检系统运作了起来，爆裂后的碎片击中红楼的甲板。

text_EN: Red Chamber calculated a complex route for all the freighters in orbit and broadcast it out. The ships made it to Luma Caverna without causing any crashes or clogging up the orbit.
text_CHS: 红楼透过计算机计算，发布复杂的航道导引，终于在空域统一了运输船的航行路线，直到龙洞探险公司的回收船抵达，航行的船只都没有遇到互抢轨道的危机。

segments: Red Chamber calculated a complex route for all the freighters in orbit and broadcast it out. The ships made it to Luma Caverna without causing any crashes or clogging up the orbit.
红楼透过计算机计算，发布复杂的航道导引，终于在空域统一了运输船的航行路线，直到龙洞探险公司的回收船抵达，航行的船只都没有遇到互抢轨道的危机。

option_title_EN: Help the ships pass by safely.
option_title_CHS: 协助引导船只安全通过吧

text_EN: We were unable to trick them, and they were more than happy to unload their guns on a civilian vessel that wouldn't obey orders.
text_CHS: 红楼没能瞒过对方。对于劝阻不听的民船，警备船也毫不犹豫地展开攻击。

segments: We were unable to trick them, and they were more than happy to unload their guns on a civilian vessel that wouldn't obey orders.
红楼没能瞒过对方。对于劝阻不听的民船，警备船也毫不犹豫地展开攻击。

text_CHS: （不会发生）

segments: （不会发生）

text_EN: The modified signal was cracked, and we were attacked for obstructing justice.
text_CHS:
伪造的编码遭到识破，
红楼因为妨碍公务而被攻击。

segments: The modified signal was cracked, and we were attacked for obstructing justice.

伪造的编码遭到识破，
红楼因为妨碍公务而被攻击。

text_EN:
Red Chamber used a modified signal to pose as a high-ranking witch in the military. We told them that the witch was on a top-secret mission, so they had no choice but to give up the chase.

When I brought it up later, Eda only responded quietly, "I wish my master had someone to help her."
text_CHS:
红楼透过讯号伪造，宣称自己是直属于军方高层的女巫长，该女巫是执行不可说的机密任务，对方见状只能放弃追捕。

「希望师父也有人能帮她。」 事后聊起这件事，艾妲只默默如此说，没有欣喜。

segments: Red Chamber used a modified signal to pose as a high-ranking witch in the military. We told them that the witch was on a top-secret mission, so they had no choice but to give up the chase.

When I brought it up later, Eda only responded quietly,
"I wish my master had someone to help her."
红楼透过讯号伪造，宣称自己是直属于军方高层的女巫长，该女巫是执行不可说的机密任务，对方见状只能放弃追捕。

「希望师父也有人能帮她。」
事后聊起这件事，艾妲只默默如此说，没有欣喜。

option_title_EN: Pose as a ranking officer and tell them the hunt has been called off.
option_title_CHS: 伪装自己是军方高层...叫他们放弃追捕

text_EN: The news ship's comms system was pretty badly damaged. Remi was able to fix it up, but could only restore some of its functions. Still, it was enough for them to send the message.
text_CHS:
新闻船的通讯设备损坏严重，菈米亚维修后也只恢复有限的通讯能力。
但足以让特派员传讯给协会了。

segments: The news ship's comms system was pretty badly damaged. Remi was able to fix it up, but could only restore some of its functions. Still, it was enough for them to send the message.

新闻船的通讯设备损坏严重，菈米亚维修后也只恢复有限的通讯能力。
但足以让特派员传讯给协会了。

option_title_EN: Let us dock and our technician will help you repair your comms system.
option_title_CHS: 要求停泊，我们的船师可以过去维修

text_EN:
The signal was picked up by the broadcasting vessel and the attempted jam was stopped in its tracks. They saw through Red Chamber's disguise and the United Mining patrol ship responsible for protection closed in on Red Chamber, threatening us with prosecution for serious crimes.

We escaped... But only barely.
text_CHS:
讯号传入广播船，对方暂停了盖台，
但片刻后便识破红楼的伪装。
护卫的矿联巡逻船逼近，
威吓以重罪起诉。
红楼拼了命才逃离。

segments: The signal was picked up by the broadcasting vessel and the attempted jam was stopped in its tracks. They saw through Red Chamber's disguise and the United Mining patrol ship responsible for protection closed in on Red Chamber, threatening us with prosecution for serious crimes.
We escaped... But only barely.

讯号传入广播船，对方暂停了盖台，
但片刻后便识破红楼的伪装。
护卫的矿联巡逻船逼近，
威吓以重罪起诉。
红楼拼了命才逃离。

text_EN: The interference failed, and the guard ship attacked us after figuring we were pirates. Lucky for us, their primary job was ensuring the safety of the freighters. After we put some distance between them, they eventually stopped.
text_CHS:
干扰失败，警备船认定我们是海盗展开攻击。
幸好他们还是以保护运输队为优先任务，
驱离一段距离后，便停止追击。

segments: The interference failed, and the guard ship attacked us after figuring we were pirates. Lucky for us, their primary job was ensuring the safety of the freighters. After we put some distance between them, they eventually stopped.

干扰失败，警备船认定我们是海盗展开攻击。
幸好他们还是以保护运输队为优先任务，
驱离一段距离后，便停止追击。

text_EN: While they weren't able to board the ship, during the chase, the mother ship fired off a few rounds that pierced several holes in Red Chamber's armor.
text_CHS:
尽管对方没有登陆红楼，但在追逐时，
对方母船发出的一轮炮火，
将我们装甲打穿了数个凹洞。

segments: While they weren't able to board the ship, during the chase, the mother ship fired off a few rounds that pierced several holes in Red Chamber's armor.

尽管对方没有登陆红楼，但在追逐时，
对方母船发出的一轮炮火，
将我们装甲打穿了数个凹洞。

option_title_EN: Run like we always do!
option_title_CHS: 跟之前一样加速逃离！

text_EN:
"There's no such planet here! You liar!"

The robot named Emeth disappeared into the depths of the space station and we never saw him again.
text_CHS:
「...这里没有这个星球的名字，你骗人！」

机器人艾姆说着，转头回到空间站深处，我再也没有看到他了。

segments:
"There's no such planet here! You liar!"

The robot named Emeth disappeared into the depths of the space station and we never saw him again.

「...这里没有这个星球的名字，你骗人！」

机器人艾姆说着，转头回到空间站深处，我再也没有看到他了。

option_title_EN: Um... Mount Immanis Malefica?
option_title_CHS: 是...大巫山？

text_EN: As soon as we finished speaking a hail of gunfire rained down on us, and it took all of Remi's skills to get us out of there.
text_CHS: 我们通话才说完，对方火网突然整片撒了过来，菈米亚费尽心力，才成功脱出交战的空域。

segments: As soon as we finished speaking a hail of gunfire rained down on us, and it took all of Remi's skills to get us out of there.
我们通话才说完，对方火网突然整片撒了过来，菈米亚费尽心力，才成功脱出交战的空域。

option_title_EN: That sounds risky. Tell them we can do a video interview.
option_title_CHS: 登船太危险，告知对方能视讯采访

text_EN: To this day, I still pray that they made it out.
text_CHS: 希望他们能度过难关，至今我依然祈求。

segments: To this day, I still pray that they made it out.
希望他们能度过难关，至今我依然祈求。

option_title_EN: It's truly terrible, but we simply can't help them.
option_title_CHS: 虽然很遗憾，但我们帮不上忙

text_EN:
We were getting bombarded with ads, but Eda forbid Remi from hacking into their computer.

Remi listened, but she sat there complaining for quite some time before settling down.
text_CHS:
我们屏蔽了对方的广告讯号，艾妲严格禁止菈米亚黑进对方计算机的提案。
菈米亚照做了，但还是在旁边抱怨了好一会才停。

segments:
We were getting bombarded with ads, but Eda forbid Remi from hacking into their computer.

Remi listened, but she sat there complaining for quite some time before settling down.

我们屏蔽了对方的广告讯号，艾妲严格禁止菈米亚黑进对方计算机的提案。
菈米亚照做了，但还是在旁边抱怨了好一会才停。

option_title_EN: Remi, enough with the pranks.
option_title_CHS: 够了，别老是恶作剧

text_EN:
"May your fortunes shine upon us, and cast away the darkness." After they boarded the ship and described the countless goods on hand, we picked out a valuable Myrian antique.

It wasn't until they left that we found some suspicious cracks on it...
text_CHS:
「愿您出手如光，远离黑暗」
他们上船后跟我们介绍了无数文物，
我们挑了一份万道珍奇的古董。

直到对方离开后，
却发现古董有些微妙的破损...

segments:
"May your fortunes shine upon us, and cast away the darkness."

After they boarded the ship and described the countless goods on hand, we picked out a valuable Myrian antique.
It wasn't until they left that we found some suspicious cracks on it...

「愿您出手如光，远离黑暗」
他们上船后跟我们介绍了无数文物，
我们挑了一份万道珍奇的古董。

直到对方离开后，
却发现古董有些微妙的破损...

option_title_EN: It won't hurt to make a trade.
option_title_CHS: 做个交易无仿

text_EN:
"Shouldn't be flying one of their vessels."

We tried to be friendly, but they opened fire right after sending us this message.
text_CHS:
「怪你们开的是矿联的船吧。」

我们试着表达友善的信息，
对方却撂下这句话展开攻击。

segments:
"Shouldn't be flying one of their vessels."

We tried to be friendly, but they opened fire right after sending us this message.

「怪你们开的是矿联的船吧。」

我们试着表达友善的信息，
对方却撂下这句话展开攻击。

option_title_EN: Tell them Red Chamber is a retired vessel with no relation to United Mining.
option_title_CHS: 跟他表明我们只是退役的军用船，跟矿业联合无关

text_EN: As Remi complained, we dismantled a few armor plates and handed them to the other vessel. I often wondered if Eda trusted Remi more, would we have argued any less?
text_CHS:
在菈米亚的抱怨中，
我们拆卸了船上的部分装甲组件交给对方，
我常在想，如果艾妲当时信任菈米亚多点，
我跟菈米亚会不会少点冲突。

segments: As Remi complained, we dismantled a few armor plates and handed them to the other vessel. I often wondered if Eda trusted Remi more, would we have argued any less?

在菈米亚的抱怨中，
我们拆卸了船上的部分装甲组件交给对方，
我常在想，如果艾妲当时信任菈米亚多点，
我跟菈米亚会不会少点冲突。

option_title_EN: I think Jun has the right idea. It'll be safer to just give them some armor.
option_title_CHS: 听李莫的，缴纳装甲比较安全

text_EN: Eda was always focused on her goal, and never wasted time on things that didn't help her reach it. At least that's what I thought at the time.
text_CHS:
艾妲始终明确知道重点是什么，
坚定着自己的方向，
至少那时我以为如此。

segments: Eda was always focused on her goal, and never wasted time on things that didn't help her reach it. At least that's what I thought at the time.

艾妲始终明确知道重点是什么，
坚定着自己的方向，
至少那时我以为如此。

option_title_EN: It just looks like a drifting freight container. No need to waste time on it.
option_title_CHS: 看影像只是漂流的货柜，不用特别花时间

text_EN: Eda acted like she didn't know what the woman was talking about. Boy, she did not like United Mining.
text_CHS: 艾妲当作没有这回事离开，她不喜欢矿业联合。

segments: Eda acted like she didn't know what the woman was talking about. Boy, she did not like United Mining.
艾妲当作没有这回事离开，她不喜欢矿业联合。

option_title_EN: Sorry, I have no idea what you're talking about.
option_title_CHS: 抱歉，我不清楚你们在说什么

text_EN: We tried our best, but it was difficult to communicate with all the ships in the airspace in such a short period of time, especially since some ships didn't even turn on their communication channels. In the end, we just silently drifted away from the chaos.
text_CHS: 尽管我们很努力，但要快速沟通全空域中的交通船只并不容易，有些频道甚至没有开启，最后在一片混乱中，我们只得默默离开。

segments: We tried our best, but it was difficult to communicate with all the ships in the airspace in such a short period of time, especially since some ships didn't even turn on their communication channels. In the end, we just silently drifted away from the chaos.
尽管我们很努力，但要快速沟通全空域中的交通船只并不容易，有些频道甚至没有开启，最后在一片混乱中，我们只得默默离开。

text_EN: Eda didn't think Remi would be able to convince them, so we charged through, leaving Remi a bit hurt. Even though we managed to escape, both the ship and their relationship were slightly damaged.
text_CHS:
菈米亚那时没被艾妲信任，
渐渐有了芥蒂，虽然最后逃走，
但不论装甲还是心里，都多有损伤。

segments: Eda didn't think Remi would be able to convince them, so we charged through, leaving Remi a bit hurt. Even though we managed to escape, both the ship and their relationship were slightly damaged.

菈米亚那时没被艾妲信任，
渐渐有了芥蒂，虽然最后逃走，
但不论装甲还是心里，都多有损伤。

option_title_EN: Just charge through... If the modified signal doesn't work, it'll be a disaster.
option_title_CHS: 冲过去吧...伪造失败可不得了

text_EN: When the guard ship saw that we were not only disobeying, but also attempting to speed off, they fired their rail cannon. It scorched Red Chamber's armor, and all I remember is a flash of white light.
text_CHS: 警备船看我们不听劝，反而加速前进，磁轨炮烧过红楼的装甲，我只记得一片白色的光芒...

segments: When the guard ship saw that we were not only disobeying, but also attempting to speed off, they fired their rail cannon. It scorched Red Chamber's armor, and all I remember is a flash of white light.
警备船看我们不听劝，反而加速前进，磁轨炮烧过红楼的装甲，我只记得一片白色的光芒...

option_title_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
option_title_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！

text_EN:
The modified signal failed. Their electronic warfare defenses discovered where the interference was coming from, and they caught up to Red Chamber.

Even though we managed to escape, we paid a heavy price.
text_CHS:
红楼的讯号伪造不成，对方船队的反电子战专家发现了干扰来源，随即转而追捕红楼。
尽管成功逃脱，最后却付出惨痛代价...

segments:
The modified signal failed. Their electronic warfare defenses discovered where the interference was coming from, and they caught up to Red Chamber.

Even though we managed to escape, we paid a heavy price.

红楼的讯号伪造不成，对方船队的反电子战专家发现了干扰来源，随即转而追捕红楼。
尽管成功逃脱，最后却付出惨痛代价...

text_EN:
Our journey was put on hold as the inspection crew turned Red Chamber upside down. The captain then wrote us an invoice for "Unspecified Patrol Squad Services".

I still remember how hard it was for Eda to hide her fury.
text_CHS:
红楼的航程被耽搁，船舱搜查队被翻得乱七八糟。
对方开了一张收据，
要求为「巡逻队额外出勤服务」付钱。

我还记得艾妲隐忍着愤怒的样子

segments:

I still remember how hard it was for Eda to hide her fury.

要求为「巡逻队额外出勤服务」付钱。

我还记得艾妲隐忍着愤怒的样子

option_title_EN: Let them stop and inspect the ship.
option_title_CHS: 让对方停船抽检

text_EN: I didn't think Eda would be able to handle it that well. Later, I found out that Unity News was state media backed by United Mining. If you got into trouble with them, it basically meant your days of flying around the Peaks were over.
text_CHS:
我没想到艾妲忍得住这口气，直到后来知道，
原来特许成立的79统合新闻台后台强硬，
和他们起冲突后，未来就不用在群山航行了。

segments: I didn't think Eda would be able to handle it that well. Later, I found out that Unity News was state media backed by United Mining. If you got into trouble with them, it basically meant your days of flying around the Peaks were over.

我没想到艾妲忍得住这口气，直到后来知道，
原来特许成立的79统合新闻台后台强硬，
和他们起冲突后，未来就不用在群山航行了。

option_title_EN: Then leave the airspace immediately.
option_title_CHS: 那就立刻离开空域

text_EN: Red Chamber wasn't able to send the message directly to the association. We ended up going through some illegal channels to send it as an encrypted message.
text_CHS: 红楼没能直接联络上协会，最后只能透过一些非法通讯商，将加密的讯号辗转传到协会手中。

segments: Red Chamber wasn't able to send the message directly to the association. We ended up going through some illegal channels to send it as an encrypted message.
红楼没能直接联络上协会，最后只能透过一些非法通讯商，将加密的讯号辗转传到协会手中。

text_EN:
"Hmm... That'll do..."

They left right after they got the money.

Eda did not appreciate United Mining's crude way of doing things, but she didn't want to stir things up. I thought it was a bit dishonorable, but she had no choice.
text_CHS:
「民间船...这样还算得体...」
对方收到款项后离开。

虽然对矿联军的蛮横作风十分不满，
不想惹事的艾妲，做出了我觉得不荣誉，
但不得不的决定。

segments:

「民间船...这样还算得体...」

虽然对矿联军的蛮横作风十分不满，
不想惹事的艾妲，做出了我觉得不荣誉，
但不得不的决定。

option_title_EN: *Sigh*... Just bribe them.
option_title_CHS: ...算了，试着贿络他们...

text_EN:
Everything was going smoothly until I hit 100 standard meters, when my vision suddenly went blurry.

When I came to my senses, I was already in the medical tent. Eda sat by my side, visibly worried, and said I had passed out because my blood pressure was too low. Remi just kept mumbling about what a terrible job I'd done.
text_CHS:
印象里非常顺利，但当我深入地下100标准尺时，却视线突然一阵模糊。

起身时已经在医护室里面， 艾妲说我好像血压过低昏厥过去， 担心地守在我身旁， 只记得菈米亚小小啐了一声。

segments: Everything was going smoothly until I hit 100 standard meters, when my vision suddenly went blurry.

When I came to my senses, I was already in the medical tent. Eda sat by my side, visibly worried, and said I had passed out because my blood pressure was too low. Remi just kept mumbling about what a terrible job I'd done.
印象里非常顺利，但当我深入地下100标准尺时，却视线突然一阵模糊。

起身时已经在医护室里面，
艾妲说我好像血压过低昏厥过去，
担心地守在我身旁，
只记得菈米亚小小啐了一声。

text_EN:
Once I got to 150 standard meters, I heard a booming starsong. I was sure that I was going to make it, but my consciousness started fading out.

When I returned to the surface, I could hear the roar of the crowd. My memory is a bit fuzzy, but I ended up getting second place all-time for the deepest run. Even Remi smiled.
text_CHS:
记得深入地下150标准尺时，我听见巨大的龙鸣声，我以为我可以，意识却开始模糊。

终于回到地面时，听到了剧烈的欢呼声。 那天的记忆有点遥远， 但我被列在纪录中的第二名... 连菈米亚都难得的笑了出来。

segments: Once I got to 150 standard meters, I heard a booming starsong. I was sure that I was going to make it, but my consciousness started fading out.
When I returned to the surface, I could hear the roar of the crowd. My memory is a bit fuzzy, but I ended up getting second place all-time for the deepest run. Even Remi smiled.
记得深入地下150标准尺时，我听见巨大的龙鸣声，我以为我可以，意识却开始模糊。

终于回到地面时，听到了剧烈的欢呼声。
那天的记忆有点遥远，
但我被列在纪录中的第二名...
连菈米亚都难得的笑了出来。

option_title_EN: (I swear upon my honor that I'll beat that record!)
option_title_CHS: （赌上探勘人尊严，超越纪录给你看！）

text_EN: The woman kept asking us if we wanted to buy a poster of the "Nasty Dirtbag". We got fed up with her and just left.
text_CHS:
挑衅的家伙一直问我们要不要购买「混乱土鬼」的海报。
我们不耐的离开斗技场。

segments: The woman kept asking us if we wanted to buy a poster of the "Nasty Dirtbag". We got fed up with her and just left.

挑衅的家伙一直问我们要不要购买「混乱土鬼」的海报。
我们不耐的离开斗技场。

option_title_EN: Sorry. The greatest champions compete with themselves.
option_title_CHS: 失礼了，但只有自己能与自己竞争

text_EN:
The communication module on our vessel instantly sent the signal throughout the belt. To this day, I'll never forget how they started the show:

"Hidden in the shadows of the Peaks, we shall rise again." It was the Bones Brigade's motto. I suppose it's no surprise that this was also the space shanty the Ring Liberation Front used as a cry for revolution.
text_CHS:
透过龙脉探测船的通讯阀， 讯号转眼送往全小行星带， 至今我都还记得节目的内容开头：

「藏于群山的黑暗之心，我们必将奋起。」 那是白帮的口号， 原来是星环自由战线的起义船歌...

segments: The communication module on our vessel instantly sent the signal throughout the belt. To this day, I'll never forget how they started the show:

"Hidden in the shadows of the Peaks, we shall rise again."

透过龙脉探测船的通讯阀，
讯号转眼送往全小行星带，
至今我都还记得节目的内容开头：

「藏于群山的黑暗之心，我们必将奋起。」

那是白帮的口号，
原来是星环自由战线的起义船歌...

option_title_EN: Sure, let's help them out.
option_title_CHS: 就帮帮他们吧

text_EN: Thinking back on it, Eda really was an exceptional captain. No matter what decision had to be made, she always stayed calm. To this day, I'm still learning from her.
text_CHS:
回想起艾妲作为船长，
总是能冷静地做出不少决定，
是我该学习的地方。

segments: Thinking back on it, Eda really was an exceptional captain. No matter what decision had to be made, she always stayed calm. To this day, I'm still learning from her.

回想起艾妲作为船长，
总是能冷静地做出不少决定，
是我该学习的地方。

option_title_EN: There's a bounty out on us. We can't risk broadcasting a signal for someone.
option_title_CHS: 我们四处被悬赏，不可能帮人家广播

text_EN: I don't like to think about my experience acting. Still, I was happy to help Eda.
text_CHS:
我不太想回忆，
但当初能帮上艾妲的忙，还是蛮好的。

segments: I don't like to think about my experience acting. Still, I was happy to help Eda.

我不太想回忆，
但当初能帮上艾妲的忙，还是蛮好的。

option_title_EN: Have Jun do it. It's not like they'll show the face of an extra.
option_title_CHS: 这请李莫帮忙演出吧，临演也不会拍到脸

text_EN:
As soon as Eda saw the script, she walked away without saying a word, leaving the set in awkward silence.

Apparently, it was about an evil witch, and how the people managed to drive her from the Peaks.
text_CHS:
记得节目的台词才一读，艾妲就不发一语的离去，弄得全场一片尴尬。

那原来是描述邪恶的女巫，
如何被群山人民赶出的故事。

segments:
As soon as Eda saw the script, she walked away without saying a word, leaving the set in awkward silence.

Apparently, it was about an evil witch, and how the people managed to drive her from the Peaks.

记得节目的台词才一读，艾妲就不发一语的离去，弄得全场一片尴尬。

那原来是描述邪恶的女巫，
如何被群山人民赶出的故事。

option_title_EN: If it's about witches... I guess I could help.
option_title_CHS: 既然是女巫有关的剧场，就帮个忙吧

text_EN:
"Just don't go dying on me, kids," the man grunted. 

When we first set out, given how young the crew was, most people didn't think much of us.
text_CHS:
「别死了，小鬼们。」

对方轻哼了一声，我们早期冒险时，由于队伍太年轻，很多人没把我们当回事。

segments:

「别死了，小鬼们。」

option_title_EN: The Red Chamber crew will take care of it.
option_title_CHS: 交给我们红楼商船队吧

text_EN:
"Yeah, yeah. Whatever," the man grunted. 

When we first set out, given how young the crew was, most people didn't think much of us.
text_CHS:
「随便你」

对方轻哼了一声，我们早期冒险时，由于队伍太年轻，很多人没把我们当回事。

segments:
"Yeah, yeah. Whatever," the man grunted.

「随便你」

对方轻哼了一声，我们早期冒险时，由于队伍太年轻，很多人没把我们当回事。

option_title_EN: We shouldn't be wasting any time with stuff like this.
option_title_CHS: 别浪费时间在其他地方了

text_EN:
Even though we didn't lose a lot, I still felt guilty. Gambling was not for me.

Eda said, "Well, at least you had some fun." I didn't know what to make of that.
text_CHS:
虽然金额不多，但输了还是让我有点愧疚，
果然不能碰赌博这种事。

艾妲跟我说，至少你买到当下的快乐，我不懂。

segments:
Even though we didn't lose a lot, I still felt guilty. Gambling was not for me.

Eda said, "Well, at least you had some fun." I didn't know what to make of that.

虽然金额不多，但输了还是让我有点愧疚，
果然不能碰赌博这种事。

艾妲跟我说，至少你买到当下的快乐，我不懂。

option_title_EN: We'll make a tiny bet. And I'll pay for it, don't worry about it...
option_title_CHS: 小赌就好...而且这种事我自己出

text_EN:
Remi walked out after I refused, clearly upset, like I had ruined her fun. I tried to tell her that gambling is dishonorable, and that it's not worth it.

After that, she didn't talk with me for quite some time.
text_CHS:
我拒绝后，菈米亚悻悻然离去，
像是打坏了她的乐趣，我趁机试着跟她说：

「赌博是没荣誉的事，不需在意。」

结果她好阵子没跟我说话。

segments:

option_title_EN: East Oceaners don't gamble. Thanks anyway.
option_title_CHS: 瀛海人不做这种事，抱歉

text_EN:
Throughout the performance, I could tell Remi was a bit annoyed. But Eda was spellbound, and would occasionally wipe tears from her eyes.

I forget if I held her hand... I hope I did.
text_CHS:
尽管观赏过程菈米亚觉得小不耐，
但印象中艾妲却看得出神，不时拭泪。

我不记得我有没有握住她的手，我希望那时我有。

segments:
Throughout the performance, I could tell Remi was a bit annoyed. But Eda was spellbound, and would occasionally wipe tears from her eyes.

I forget if I held her hand... I hope I did.

尽管观赏过程菈米亚觉得小不耐，
但印象中艾妲却看得出神，不时拭泪。

我不记得我有没有握住她的手，我希望那时我有。

option_title_EN: Let's all go see it together!
option_title_CHS: 大家一起看吧！

text_EN: Melody of Starsong was such a moving story. I really regret not being able to see the end with Eda.
text_CHS: 龙脉长歌是一出感人的神话，最终部没能跟艾妲一起观赏，至今我依然很遗憾。

segments: Melody of Starsong was such a moving story. I really regret not being able to see the end with Eda.
龙脉长歌是一出感人的神话，最终部没能跟艾妲一起观赏，至今我依然很遗憾。

option_title_EN: Maybe I should be spending this time looking for my master...
option_title_CHS: 把时间拿去寻找师父吧...

text_EN:
That night, Eda's voice was broadcast across the Peaks. Even after many years, there were throngs of listeners who still remembered the performance.

Some people even asked if she would like to work for the station. She just said, "I sing for my own soul, not some distant star."
text_CHS:
记得那天那夜，艾妲的嗓声透过基地台广播到群山行星带内，多年后还有许多人怀念。
当时有人希望她为电台工作，她只回说

「我是为了自己的灵魂而唱，不是远方的太阳。」

segments: That night, Eda's voice was broadcast across the Peaks. Even after many years, there were throngs of listeners who still remembered the performance.
Some people even asked if she would like to work for the station. She just said, "I sing for my own soul, not some distant star."

记得那天那夜，艾妲的嗓声透过基地台广播到群山行星带内，多年后还有许多人怀念。
当时有人希望她为电台工作，她只回说

「我是为了自己的灵魂而唱，不是远方的太阳。」

option_title_EN: Eddie, give it a try! I wanna hear you sing!
option_title_CHS: 姐姐试试看吧，我很想听你的歌声

text_EN: When we left, I could see on Eda's face how upset she was. Her inability to sing whenever she wanted to had always made her feel inferior.
text_CHS: 离开的时候，我记得艾妲的神色多有忧伤，喉咙无法随意的唱，她始终有点自卑。

segments: When we left, I could see on Eda's face how upset she was. Her inability to sing whenever she wanted to had always made her feel inferior.
离开的时候，我记得艾妲的神色多有忧伤，喉咙无法随意的唱，她始终有点自卑。

option_title_EN: (Eddie needs more rest.)
option_title_CHS: （再让姐姐休息一阵子好了）

text_EN:
I don't have any lumen intel, but I can share with you the story of our great sun, Ignis...

"May Ignis shed light upon your good deeds..." The preacher turned the pages of some scripture as he mumbled the ancient myth.
text_CHS:
我没有龙脉的消息，但我能跟你分享我们的太阳，烛龙的故事...

「愿烛龙光照，今日众善奉行...」 记得传道师翻开手中的书本，喃喃说出古老神话。

segments: I don't have any lumen intel, but I can share with you the story of our great sun, Ignis...

"May Ignis shed light upon your good deeds..."

The preacher turned the pages of some scripture as he mumbled the ancient myth.
我没有龙脉的消息，但我能跟你分享我们的太阳，烛龙的故事...

「愿烛龙光照，今日众善奉行...」

记得传道师翻开手中的书本，喃喃说出古老神话。

option_title_EN: Please, tell me!
option_title_CHS: 是的，请告诉我！

text_EN:
The preacher took a few looks at me, as if he had noticed something. Then, all of a sudden, he said:

"...East Oceaner, betrayers of the Peaks. I hope Excidium is with you always."

I'll never forget the chilling words he left me with.
text_CHS:
传道师看了我几眼，仿佛认出了什么，突然说

「...背弃群山的瀛海人，愿黑洞大荒与你同在」

我还记得传道师离去时所说的话语。

I'll never forget the chilling words he left me with.

传道师看了我几眼，仿佛认出了什么，突然说

option_title_EN: (Looks like a preacher... Better not respond.)
option_title_CHS: （感觉是传道师...不要回应好了）

text_EN:
"Hey kid, quit causing trouble."

Right before Remi made her move, the doctor grabbed her. She murmured something and sulked away.
text_CHS:
「头痛，别找麻烦。」

菈米亚正要动手前，医生抓住了她，
她不满的啐了一声。

segments:
"Hey kid, quit causing trouble."

Right before Remi made her move, the doctor grabbed her. She murmured something and sulked away.

「头痛，别找麻烦。」

菈米亚正要动手前，医生抓住了她，
她不满的啐了一声。

option_title_EN: (Yeah, let Remi destroy the wall.)
option_title_CHS: （让菈米亚敲掉整片墙板）

text_EN:
After speaking, Eda disappeared for a period of time. When she got back to the ship, she whispered:

"She's not a killer... she's my master."

Eda may have looked calm on the outside, but I quickly found out that if something upset her, she would get really aggressive.
text_CHS:
艾妲说完这话后消失了一阵子，回船时只轻轻的说

「她不是刽子手，她是我师父。」

这几年来，我发现艾妲表面冷静，
但只要惹到她时，她比谁都冲动。

Eda may have looked calm on the outside, but I quickly found out that if something upset her, she would get really aggressive.

艾妲说完这话后消失了一阵子，回船时只轻轻的说

「她不是刽子手，她是我师父。」

这几年来，我发现艾妲表面冷静，
但只要惹到她时，她比谁都冲动。

option_title_EN: (Hmm... I'll take care of this myself.)
option_title_CHS: （我会自己动手...）

text_EN: The lead witch was the training officer for the Banshee mission. It seems that United Mining spent significant energy training a crew for Banshee. Hearing this made Eda lose all her remaining faith in the Witching Tower.
text_CHS:
为首的女巫是黑龙探索队的训练教官，
矿业联合似乎为了黑龙积极的训练船队。
目睹这些事情，让艾妲对巫塔是彻底死心。

segments: The lead witch was the training officer for the Banshee mission. It seems that United Mining spent significant energy training a crew for Banshee. Hearing this made Eda lose all her remaining faith in the Witching Tower.

矿业联合似乎为了黑龙积极的训练船队。
目睹这些事情，让艾妲对巫塔是彻底死心。

option_title_EN: Witches are still working with them? Let's try to hear what they're saying...
option_title_CHS: 竟然有女巫涉入！靠近一点窃听...

text_EN: Afterward, Eda tried to tell what me what had happened. Apparently, she was too nervous and was unable to record anything but a bunch of static.
text_CHS: 事后我听艾妲分享这段经验，她似乎是太紧张了，录下的音讯只有一片杂音。

segments: Afterward, Eda tried to tell what me what had happened. Apparently, she was too nervous and was unable to record anything but a bunch of static.
事后我听艾妲分享这段经验，她似乎是太紧张了，录下的音讯只有一片杂音。

text_EN:
We left in a hurry. Eda said she was afraid of getting Red Chamber involved.

Sometimes I wished she thought more about herself.
text_CHS:
艾妲匆忙地离开，
她说她当时很怕牵连红楼，
但我希望她能为自己多想一点。

艾妲匆忙地离开，

但我希望她能为自己多想一点。

option_title_EN: This is going to be more trouble than it's worth. Let's get out of here.
option_title_CHS: 感觉有什么麻烦事，早点离开

text_EN:
I had a few questions when we were organizing the information about the Lumen Mining Act, and each time Remi would shout in my face.

Most of our time was spent arguing. Eda got fed up with us and politely told them we were unable to help.
text_CHS:
记得整理到指定法时我多少提出疑问，结果一开口就被菈米亚骂回去。

最后吵架的时间似乎占据了工作时间，艾妲在受不了的情况，只好终止这次协作。

segments:

最后吵架的时间似乎占据了工作时间，艾妲在受不了的情况，只好终止这次协作。

option_title_EN: (There's way too much data here. I'm going to need both of them to help.)
option_title_CHS: （数据太多了，请李莫菈米亚都来帮忙...）

text_EN:
"Oh, looks like Remi's too busy to help. We should be able to handle it, right?"

I still remember the look on Eda's face when she said that. I was at the Daily Lumen all day, and they were able to make the deadline for their Mining Act Amendment Edition. They even sent me a little gift.
text_CHS:
「我是怕菈米亚太忙，才只找你帮忙喔」

我还记得艾妲的表情，当时我在龙脉日报待了一天，结束后，龙脉日报赶上了修正法特刊发行的日期，还一并给了我...

option_title_EN: (Jun and I will take care of this...)
option_title_CHS: （...我跟李莫两人一起就好）

text_EN:
The conference room was dark, with a bluish light. United Mining's scholars were analyzing the structure of asteroids and various methods of extraction.

"Nothing on Banshee..." Eda was a bit frustrated when we left. "But at least we now know how to suck lumen dry when we come across some."
text_CHS:
那是个黑暗发着蓝光的大会议室，矿业联合的学者分析着小行星的构造，并将挖掘方式分门别类

「没有黑龙的任何情报...」艾妲离开后略有失落。 「倒是知道遇到龙脉，要怎么干净的把它榨干」

「没有黑龙的任何情报...」艾妲离开后略有失落。 「倒是知道遇到龙脉，要怎么干净的把它榨干」

option_title_EN: Let's see what this is all about.
option_title_CHS: 参加研讨会吧

text_EN:
The scholar's face stopped cold when he heard the word "Banshee".

"That mission's top secret. You're new, aren't you? Well, think before you speak."

The doors of the conference hall closed abruptly, along with any hope of learning more about Banshee.
text_CHS:
艾妲突然冒出的话语让对方瞬间变了脸色。

「那个任务是一级机密，新来的吗，别乱说话。」

研讨会的门马上关闭，我们的线索也中断了。

option_title_EN: Ask if Banshee will be discussed at the conference.
option_title_CHS: 询问研讨会有没有黑龙情报

text_EN:
"Let's come back some other time." Eda was explaining how the cave operated when the loudspeaker sounded out and she was called away. I felt a little bit lonely, but back then I didn't understand why.

Through their rituals, Eda and the witches were able to move the spirits in peace. The people there were extremely grateful to the witches for their help.
text_CHS:
「下次再一起逛吧。」 记得艾妲解释龙脉运作到一半，突然响起的广播就将她唤走，当时我有点小落寞，不懂是什么心情。

之后透过女巫的仪式，艾妲成功将万道的神明移灵，对方也对女巫报以深深的感谢。

option_title_EN: Alright, but you'll need to help me bring Eddie over.
option_title_CHS: 好，你要负责帮我把姐姐带回来

text_EN: Eda brought me to see a Myrian shrine without letting Remi know. When we got back to the ship, Remi exploded on Eda for leaving her alone. I felt pretty guilty about that.
text_CHS: 那天艾妲在菈米亚不知情时，主动带我去看万道的神坛，但当我俩回到船上时，被留下的菈米亚发了很大的脾气。让我也有点内疚。

option_title_EN: Tsk... What's that got to do with me?
option_title_CHS: 啐、跟我有什么关系

text_EN: The synthescepters made by Luma Caverna were different from those produced in East Ocean. It took a bit more time to tune them, but the results were good.
text_CHS: 龙洞化工出产的仿声器跟瀛海不同，调整声音时多花了点时间，但结果还算满意。

segments: The synthescepters made by Luma Caverna were different from those produced in East Ocean. It took a bit more time to tune them, but the results were good.
龙洞化工出产的仿声器跟瀛海不同，调整声音时多花了点时间，但结果还算满意。

option_title_EN: (Let Jun give it a shot...)
option_title_CHS: （让李莫试试看吧...）

text_EN: From the very start, I had no idea what I was doing. I even managed to cause the vats filled with lumenide to explode, and seriously damaged the laboratory.
text_CHS: 我始终掌握不到仿声器的使用要领。在测试的过程中，还导致实验室的汜水储存槽震荡爆炸。

segments: From the very start, I had no idea what I was doing. I even managed to cause the vats filled with lumenide to explode, and seriously damaged the laboratory.
我始终掌握不到仿声器的使用要领。在测试的过程中，还导致实验室的汜水储存槽震荡爆炸。

text_EN: Even though it was true that our mission was to get to Banshee and that we shouldn't have been taking side missions, I was still a bit hurt that Eda didn't believe in me.
text_CHS: 尽管当时首要目标是寻找黑龙，不该有外务，但没被艾妲信任，我还是有点伤心

segments: Even though it was true that our mission was to get to Banshee and that we shouldn't have been taking side missions, I was still a bit hurt that Eda didn't believe in me.
尽管当时首要目标是寻找黑龙，不该有外务，但没被艾妲信任，我还是有点伤心

option_title_EN: Sorry, we've got somewhere to go.
option_title_CHS: 抱歉，我们还在赶路

text_EN:
Eda told Remi to broadcast several blast signals that would cause them to misjudge the firepower of the blast.

The mine exploded and lumium blasts were going off left and right. Even though no one got hurt, I was surprised to see that side of Eda. She wasn't in a good place at the time.
text_CHS:
艾妲请菈米亚发送了多次爆破讯号，
让对方错估了引爆的火力，
瞬间矿场陷入汜气的火海，虽然无人伤亡，
却让我看到艾妲的另一面。

她那阵子心情真的很糟。

option_title_EN: (You wanna blast stuff...? Sounds fun.)
option_title_CHS: （炸飞...好啊，我蛮想试试看...）

text_EN:
"I don't know who you're talking about, I'm just a damn guard. If you're not here to help, get the hell out of here. And put on your uniforms next time!"

After yelling in our faces, he turned around and left.
text_CHS:
「哪位高官我不认识，
没有要支援就快走，下次记得要穿制服。 」

对方说完，就离开了我们视线

option_title_EN: Was Red Grant ever sent here to perform inspections?
option_title_CHS: 红・葛兰特有来视察过这里吗？

text_EN:
CRASH!!!—— Remi rushed into the path of the guard ship before they opened fire, and was able to delay the attack. Our decision was not without cost, as our ship suffered heavy damage.

Afterward, Arrigo was true to her word and gave us the lumen intel she promised.
text_CHS:
一阵激烈的撞击——菈米亚赶在警备船开火前驶过航道，成功延误了对方的追击，我们也因此付出惨痛代价，受到严重损伤。

事后艾琳达依照约定，将答应的龙脉情报赠与我们。

事后艾琳达依照约定，将答应的龙脉情报赠与我们。

option_title_EN: Pull yourself together! Block United Mining to let them go through.
option_title_CHS: 振作！故意阻挡矿业联合的航道，让他们冲过

text_EN: United Mining rejected our request for communication. Before long, a blaze of fire flashed before the transport station. Everyone knew a ship had been shot down, and we sat in silence. Maybe there was something I could have done, but it was already too late.
text_CHS:
矿业联合拒绝回答我们的三方通信，
没多久，传送港前一阵火光，
所有人都知道有船被击落，
船队的众人为此沉默了一阵，
或许我能做一点什么，但都太迟了。

option_title_EN: Use our affiliation with the association to try and talk with United Mining.
option_title_CHS: 用龙脉协会的关系与矿联沟通

text_EN:
"Sir, this is a simple misunderstanding." "Although these are lumen plants, once the stems are separated from the plant, they are classified as ordinary medicine."

After successfully persuading customs to let them go, Eda explained that she learned all the loopholes from her time travelling the trade routes with her master.

The woman in charge thanked Eda, and seemed to recognize her. "We're all looking for her. Your master must still be alive," she said, and took something out of her pocket.
text_CHS:
「你搞错了，办事员。」 「尽管是龙脉花卉，但这些枝干如果拆开，认列只是一般的药草。」

艾妲成功的解释，让海关最后放行了对方。她说当年跟师父进出贸易时，把能钻的漏洞都看了一遍。

领头的女子感谢艾妲，却好像认出什么： 「我们都在找她，你师父一定还活着...」 她从口袋中拿出...

option_title_EN: There's always a way to help.
option_title_CHS: 总有些我能做的事

text_EN: Now looking back on it, I wish I could have done more in situations like these.
text_CHS: 如果有能力帮忙的话，我希望当年的我们能多做一些什么。

segments: Now looking back on it, I wish I could have done more in situations like these.
如果有能力帮忙的话，我希望当年的我们能多做一些什么。

option_title_EN: ...There's nothing I can do to help.
option_title_CHS: ...就凭我能做什么...

text_EN: If it was United Mining, Eda didn't want to have anything to do with them.
text_CHS: 当时只要遇到矿业联合，艾妲通常是不予理会。

segments: If it was United Mining, Eda didn't want to have anything to do with them.
当时只要遇到矿业联合，艾妲通常是不予理会。

option_title_EN: Enough! I'm not hanging around some place that humiliates witches like this!
option_title_CHS: 够了，别停留在这种羞辱女巫的地方

text_EN:
"Pipeline 3 is broken about six meters from here, near the atrium. Hurry up and fix it."

Eda quickly pointed out the problem. The woman thought she had run into one of her superiors, but Eda was not at all pleased.
text_CHS:
「大概距离这边六标准尺，天井附近有三处破裂，你们快去就是。」

艾妲很快地指出问题，对方还以为遇到哪位女巫高管，但我没从艾妲的表情感受到喜悦。

option_title_EN: I should still help them. Maybe I could get some good intel.
option_title_CHS: ...勉强帮帮他们，或许能打听到一些消息

text_EN:
Even though the atmosphere on the ship was tense, Remi wasn't the least bit careless with her work. When the news channel broadcast the signal, it cut out for several seconds, causing a drop in views and public support.

The president even compensated us for our troubles.
text_CHS:
尽管那时船只的气氛不好，
但菈米亚做起事来却没有马虎，
新闻台播送时被中断了将近十几秒，
导致收视率跟公信力都下降不少。

会长为了感谢我们，给了我们点酬劳。

option_title_EN: Of course. Anything I can do to mess with United Mining.

text_EN: Eda politely refused the president's request and left in a hurry. I heard that after the interview was broadcast, the Lumen Mining Act was endorsed by the association, making it easier to push through. Most runners, however, denounced it.

艾妲婉拒了会长的请求，
迅速地离开现场。
听说后来节目播出，
由于龙脉指定法经过协会的背书，
让推动变得顺利许多...
为许多探勘人诟病。

option_title_EN: There's no need to take it that far.
option_title_CHS: 不需要做到那种地步

text_EN:
Remi was one of the best hackers in the Peaks, but United Mining's signal wasn't easy to jam. Lucky for us, they thought it was just an accident, otherwise things would have turned out much worse.

We ended up having to pay a small fine for sending out irregular signals.
text_CHS:
虽然菈米亚是群山一流的黑客，
但矿联讯号也不是随便能干扰的，
幸好他们只把这当成民间意外，
否则后果不堪设想。

最后我们被以不正当通讯进行小额罚锾...

但矿联讯号也不是随便能干扰的，
幸好他们只把这当成民间意外，
否则后果不堪设想。

最后我们被以不正当通讯进行小额罚锾...

text_EN:
"I liked everyone at the Witching Tower, even though they may not have liked me."
"But it's okay... I have my master."

That's what Eda said when she returned. She collected the things she had found, and silently retreated to her room.
text_CHS:
「我喜欢巫塔的大家，虽然大家不喜欢我。」
「但没关系，我有师父就好。」

那天，艾妲一人从巫塔返回后如此说，
接着默默的将她找到的东西，收回自己的房间。

option_title_EN: I spent my childhood here. I should hang around for a while.
option_title_CHS: 童年都在这里度过，多花点时间吧

text_EN:
"I'm never coming back again."

Eda didn't say a word after she returned to the ship, as if she was lost in some distant memory.
text_CHS:
「不会再来了。」

那天艾妲回到红楼不发一语，
仿佛陷入遥远的回忆。

option_title_EN: Let's just take a quick look...
option_title_CHS: 简单看看就好...

text_EN:
"Couldn't find any clues about my master..." Eda said as she returned to the ship. 

She had a registry with her that she said would help find her master, but it seemed more like she was trying to say goodbye to her former self.
text_CHS:
「没有师父的线索呢...」

艾妲回到红楼后这么说，带回一本名册的她，与其说在寻找师父的线索，不如说她在努力跟过去的自己告别。

option_title_EN: Who cares about a fine, I want to climb the Tower one last time.
option_title_CHS: 罚锾无所谓，最后我想爬上塔看看

text_EN:
"It's not worth it, there won't be any clues about my master here..." Eda said as she returned to the ship.

Somehow it felt like she was trying to say goodbye to her former self.
text_CHS:
「这里再找下去，也不会有师父的线索...」

艾妲回到红楼后这么说，我总有种感觉，她在努力跟过去的自己告别。

option_title_EN: It doesn't matter. My master was better than this place anyway.
option_title_CHS: 只是间容不下师父的建筑

text_EN:
I remember him reaching out with his bionic arm to express his thanks to Eda. She said that even though it was cold to the touch, she could still feel the warmth.

"Here, take this." He offered us a book, saying only that it contained the memories of his brothers.
text_CHS:
记得他伸出机械义体的手跟艾妲表示感谢，
艾妲提过那触感冰冷，但却有一股暖意。

「这书给你。」他留下了一本书给红楼，
只说那是兄弟们的回忆

option_title_EN: Let's help him out.
option_title_CHS: 帮帮他们吧

text_EN:
Eda left in silence.
I just hope that any warrior who fights for what they believe in gets the honor they deserve... like Kay.
text_CHS:
艾妲那时默默的离开，
我只希望任何曾经奋斗过的勇士，
最终能得到应有的荣耀，如同大魁。

option_title_EN: We can't be hanging around here. We've got to get to Silk Oasis...

text_EN:
It turned out to be an empty casket.

The followers of Myria believed that those that passed should return to Ignis. Eda said that these types of caskets could often be found in ruins. Most of them were abandoned caskets that had been reported to the authorities after space burials were banned.
text_CHS:
记忆中，是空的棺材。

信仰万道的居民，认为人死后该回归烛龙，
艾妲说这类棺材常会出现在废墟中，
多半是宇宙葬禁止后，被检举抛弃的棺材。

option_title_EN: Try to get its location and see if we can pull it in.
option_title_CHS: 试着定位他，打捞起来看看

text_EN:
After getting out of its way, the object continued on. Remi kept looking into it and found out it was headed for Ignis.

"It's probably a casket for a space burial."

I still remember the look on Eda's face when she said that.
text_CHS:
改变轨道后，不明物体持续它的路线。
菈米亚追查后，发现那是往烛龙投入的物体。

「应该是宇宙葬的棺材。」

我还记得艾妲说时的表情。

text_EN: It took a lot of time reeling it in and opening it, but no matter how things went, scavenging was always a lot easier than excavating. Plus, helping out Red Chamber really took my mind off things.
text_CHS: 花了不少时间，但宇宙中拾荒这种事，跟探勘龙穴比起来还是轻松很多，能为红楼做点什么，也能转移我的心情。

我们默默地离去，那时我还没有发现，
艾妲真正在寻找的东西是什么。

option_title_EN: Listen to Remi. It couldn't hurt for Jun to do some more exploring.
option_title_CHS: 听菈米亚的，请李莫再努力一下

text_EN:
I put a small amount of excavation equipment in their warehouse. The digital contract was sent to me and we all agreed on how much we'd earn...

That was life in the Peaks. And to this day... I still haven't learned.
text_CHS:
他们当时把我缴纳小量探索设备堆到仓库间，
几声吆喝后，探勘队出发，
电子合同送到了我手中，
互相承诺了彼此的抽成金额...

尽管像是他们的日常，但直到今天，
我依然很难体会。

option_title_EN: (Hmm... Maybe I should see how the Peakers do things?)

text_EN: East Ocean runners were born chasing lumen. We must feel the pulse of lumen ourselves to maintain our dignity and honor.
text_CHS:
瀛海探勘人追逐龙脉而生，唯有亲手接触岩壁，
感受龙脉的律动，才是荣誉的瀛海人。

option_title_EN: An Oceaner would never let someone do the running for them!
option_title_CHS: 探勘怎么能交给别人！

text_EN:
I paid no attention to the mockery and quietly walked away.

Kay used to say, "Lumen exists within you. There is no winning and losing."
text_CHS:
当时我没有理会对方的嘲讽，默默离去
大魁说过「龙脉自存于心，没有输赢。」

text_EN:
Ignis No.1 was a dark, massive cave. There were numerous excavation squads deep inside, shuttling among ancient Myrian ruins.

I was barely able to keep up, but I eventually found something.
text_CHS:
大荒是个深邃的巨大龙脉，
里面充斥着不同的探勘小队，
他们深入洞穴，
在小行星内的万道遗迹穿梭...

当时我差点没跟上，记得最后找到的是...

option_title_CHS: （让他们知道...瀛海龙脉同盟的水准）

text_EN:
As soon as I finished speaking, a blue lumen light flashed before my eyes and I passed out. When I came to, the man was nowhere to be found.

"Carry on the will of the belt, and never let United Mining encroach on our homeland." I heard a voice whisper these words, and in my hands was something he had left me.
text_CHS:
说完后，我只记得一片蓝色的汜气光，我晕了过去，待我醒来后，却再也不见对方踪影。

「将小行星带的意志传承下去，永远别让矿联进出我们的故乡。」 一股声音传进我的脑海，我发现我手上竟然是...

option_title_EN: ...That the belt may rise again one day.
option_title_CHS: ...小行星必将奋起

text_EN:
"You better watch your mouth, boy..."

As soon as he spoke, I blacked out. Later I woke up with a splitting headache, and the man was nowhere to be found.
text_CHS:
「年轻人，说错话是很不敬的事...」

话语方落，我意识突然消失，头痛欲裂。
等我醒来，那人却已经不见踪影。

text_EN:
They treated me like one of their own. As they taught me how to cut open chunks of rubble, and as we uncovered their frozen comrades, they spoke of what happened to them during the war. They said that all they wished for was peace in the Peaks and for war to never break out again.

They paid me graciously for the help I provided.
text_CHS:
他们把我当作自己人，
一边引导如何切开瓦砾，
找出过往冻僵的伙伴，
跟我聊着当年与矿业联合作战的种种，
并渴望群山常保和平，永无战争。

结束后作为感谢，他给了我们...

text_EN:
"It should be an honor for you to sacrifice your life for lumen and Eddie." Despite Remi's message, she did a good job guiding me.

With her help, we found the source of the radiation and shut off the power supply. We also stumbled across several trade records from before the war.
text_CHS:
「你就为龙脉跟姐姐捐出命吧，是你的幸运。」

当时菈米亚通信虽这么说，指示却明确清晰。
最后找到了异常辐射来源，在她协助下，
我关闭了来源的机房动力，
还找到了不少战前留下的商贸纪录。

segments:
"It should be an honor for you to sacrifice your life for lumen and Eddie."

Despite Remi's message, she did a good job guiding me.
With her help, we found the source of the radiation and shut off the power supply. We also stumbled across several trade records from before the war.

「你就为龙脉跟姐姐捐出命吧，是你的幸运。」

当时菈米亚通信虽这么说，指示却明确清晰。
最后找到了异常辐射来源，在她协助下，
我关闭了来源的机房动力，
还找到了不少战前留下的商贸纪录。

option_title_EN: Have Remi tell Jun what to do.
option_title_CHS: 请菈米亚协助指示李莫

text_EN: Safety first. I left without completing the exploration, and by Taiyang's mercy, I didn't run into any trouble...
text_CHS:
为了安全起见，我撤离了此地。
太乙垂怜，过程中没有遇到危险...

segments: Safety first. I left without completing the exploration, and by Taiyang's mercy, I didn't run into any trouble...

为了安全起见，我撤离了此地。
太乙垂怜，过程中没有遇到危险...

option_title_EN: It's way too dangerous. Exploration is only worth it if you come out alive.
option_title_CHS: 太过危险了，还是放弃搜索吧

text_EN:
For the sake of uncovering the truth, I stomached my uneasiness and continued onward, following the marks on the wall. 

At the end of the tunnel was a war room that had been completely plundered. I opened a drawer and found a discarded document...
text_CHS: 为了查清真相，我忍着心中不安，顺着痕迹小心前进。坑道终点是当年的战情室，贵重资产已被洗劫一空，抽屉里，我找到一份被随意弃置的文件...

segments:
For the sake of uncovering the truth, I stomached my uneasiness and continued onward, following the marks on the wall. 

At the end of the tunnel was a war room that had been completely plundered. I opened a drawer and found a discarded document...
为了查清真相，我忍着心中不安，顺着痕迹小心前进。坑道终点是当年的战情室，贵重资产已被洗劫一空，抽屉里，我找到一份被随意弃置的文件...

option_title_EN: I need to figure out what happened here. Keep going!
option_title_CHS: 为了了解当年的实情，我必须继续前进

text_EN:
Eda finished up and silently returned to the ship.
There was a bit of sadness in her eyes.
After all, this was her home for several years.
text_CHS:
艾妲结束探索，默默的回到船上，
眼神略有哀伤。
再怎么说，巫塔都是她生活十几年的地方。

segments:

There was a bit of sadness in her eyes.
After all, this was her home for several years.

艾妲结束探索，默默的回到船上，
眼神略有哀伤。
再怎么说，巫塔都是她生活十几年的地方。

option_title_EN: I can't just sit around reminiscing...
option_title_CHS: 别眷恋这种地方了...

text_EN:
"I guess someone came looking for me..." Eda said wryly as she got onboard.

"I have no idea what the lumen was doing... I think it was trying to console me."

She brought back something she found in a pile of ashes...
text_CHS:
「好像有人在找我呢...」回来船后，艾妲苦笑的说

「我实在搞不懂汜在想什么，大概要安慰我吧。」

她从燃烧殆尽的纸堆中，找到了...

她从燃烧殆尽的纸堆中，找到了...

option_title_EN: Try to resonate with the lumen...
option_title_CHS: 试着共鸣看看...

text_EN:
"If she was able to grow up, she'd be about as old as you," she said softly as she looked at Remi over the comms system. Apparently, before the princess passed, she was asked to find the child the princess had with the chairman but was unable to complete the task.

She boarded our ship and left us with her final request. Then she turned, and leaped into the darkness of space.
text_CHS:
「她如果平安长大，也是你这个年纪」

通讯端的她，看着菈米亚缓缓说，原来她受吉普赛公主临终时委托，希望寻找公主与议长的私生女，却无能达成。
事后她登船交付我们最后的请求，接着转身跃入黑暗的宇宙空间。

segments: "If she was able to grow up, she'd be about as old as you," she said softly as she looked at Remi over the comms system. Apparently, before the princess passed, she was asked to find the child the princess had with the chairman but was unable to complete the task.
She boarded our ship and left us with her final request. Then she turned, and leaped into the darkness of space.

「她如果平安长大，也是你这个年纪」

通讯端的她，看着菈米亚缓缓说，原来她受吉普赛公主临终时委托，希望寻找公主与议长的私生女，却无能达成。
事后她登船交付我们最后的请求，接着转身跃入黑暗的宇宙空间。

option_title_EN: Let's help her out.
option_title_CHS: 帮帮他们吧

text_EN: During our years adventuring, we encountered countless people we were unable to help because we had our problems to deal with. To this day, I still regret not being able to do more.
text_CHS: 当年冒险时，总会遇到碍于现状，无法帮助的人群，直到今天，有时我还会后悔。

segments: During our years adventuring, we encountered countless people we were unable to help because we had our problems to deal with. To this day, I still regret not being able to do more.
当年冒险时，总会遇到碍于现状，无法帮助的人群，直到今天，有时我还会后悔。

option_title_EN: We should avoid running into any potential problems.
option_title_CHS: 还是要避免一切可能的意外

text_EN: I stayed inside for so long that Eda thought something had happened to me. In the swirling sea of ruined documents, I discovered the glory of my clan's past.
text_CHS:
最后，我待的时间久得艾妲以为我出了意外，
在被销毁的文件海中，我找到了曾经的荣耀。

segments: I stayed inside for so long that Eda thought something had happened to me. In the swirling sea of ruined documents, I discovered the glory of my clan's past.

最后，我待的时间久得艾妲以为我出了意外，
在被销毁的文件海中，我找到了曾经的荣耀。

option_title_EN: The Lee clan can only move forward by acknowledging past failures.
option_title_CHS: 必须面对错误的历史，鸢家才能往前走

text_EN:
To this day, I still think back on those frozen documents floating through the vacuum of my family's residence, and the East Ocean calligraphy that had come off the wall:

"By Taiy's mercy."
text_CHS:
时至今日，我依然会想起领主室内于真空中飘散，结冻的文件
还有墙壁脱落的瀛海字画
「太乙垂怜」

segments:
To this day, I still think back on those frozen documents floating through the vacuum of my family's residence, and the East Ocean calligraphy that had come off the wall:

"By Taiy's mercy."

时至今日，我依然会想起领主室内于真空中飘散，结冻的文件
还有墙壁脱落的瀛海字画
「太乙垂怜」

option_title_EN: Let the past stay in the past.
option_title_CHS: 就让过去的遗留在过去吧

text_EN:
The captain of the so-called Nomadic Rhythm had detailed knowledge of the environment. Too detailed. It made me think it was probably a trap.

Safety always came first. I snuck away without making a sound. Afterward, at one of the association's branches, I heard they had managed to escape, and they were really upset that someone had just left them there.
text_CHS:
自称「流浪节拍」团长的声音对环境的描述太过详细，令我怀疑又是黑帮的陷阱。
安全起见，我不动声色的离开了现场。
后来在协会分部听说，「流浪节拍」自行脱困了，但对被拒绝救援一事耿耿于怀。

segments:
The captain of the so-called Nomadic Rhythm had detailed knowledge of the environment. Too detailed. It made me think it was probably a trap.

Safety always came first. I snuck away without making a sound. Afterward, at one of the association's branches, I heard they had managed to escape, and they were really upset that someone had just left them there.

自称「流浪节拍」团长的声音对环境的描述太过详细，令我怀疑又是黑帮的陷阱。
安全起见，我不动声色的离开了现场。
后来在协会分部听说，「流浪节拍」自行脱困了，但对被拒绝救援一事耿耿于怀。

option_title_EN: (How do they know where the control panel is? Sounds suspicious.)
option_title_CHS: （...他们怎么知道有控制面板？小心为上）

text_EN:
I followed the captain's orders and was able to clean up the rubble. Eventually, I found the control panel.

After a few bellows, the lumium built up to the point that it could no longer be held back. The large stones blocking the path exploded into a million pieces.

The crew members thanked me repeatedly. Apparently, one was part of the Rumani Clan, and was overly eager to recover some of their relics, which eventually led to the disaster.
text_CHS:
依照「流浪节拍」团长的指示，我用探索机器人清除了碎石推，找到了操控面板。
几声巨响后，高浓度的汜气炸开了通道的巨石。
「流浪节拍」的成员向我道谢，原来其中有人曾属于吉普赛家族，为了寻回遗物，太过心急而遭逢意外。

segments:

After a few bellows, the lumium built up to the point that it could no longer be held back. The large stones blocking the path exploded into a million pieces.

The crew members thanked me repeatedly. Apparently, one was part of the Rumani Clan, and was overly eager to recover some of their relics, which eventually led to the disaster.
