几声巨响后，高浓度的汜气炸开了通道的巨石。
「流浪节拍」的成员向我道谢，原来其中有人曾属于吉普赛家族，为了寻回遗物，太过心急而遭逢意外。

option_title_EN: I'm with the association as well. Don't worry, I'll save you.
option_title_CHS: 同为协会伙伴，我会救你们出来的。

text_EN:
I spent some time analyzing the water and soil quality of the refinery, and we discussed another development plan in detail.

To thank Red Chamber, the crew leader gave us some plants they had uncovered as compensation.
text_CHS:
我花了点时间研究精炼厂的土质跟水质，
重新讨论了开发计划。

为了感谢红楼的协助，领队将一些挖掘到的多余植物送给我们处理。

segments:
I spent some time analyzing the water and soil quality of the refinery, and we discussed another development plan in detail.

To thank Red Chamber, the crew leader gave us some plants they had uncovered as compensation.

我花了点时间研究精炼厂的土质跟水质，
重新讨论了开发计划。

为了感谢红楼的协助，领队将一些挖掘到的多余植物送给我们处理。

option_title_EN: Since Jun can help, let him take care of it.
option_title_CHS: 李莫既然可以帮忙，让他处理吧

text_EN: The leader of the excavation crew knew Red Chamber had its own work to take care of, so after bidding us farewell, he went back to work.
text_CHS: 废墟探勘队的领队理解红楼的难处，和我们简单道别后，便回到自己的挖掘任务中。

segments: The leader of the excavation crew knew Red Chamber had its own work to take care of, so after bidding us farewell, he went back to work.
废墟探勘队的领队理解红楼的难处，和我们简单道别后，便回到自己的挖掘任务中。

option_title_EN: Remi's right. We've got a mission to complete. Let's get out of here.
option_title_CHS: 听菈米亚的，任务在身早点离开吧

text_EN: Operating the exploration robot, I was able to dig out a tunnel that I could squeeze through. Inside, I found a conference room that had collapsed. It felt like some important talks had occurred here. After some searching, the effort proved to be worth it.
text_CHS: 我操控探索设备的机器人，努力在通道中挖出一条可以前进的路线。里面是一个坍方的会议室...感觉曾经在这里谈判过，最后我找到...

segments: Operating the exploration robot, I was able to dig out a tunnel that I could squeeze through. Inside, I found a conference room that had collapsed. It felt like some important talks had occurred here. After some searching, the effort proved to be worth it.
我操控探索设备的机器人，努力在通道中挖出一条可以前进的路线。里面是一个坍方的会议室...感觉曾经在这里谈判过，最后我找到...

option_title_EN: Use the exploration robot to dig out a tunnel.
option_title_CHS: 用探索机器人挖出通道

text_EN: Safety first. I turned around to explore some other passageways. Back then, I was extremely cautious and let a lot of opportunities pass by.
text_CHS:
安全起见，我转身去探索其他通道，
没有再继续前进下去。
当年我因为谨慎，错过了很多探险机会。

segments: Safety first. I turned around to explore some other passageways. Back then, I was extremely cautious and let a lot of opportunities pass by.

安全起见，我转身去探索其他通道，
没有再继续前进下去。
当年我因为谨慎，错过了很多探险机会。

option_title_EN: I shouldn't risk it.
option_title_CHS: 不要冒险进入危险区域吧

text_EN:
After thanking us for cooperating, he handed us a book. "Our story must be told," he said.

When we left, the sound of the cave collapsing could be heard. That's when I knew that he planned on dying there.
text_CHS:
感谢我们的配合，对方将一本手册交给我们，「记得把我们的故事传下去。」
等我离开时，矿场传出一阵崩塌声，
我才知道他打算死在这里。

segments:
After thanking us for cooperating, he handed us a book. "Our story must be told," he said.

When we left, the sound of the cave collapsing could be heard. That's when I knew that he planned on dying there.

感谢我们的配合，对方将一本手册交给我们，「记得把我们的故事传下去。」
等我离开时，矿场传出一阵崩塌声，
我才知道他打算死在这里。

option_title_EN: Do as he says. Put down the equipment and leave.
option_title_CHS: 照他的做，留下设备就走。

text_EN:
As soon as the words came out of my mouth, I blacked out.

When I came to, all my scavenging equipment was gone and the man was nowhere to be seen.
text_CHS:
才刚开口拒绝，下一秒我就失去了意识。
直到我回神后，身边的探勘装备已经被拿走了。
我再也没有见到他。

segments:
As soon as the words came out of my mouth, I blacked out.

When I came to, all my scavenging equipment was gone and the man was nowhere to be seen.

才刚开口拒绝，下一秒我就失去了意识。
直到我回神后，身边的探勘装备已经被拿走了。
我再也没有见到他。

option_title_EN: This is ridiculous. I refuse to accept.
option_title_CHS: 无理的要求，我不会同意的。

text_EN:
I found a conspicuous piece of wreckage near the transport station and waited to be rescued.

I don't know how much time had passed before my consciousness started to fade. Red Chamber eventually arrived, but I barely made it out alive.
text_CHS:
我找到传送港附近一个显眼的太空残骸，将自己固定在上面，等待救援。
不知过了多久，我已经开始意识恍惚时，红楼总算抵达，让我保住一命。

segments:
I found a conspicuous piece of wreckage near the transport station and waited to be rescued.

I don't know how much time had passed before my consciousness started to fade. Red Chamber eventually arrived, but I barely made it out alive.

我找到传送港附近一个显眼的太空残骸，将自己固定在上面，等待救援。
不知过了多久，我已经开始意识恍惚时，红楼总算抵达，让我保住一命。

option_title_EN: (Stay put and wait to be rescued.)
option_title_CHS: （留在原地，等待红楼的救援）

text_EN:
I was about to pass out when I saw a glimmer of light amid the wreckage. I grasped for it...

The light led the way, and I started to hear Eda's voice. When I finally got back to the Red Chamber, I had a disc in my hand that looked like a Myrian relic used for prayer...
text_CHS:
我当时几乎丧失了意识，只记得在残骸堆中看到一个光点，我努力抓着它...

那东西带着我，我从它引领的方向听见艾妲的歌声，终于我回到了红楼，手上多了一个圆盘，那似乎是万道的祈祷用具...

segments: I was about to pass out when I saw a glimmer of light amid the wreckage. I grasped for it...
The light led the way, and I started to hear Eda's voice. When I finally got back to the Red Chamber, I had a disc in my hand that looked like a Myrian relic used for prayer...
我当时几乎丧失了意识，只记得在残骸堆中看到一个光点，我努力抓着它...
那东西带着我，我从它引领的方向听见艾妲的歌声，终于我回到了红楼，手上多了一个圆盘，那似乎是万道的祈祷用具...

option_title_EN: (I can't just sit around and wait. Think of a way to get back to the ship.)
option_title_CHS: （等下去不是办法，自行想办法返航）

text_EN: Once the door opened, whatever electricity was left suddenly turned on. The greenhouse on the unmanned agriculture satellite was teeming with life. Among the several varieties of plants, there were even a few valuable research specimens.
text_CHS: 大门开启后残存的电力突然启动，无人管理的农业卫星，不知不觉让植物蔓延了整个温室，其中不乏珍贵的龙穴植物研究。

segments: Once the door opened, whatever electricity was left suddenly turned on. The greenhouse on the unmanned agriculture satellite was teeming with life. Among the several varieties of plants, there were even a few valuable research specimens.
大门开启后残存的电力突然启动，无人管理的农业卫星，不知不觉让植物蔓延了整个温室，其中不乏珍贵的龙穴植物研究。

option_title_EN: It's fine. Just open it up.
option_title_CHS: 没问题，挖开他们。

text_EN: Eda was always worried about my safety. It didn't matter what it was, she put all the responsibility on herself.
text_CHS: 艾妲总是很担心我会遇到危险，她似乎将事情都当成自己的责任。

segments: Eda was always worried about my safety. It didn't matter what it was, she put all the responsibility on herself.
艾妲总是很担心我会遇到危险，她似乎将事情都当成自己的责任。

option_title_EN: Don't mess with it. A locked door on an agricultural satellite is not normal.
option_title_CHS: 别乱来，农业卫星深锁的大门，不太寻常

text_EN: I disarmed a few traps and luckily didn't set off anything. Still, the lab must have been cleaned out during the war, because there wasn't any advanced equipment to be found.
text_CHS: 突破了机关，非常幸运地没有引爆任何东西。不过实验室似乎在冲突时期就被搬空了，没有找到什么先进仪器。

segments: I disarmed a few traps and luckily didn't set off anything. Still, the lab must have been cleaned out during the war, because there wasn't any advanced equipment to be found.
突破了机关，非常幸运地没有引爆任何东西。不过实验室似乎在冲突时期就被搬空了，没有找到什么先进仪器。

option_title_EN: Let's do this! There must be valuable goods inside.
option_title_CHS: 突破吧，里面应该有不少珍贵的东西。

text_EN: I left without anything of value, but some things were not worth risking.
text_CHS: 当时我离开了现场，有些事情不值得冒险。

segments: I left without anything of value, but some things were not worth risking.
当时我离开了现场，有些事情不值得冒险。

option_title_EN: Koomsung Transport was known for their booby traps. We'd better be careful.
option_title_CHS: 金城集团的诡雷很有名，少碰为妙。

text_EN:
After I took apart the door, I found a cemetery. Ice-blue lumenite surrounded the graves, and the light of lumen lingered around like spirits.

Each tombstone had the same year written on it: 8506. They were for the protestors whose death had triggered the Lumen War.
text_CHS:
拆开大门后是一个墓园。
冰蓝的汜晶石环绕墓碑放置，
漂泊的汜光点宛如灵魂。

每个墓碑上都写着同一个年份：「8506年」，
这些墓碑属于第一次龙脉冲突时，
引发暴动的矿场死者。

segments: After I took apart the door, I found a cemetery. Ice-blue lumenite surrounded the graves, and the light of lumen lingered around like spirits.

Each tombstone had the same year written on it: 8506.
They were for the protestors whose death had triggered the Lumen War.

这些墓碑属于第一次龙脉冲突时，
引发暴动的矿场死者。

option_title_EN: It's hard to say when Red Chamber will need supplies. Best to go check it out.
option_title_CHS: 难保证红楼会有需要的时候，深入看看吧

text_EN: Eda always took the safety of others first. I later realized that was because she was unable to see the value in herself...
text_CHS: 艾妲始终把别人的安危当成第一位，我后来才知道，那是因为她对自己的价值无法肯定。

segments: Eda always took the safety of others first. I later realized that was because she was unable to see the value in herself...
艾妲始终把别人的安危当成第一位，我后来才知道，那是因为她对自己的价值无法肯定。

option_title_EN: Eda's right. Let's go.
option_title_CHS: 艾妲说得有理，离开吧

text_EN: After a few hours of digging, I found the remnants of some ship that couldn't get out in time. This was the first time in years that it saw the light of day.
text_CHS: 经过数小时的挖掘后，我发现了当年来不及起飞的船舰残骸。船舰被遗忘在此地，直到今日才重见天日。

segments: After a few hours of digging, I found the remnants of some ship that couldn't get out in time. This was the first time in years that it saw the light of day.
经过数小时的挖掘后，我发现了当年来不及起飞的船舰残骸。船舰被遗忘在此地，直到今日才重见天日。

option_title_EN: Maybe there's something beneath all this. Dig it up and see what you can find.
option_title_CHS: 说不定有些物资藏在底下，挖掘看看。

text_EN: I left the ruins of the base for their later generations to uncover.
text_CHS: 我离开了舰队基地遗址，这里留给他们的后人挖掘就行了。

segments: I left the ruins of the base for their later generations to uncover.
我离开了舰队基地遗址，这里留给他们的后人挖掘就行了。

option_title_EN: All that's left is rubble. There's nothing valuable to be found here.
option_title_CHS: 只剩一堆碎石了，没必要开挖。

text_EN: We thought it was an old, damaged beacon. We never expected the firewall to counter-attack and hack into our system. It raised the engine's power output higher and higher, until it caused a large explosion...
text_CHS:
原以为是古老的破损信标，却没想到，
信标的防火墙反过来入侵了红楼系统，
并且无限制的提高引擎功率，
导致不小的爆炸...

segments: We thought it was an old, damaged beacon. We never expected the firewall to counter-attack and hack into our system. It raised the engine's power output higher and higher, until it caused a large explosion...

原以为是古老的破损信标，却没想到，
信标的防火墙反过来入侵了红楼系统，
并且无限制的提高引擎功率，
导致不小的爆炸...

text_EN: The signal soon came back online. Since it was an old, pre-war beacon, the outdated firewall was easy to break through. Remi downloaded the old files, and when she opened them she was surprised at what she saw.
text_CHS:
通讯很快的恢复了，毕竟是冲突前的旧信标，
过时的防火墙被轻易地破解，在关闭信标前，菈米亚顺手下载了冲突前的档案，结果她大叫了出来，那竟然是...

segments: The signal soon came back online. Since it was an old, pre-war beacon, the outdated firewall was easy to break through. Remi downloaded the old files, and when she opened them she was surprised at what she saw.

通讯很快的恢复了，毕竟是冲突前的旧信标，
过时的防火墙被轻易地破解，在关闭信标前，菈米亚顺手下载了冲突前的档案，结果她大叫了出来，那竟然是...

option_title_EN: Try hacking into the beacon and turn off the system!
option_title_CHS: 试着黑进信标，关闭系统！

text_EN:
Having not received a response, I shuttled through the wreckage for quite some time, before I finally found the breaker. When I turned it off the signal went back to normal.

I could hear the sound of Eda and Remi arguing, and it sounded like Eda was about to get off the ship and come looking for me.
text_CHS:
通讯无回应，我花了不少时间在残骸间穿梭，
终于找到总开关，关闭后通讯恢复。

讯号一方却是艾妲跟菈米亚争执的声音，艾妲似乎差点自己下船来找人。

segments:
Having not received a response, I shuttled through the wreckage for quite some time, before I finally found the breaker. When I turned it off the signal went back to normal.

I could hear the sound of Eda and Remi arguing, and it sounded like Eda was about to get off the ship and come looking for me.

通讯无回应，我花了不少时间在残骸间穿梭，
终于找到总开关，关闭后通讯恢复。

讯号一方却是艾妲跟菈米亚争执的声音，艾妲似乎差点自己下船来找人。

option_title_EN: (Calm down... Jun will figure it out.)
option_title_CHS: （冷静...李莫应该会自己想出办法）

text_EN:
I couldn't get ahold of Eda and the sentry station fired off its covert weapons system.

Remi managed to evade most of the attacks, but Red Chamber still got struck several times.
text_CHS: 我没能通知到艾妲，哨站隐蔽的火炮便启动了，尽管菈米亚千钧一发之际脱离火网，但仍被数发命中。

segments:
I couldn't get ahold of Eda and the sentry station fired off its covert weapons system.

Remi managed to evade most of the attacks, but Red Chamber still got struck several times.
我没能通知到艾妲，哨站隐蔽的火炮便启动了，尽管菈米亚千钧一发之际脱离火网，但仍被数发命中。

option_title_EN: (Try again to get in touch with Eda and tell her to leave the airspace.)
option_title_CHS: （再次呼叫艾妲脱离空域）

text_EN:
I had taken some exploration kits, so I let all the robots get to work. I heard the alarms blaring, and just as the system was about to attack, I managed to disable it.

Just when I thought everything had settled down, the screen turned on and started to play some old recordings.
text_CHS:
那次又是拿着探索设备，把所有探索机器人抛出的记忆，印象中警报大作，火炮启动的最后一刻我成功中断了系统。

就在我以为没事后，
眼前的屏幕却突然播放起来，那是...

option_title_EN: (Try to disable the defense system on my own.)
option_title_CHS: （想办法自己拆了自动防卫系统）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#This is a warning... to the lumen seeking vessel at 12 o'clock... Are you... United... Mining...?

You're approaching the resting place of our fallen brothers. We'll decide whether to open fire... depending on your response.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#We're getting warning signals. It looks like an old sect of the Liberation Front that was supposedly wiped out after the war.

The ship looks like it's been damaged in battle. Should we respond?#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#警告...12点钟的龙脉探测船...你们..是矿业..联合..吗？

这附近是英灵们的空域...视你的回答，我..们会决...定是否开火#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#通讯端传出警告的信息，研判是战后灭亡，星环自由战线的旧部

船只已经是战损严重，我该回应吗？#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#Warning: Navigation system error. Distance to... d-d-d-destination... unknown.

#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#Eddie! It's an electromagnetic storm! Red Chamber's navigation system isn't responding!

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(If we don't fix this, we're going to get lost in space... Who knows how many ships have gotten stranded like this...)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#警告：导航系统异常 距...离目标标标终点...无法判判判断

#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#姐姐！是电磁风暴，红楼的导航系统没有反应了！

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（这样会迷失在宇宙空间之中...因此落难的船不知道有多少...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountNobleA_N##NONAME#So what if I came back a little late! It's for "Melody of Starsong".

I had to go out and do research, get inspired!

If you don't turn on your communication channel, I'm gonna spill all the family secrets! You just watch me!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#One of the Rodin ships is hogging the public channel.

They're going on about family stuff, let them deal with it.

Let's just hack in and turn it off.

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Every family has its problems. We should help them out.#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountNobleA_N##NONAME#我只是晚了点回来，为了创作龙脉长歌，这些外出取材是必须的！

再不打开通讯，我就把家族的八卦全抖出来！#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#有一艘罗登家族的船占用了空域中的公用频道，建议是管他的家族，干脆把它黑客掉

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#任何家族都会有自己的困难， 帮帮忙吧#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#Vessel ahead, you are encroaching on a United Mining military parade rehearsal. Please stop immediately.

Report your ship ID and all members of the crew. If you do not comply, we have the right to deal with you according to law.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#Eddie... I didn't think there'd be anyone on this shortcut.

United Mining didn't announce they'd be rehearsing a military parade here! That's a guard ship!

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#......

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(This is just like what happened at the cave... Why do things seem to be getting worse...?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#前面的船只，你已经进入了矿业联合阅兵的演习场，请立即停驶

报上你的船籍编号，所有人姓名，如果不听从指示，我们将依法处理#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#姐姐...我以为轨道无人抄了近路，但这里是矿联未公开的阅兵仪式预演地，我们碰上警备船了！

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#......

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（怎么跟上次龙脉一样又出事了...最近状况越来越糟...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#Warning: Error found in the greenhouse's lumium supply. Concentration has dropped by 3%. Plants will begin to die in 7 hours...

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#Silly computer is going off again. Adjusting the pipe flow will fix this in no time.

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#I think Eda should be able to hear where the problem is. That'd be much safer.#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#警吿，温室汜气供应异常， 浓度下降约3.4% 预计7标准时后，将有植物死亡...

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#傻孩子红楼又在大惊小怪，这种程度的数值异常，调整一下管线流量，几分钟就能排除了

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#这样好吗？我觉得还是让艾妲聆听，找出管线哪里出问题，比较保险#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

这样好吗？我觉得还是让艾妲聆听，找出管线哪里出问题，比较保险

text_EN: We decided it wasn't best to stick our noses in the affairs of others. Red Chamber continued on the spaceway until the ship was out of sight, and headed towards the Culture Foundation's space station.
text_CHS:
毕竟别人的家务事，我们也没什么好介入。
红楼对航道上的船视而不见，
照样航向基金会的空间站。

segments: We decided it wasn't best to stick our noses in the affairs of others. Red Chamber continued on the spaceway until the ship was out of sight, and headed towards the Culture Foundation's space station.

毕竟别人的家务事，我们也没什么好介入。
红楼对航道上的船视而不见，
照样航向基金会的空间站。

option_title_EN: Remi's right. Let them deal with their own problems.
option_title_CHS: 菈米亚说得对，别管吧

text_EN:
We tried contacting the Rodin family space station with a modified signal, but it failed, and we were mistaken for gossip journalists.

Unfortunately for us, the automatic defense system didn't bother to identify us and dealt significant damage to our ship.
text_CHS:
红楼尝试联系罗登家族的空间站，
但却伪装失败，反而被对方当成花边新闻的记者，一个不察，对方的自动防御系统竟然开火，红楼的甲板受到不少损伤。

segments: We tried contacting the Rodin family space station with a modified signal, but it failed, and we were mistaken for gossip journalists.
Unfortunately for us, the automatic defense system didn't bother to identify us and dealt significant damage to our ship.

红楼尝试联系罗登家族的空间站，
但却伪装失败，反而被对方当成花边新闻的记者，一个不察，对方的自动防御系统竟然开火，红楼的甲板受到不少损伤。

text_EN:
The one online was Felis Rodin, the creator of "Melody of Starsong". He spent so much time working on the opera that he rarely went home, and his family nearly kicked him out.

Red Chamber was able to get him in touch with his family and help resolve the issue.
text_CHS:
通讯的人是大名鼎鼎的「费拉・罗登」，龙脉长歌的创作人。

似乎是为了创作很少回家，差点被家里赶出去。在红楼的协助下，我们成功让他跟家中接上线，调解了纠纷。

option_title_EN: Jun's right. Let's pretend to be part of the family and get them in touch.
option_title_CHS: 李莫说得对，我们可以伪装是罗登家族，协助对方接触

text_EN:
We found out that it was a group of guerillas that had been drifting for a long time, and needed serious help.

After realizing that they'd made a mistake, they boarded Red Chamber, apologized, and even gave us something as a gift.
text_CHS:
那是群流亡许久，急需补给的游击队，
理解自己误认后，他们登船致歉，
并将一些手边的配给酒类赠与我们。

那是群流亡许久，急需补给的游击队，
理解自己误认后，他们登船致歉，
并将一些手边的配给酒类赠与我们。

option_title_EN: Tell them that Red Chamber is a retired vessel. We're just a civilian crew.
option_title_CHS: 告诉他们红楼已经除役，现在是民间探勘船

text_EN:
We weren't able to respond in time, and the guerillas shot several rounds, which damaged the ship.

The poor signal quality in the asteroid belt made it difficult to express goodwill.
text_CHS:
还来不及解释，游击队船只的武器已经发射，
造成红楼不少损伤。

在通讯不良的小行星带，善意的表达总是困难。

text_EN: We kept on moving, slowly but surely. The intermittent signals coming from afar gradually grew weaker, until they finally disappeared completely.
text_CHS:
我们默默的继续移动，
远方断断续续地电磁讯号逐渐变弱，
直到完全消失不见。

option_title_CHS: 虚张声势而已，没必要回应他们

text_EN: We followed Eda's instructions and she said she picked up on a massive space station. With Eda guiding the way, Remi flew through the storm and we eventually found a way out.
text_CHS:
我们依赖着艾妲的指示，
她说感应到一个巨大的宇宙空间站，
菈米亚跟着艾妲的指示在风暴中移动，
最后出现在眼前的是...

text_EN: Eda did her best to listen for lumen, trying to find a safe pathway to the Shiratsuka recycling plant. We were flying like we were blind, and ended up crashing into another ship.
text_CHS: 艾妲努力的感应着龙脉，试图寻找安全的航道继续飞往回收站「白冢」，然而我们却像瞎子一样，一头与航道的船只发生冲撞

text_EN: Eda always knew what to do. The storm eventually faded, and the navigation system started working just fine in no time.

记忆中艾妲的判断总是准确，
电磁风暴后来逐渐远离，
系统在随后不久便恢复了正常

option_title_EN: Just be patient. Red Chamber's system always comes back online...
option_title_CHS: 只要忍一下，红楼的系统总会回复...

text_EN:
We announced ourselves as a United Mining vessel that was attending the parade. After repeatedly apologizing to the officer, we slipped among the troops before slipping away.

Even though I often argued with Remi, she sure helped us get out of a lot of dangerous situations.
text_CHS:
我们宣称自己是参与阅的矿联船只，
和警备船的军官多次致歉后，混入阅兵队伍离去。

虽然那时总跟菈米亚吵架，但她的确成功让我们躲过不少危机。

segments: We announced ourselves as a United Mining vessel that was attending the parade. After repeatedly apologizing to the officer, we slipped among the troops before slipping away.
Even though I often argued with Remi, she sure helped us get out of a lot of dangerous situations.

我们宣称自己是参与阅的矿联船只，
和警备船的军官多次致歉后，混入阅兵队伍离去。

虽然那时总跟菈米亚吵架，但她的确成功让我们躲过不少危机。

option_title_EN: Modify our signal and slip into the parade.
option_title_CHS: 伪装自己的讯号，混进阅兵船队中

text_EN: As soon as the signal went out, the guard ship opened fire and Red Chamber was nearly destroyed.
text_CHS:
讯号才出去，我们突然就遭到警备船围攻，
红楼受到致命的重创。

segments: As soon as the signal went out, the guard ship opened fire and Red Chamber was nearly destroyed.

讯号才出去，我们突然就遭到警备船围攻，
红楼受到致命的重创。

text_EN:
Unable to think of another option, Red Chamber raced forward, attempting to throw off the guard ship.

They must have thought that was pretty suspicious, because a barrage of enemy fire rained down on us.
text_CHS:
想不到什么解决方法，红楼加快马力，
想甩开前面的警备船。

对方觉得我们心中有鬼，对红楼展开炮击。

option_title_EN: We've got no choice. Let's charge through!
option_title_CHS: 没办法，冲过去了！

text_EN: The source of the problem was the lumium hybridizer. Eda adjusted the lumium supply to the greenhouse and things just returned to normal. Remi was a bit upset, but she didn't say anything.
text_CHS:
故障的源头，是汜水混合器出了异常。
艾妲最后自己简单调整了温室的供水状况，
一切又回复正常。
菈米亚对此却有点不满，但她没有说出口。

option_title_EN: Jun's right. I should take a listen...
option_title_CHS: 李莫说得对，仔细听听看汜水流动...

text_EN: During that time, Remi wasn't doing too well, and often made mistakes. Eda said she could help, but Remi insisted that she could do it herself. She didn't mean to, but some impurities got into the lumenide, which leaked into the engine pipeline and caused an explosion.
text_CHS: 那阵子菈米亚心情不好，很容易出错，尽管艾妲说可以协助，坚决自行处理的她，最终让含有杂质的汜水流入引擎管线，发生了小爆炸。

segments: During that time, Remi wasn't doing too well, and often made mistakes. Eda said she could help, but Remi insisted that she could do it herself. She didn't mean to, but some impurities got into the lumenide, which leaked into the engine pipeline and caused an explosion.
那阵子菈米亚心情不好，很容易出错，尽管艾妲说可以协助，坚决自行处理的她，最终让含有杂质的汜水流入引擎管线，发生了小爆炸。

option_title_EN: Let Remi adjust the flow of lumium.
option_title_CHS: 让菈米亚去调整管线的流量

text_EN:
"I can't focus..."

Whenever Remi and I would argue, it would affect Eda. And this time, some impurities got mixed in with the lumenide. It entered the engine pipeline and caused an explosion.
text_CHS:
「集中不了精神...」

在我跟菈米亚吵架的日子里，艾妲的精神很糟，终于这次混有杂质的汜水流入引擎管线，船体发生了爆炸意外。

text_EN: #AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#This space station was built by East Ocean before the Lumen War...
text_CHS: #AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#...这是瀛海在龙脉冲突前，建立的空间站

text_EN: I promised I wouldn't report them several times before leaving the cave. I can still see his ice-cold, menacing stare. Just thinking of it makes me shudder.
text_CHS:
我再三向对方保证，不会告发他，随即离开现场。
我仍然记得离开时，他冰冷而危险的眼神，
现在想起来还是余悸犹存。

segments: I promised I wouldn't report them several times before leaving the cave. I can still see his ice-cold, menacing stare. Just thinking of it makes me shudder.

我再三向对方保证，不会告发他，随即离开现场。
我仍然记得离开时，他冰冷而危险的眼神，
现在想起来还是余悸犹存。

option_title_EN: Forget it. This type of illegal excavation is everywhere.
option_title_CHS: 算了吧，非法探勘本来就是常态

text_EN:
I dove in to prevent the cave from being irreparably damaged, and a fight erupted. The pirates didn't like the way things were looking and took off running, leaving their equipment behind. 

I have no idea where I got the courage to stand up to them.
text_CHS:
为了阻止龙穴被破坏，
我和盗采者展开了一阵扭打。
对方眼看情势不对，装备也不管了，拔腿就跑。
现在想起来，真不知道我那时哪来的勇气。

segments:
I dove in to prevent the cave from being irreparably damaged, and a fight erupted. The pirates didn't like the way things were looking and took off running, leaving their equipment behind. 

I have no idea where I got the courage to stand up to them.

为了阻止龙穴被破坏，
我和盗采者展开了一阵扭打。
对方眼看情势不对，装备也不管了，拔腿就跑。
现在想起来，真不知道我那时哪来的勇气。

option_title_EN: Cave robbers! I won't stand by as they destroy these valuable artifacts!
option_title_CHS: 居然是盗采矿脉的人...不能让他破坏遗迹！

text_EN: When I awoke, I had been sprawled out on the ground for some time. The pirates were gone, and valuable relics were shattered on the ground. Still, at least I didn't lose my life.
text_CHS:
醒来时，已经倒在地上好一会了。盗采者不知去向，龙穴内的珍贵遗迹也被破坏殆尽。
现在回想当时能保住一条命，也是足够了。

segments: When I awoke, I had been sprawled out on the ground for some time. The pirates were gone, and valuable relics were shattered on the ground. Still, at least I didn't lose my life.

醒来时，已经倒在地上好一会了。盗采者不知去向，龙穴内的珍贵遗迹也被破坏殆尽。
现在回想当时能保住一条命，也是足够了。

text_EN:
It turned out to be full of lumen flowers, with a mysterious scripture placed neatly beside them.

Later, I found out it was a casket to be offered up to the black hole deity.
text_CHS:
打开后，里面是大量的龙脉花卉，
并放着一本奇妙的经书，

后来才知道，那是献给黑洞之神的棺材。

后来才知道，那是献给黑洞之神的棺材。

option_title_EN: We did come all this way, so we might as well open it up.
option_title_CHS: 都来了一趟，还是打开看看

text_EN: I didn't think too much about the container. Caves in the Peaks were full of robbers looking for relics.
text_CHS:
我没有管那些货柜，
群山的龙脉总是不乏文物盗采者。

segments: I didn't think too much about the container. Caves in the Peaks were full of robbers looking for relics.

我没有管那些货柜，
群山的龙脉总是不乏文物盗采者。

option_title_EN: It might be a trap. Curiosity killed the cat.
option_title_CHS: 怕什么陷阱，别太好奇了

text_EN:
Behind the gate was a group of runners lying on the ground. It looked like they'd gotten into an argument over how to split the stolen goods.

After praying for their souls, I cleaned up everything they had left behind, and even found a few valuable items.
text_CHS:
在龙门后，一队探勘人倒在地上。似乎是为了分赃不均而起了内哄。
在祈祷他们的安息后，我清点了他们的遗物，找到一些珍贵的东西。

segments:

option_title_EN: (Try to open it with a starsong.)
option_title_CHS: （试着演奏，打开龙门）

text_EN: Safety always came first. And so, I left.
text_CHS: 安全起见，我离开了那扇大门。

segments: Safety always came first. And so, I left.
安全起见，我离开了那扇大门。

option_title_EN: Best not risk it.
option_title_CHS: 别乱来好了...

text_EN:
Lagrée was an expert cave and Myrian researcher. I learned to look at cave excavation and Myrian research from a completely different perspective.
Thinking back on the impulsive methods I employed in the past, I couldn't help but feel ashamed.
text_CHS:
德拉格雷不愧是龙穴与万道研究首屈一指的专家。协助他考古，我对龙穴探勘与万道研究有了全新的理解。
想到以前急躁的下龙穴方式，不禁为之汗颜。

segments:
Lagrée was an expert cave and Myrian researcher. I learned to look at cave excavation and Myrian research from a completely different perspective.

德拉格雷不愧是龙穴与万道研究首屈一指的专家。协助他考古，我对龙穴探勘与万道研究有了全新的理解。
想到以前急躁的下龙穴方式，不禁为之汗颜。

option_title_EN: It'd be an honor to help. Just tell me what you need me to do!
option_title_CHS: 很荣幸能提供协助，就依照您的指示进行吧！

text_EN:
As I helped dig, I shared all the archaeological knowledge I'd learned in the caves.
Lagrée was clearly excited, and even noted that he had never encountered much of what I'd seen.
text_CHS:
我在协助挖掘时，分享了我过往发现的龙穴现象和考古数据。
德拉格雷显得十分高兴，我描述的现象，连他也是第一次听说。

option_title_CHS: 很荣幸能提供协助，我会将下龙穴学到的知识全用上

text_EN:
As I helped dig, I shared all the archaelogical knowledge I'd learned in the caves.
However, Lagrée was clearly not interested. He even said that much of the information was incorrect, which lowered his opinion of Red Chamber.
text_CHS:
我在协助挖掘时，分享了我过往发现的龙穴现象和考古数据。
我分享的信息没有引起德拉格雷的兴趣。那些错误的信息，反而让他对红楼的评价大为降低。

text_CHS: 成功了

segments: 成功了

option_title_CHS: 一起共鸣

text_CHS: 打不开龙门

segments: 打不开龙门

text_EN: Luckily, I was able to turn off the transmutation chamber in time and prevent a disaster from occurring. They told me they were gathering resonance data, and the chamber suddenly overloaded. To thank me, they shared the latest research with us.
text_CHS:
幸好及时关闭风转箱，才没有酿成灾害。
问了才知道，他们来收集共振数据，风转箱不知为何就超载了。为了表达感谢，他们分享了一些最新的研究数据给我。

segments: Luckily, I was able to turn off the transmutation chamber in time and prevent a disaster from occurring. They told me they were gathering resonance data, and the chamber suddenly overloaded. To thank me, they shared the latest research with us.

幸好及时关闭风转箱，才没有酿成灾害。
问了才知道，他们来收集共振数据，风转箱不知为何就超载了。为了表达感谢，他们分享了一些最新的研究数据给我。

option_title_EN: Step aside! I need to turn off the transmutation chamber!
option_title_CHS: 你们都让开，让我关闭风转箱！

text_EN: Just as the small research team made it to safety, the cave collapsed as it echoed roaring bellows. Luckily, I didn't get hit by any falling debris and I was able to pull myself out of the rubble.
text_CHS:
才刚疏散完研究小组，龙穴便在轰隆巨响中崩塌了。
还好没被落石命中，我好不容易才爬出那堆废墟。

segments: Just as the small research team made it to safety, the cave collapsed as it echoed roaring bellows. Luckily, I didn't get hit by any falling debris and I was able to pull myself out of the rubble.

才刚疏散完研究小组，龙穴便在轰隆巨响中崩塌了。
还好没被落石命中，我好不容易才爬出那堆废墟。

option_title_EN: Run! This place is going to blow!
option_title_CHS: 快点撤，这里要爆炸了！

text_EN:
Not long into the performance, the organisms in the wall twisted like wisping smoke, and as they disappeared into thin air, the craggy wall suddenly collapsed inwards.

When the dust had settled, I found a rare lumenite crystal amid the debris.
text_CHS:
对着岩壁共鸣不久，岩壁中的生物像一团发光的烟雾般扭动着，消失无踪，岩壁突然向内坍塌。
烟尘散去后，碎石中发现了罕见的汜晶体。

segments:
Not long into the performance, the organisms in the wall twisted like wisping smoke, and as they disappeared into thin air, the craggy wall suddenly collapsed inwards.

对着岩壁共鸣不久，岩壁中的生物像一团发光的烟雾般扭动着，消失无踪，岩壁突然向内坍塌。
烟尘散去后，碎石中发现了罕见的汜晶体。

option_title_EN: Try performing at the wall.
option_title_CHS: 对着岩壁共鸣看看。

text_EN:
As I started to dig, the organisms within the wall began to squirm and mournful wails were heard.

The whole cave began to vibrate and signs of collapse could be seen. I scrambled for safety, and when the cave settled down I went back to look for the mysterious organisms, but I couldn't find a thing.
text_CHS:
才开始挖掘汜晶岩壁，岩壁中的生物扭动发出哀鸣。
整个洞穴开始震动坍塌，我赶紧夺路而逃。龙穴稳定后回去搜索，已经找不到神秘的生物了。

option_title_EN: No time to be wasted here. Let's just start digging.
option_title_CHS: 事不宜迟，直接开挖吧。

text_EN: After spending some time understanding the structure of the pipes and draining the lumenide, I pulled out the plant.
text_CHS: 费了点时间搞懂这里的汜水管结构，引出汜水后，我拿到了那株植物。

option_title_EN: Find the lumenide pipeline nearby, and resonate to drain the lumenide.
option_title_CHS: 附近找看看汜水管线，先共鸣把水泄掉。

text_EN: I underestimated the depth of the pond, and as I fumbled about, the lumen energy nearly made me lose consciousness.
text_CHS: 我低估了水池的深度。才踏入池中，汜水能量差点让我失去意识，

option_title_EN: The pond's not deep. Just jump in.
option_title_CHS: 这水池也不深，直接跳进去就行。

text_EN:
I carefully crawled up the wall and placed the explosives. The United Mining excavation squad told me to hurry up and get down, as if they were eager to blow up the gate.

The blast covered my face in dust, and the squad couldn't stop laughing. They gave us some ore for my services.
text_CHS:
我小心地爬到墙上安装炸药，矿联的探勘团催促我赶快离开爆炸范围，迫不及待地炸毁了龙门。
被爆破的粉尘弄得灰头土脸，矿联团队的人大笑之余，分了点清出来的矿石给我。

option_title_EN: Alright, I'll help you place the explosives.
option_title_CHS: 好吧，我会替你们安装好炸药。

text_EN: I politely refused the "offer" proposed by United Mining's excavation party. Surprisingly, they didn't force me to do it.

我谨慎地婉拒了矿联探勘团的提案。
他们出乎意料地居然没有继续施压。

"Self-righteous bastards..."

「自以为是的外地人...」

对方碎碎念了几句后，头也不回的转身而去。

The communication records showed a message written in some unusual language. I didn't have many positive encounters with these strange capybaras from the Peaks.

「 （｀ｴ ´ *＼ 」

记得通讯纪录上，对方传了很奇怪的文字给我们，
我对群山这种神奇豚类，没有太多好印象。

option_title_EN: This is way too suspicious. Don't pay attention to them.
option_title_CHS: 太可疑，无视他们

text_EN: They left right after taking a container filled with armor. Remi and I did not approve, but Eda's kindness ended up paying off.
text_CHS:
对方领受了装甲的货柜组件后离去，
尽管菈米亚跟我都不赞成，
但当时艾妲的善行，竟然为她换来了...

segments: They left right after taking a container filled with armor. Remi and I did not approve, but Eda's kindness ended up paying off.

对方领受了装甲的货柜组件后离去，
尽管菈米亚跟我都不赞成，
但当时艾妲的善行，竟然为她换来了...

option_title_EN: We need to lend a hand to those in need.
option_title_CHS: 帮忙是应该的

text_EN:
"So, they started hiring civilian ships? Whatever works."

The place was complete chaos. They were so busy that they didn't even question Red Chamber's identity, and immediately told us to pick up some containers.
text_CHS:
「上头直接找民间船来送货吗，行。」
感觉是十万火急，对方连看到红楼的船籍不对也不疑有它，马上请我们去领货柜。

segments:
"So, they started hiring civilian ships? Whatever works."

The place was complete chaos. They were so busy that they didn't even question Red Chamber's identity, and immediately told us to pick up some containers.

「上头直接找民间船来送货吗，行。」
感觉是十万火急，对方连看到红楼的船籍不对也不疑有它，马上请我们去领货柜。

option_title_EN: Crap... Just pretend we're a transport vessel.
option_title_CHS: 糟糕...谎称自己是运输船队好了

text_EN:
Screaming as they chased us, we were eventually captured by the guards. However, just as we thought we were finished, a United Mining officer appeared and helped us clear everything up.

"Be careful on these missions."

He spoke softly, and we noticed he was wearing a Six Peaks Ring.
text_CHS:
对方吆喝着追上来，我们被警备队逮到，就在我们以为完蛋时，一位矿业联合的长官帮我们解了围，

「执行任务小心点。」

他说得小声，我们发现，他手指上是万道六山戒。

segments:

"Be careful on these missions."

He spoke softly, and we noticed he was wearing a Six Peaks Ring.

对方吆喝着追上来，我们被警备队逮到，就在我们以为完蛋时，一位矿业联合的长官帮我们解了围，

「执行任务小心点。」

他说得小声，我们发现，他手指上是万道六山戒。

option_title_EN: Let's get out of here!
option_title_CHS: 直接逃走比较快！

text_EN:
"On the Rodin family name, I swear, they are one of ours." Using the Rodin family brooch, we pretended to be members of the Rodin family and pulled Lamar in with us.

"Ignis above, I've been keeping up with your news. I knew you'd make it big!" He laughed boisterously as he entered the meeting room, leaving us with something unforgettable.
text_CHS:
「以罗登家族的名誉发誓，他们是自己人」 透过罗登的别针，我们谎称自己是罗登家族，硬是把拉马送了进去

「烛龙在上，我一直有看你们新闻，就知道你们会成为大人物。」他笑着走入了会场，走前给了我们难忘的礼物。

option_title_EN: We do have this Rodin family artifact. Let's help Lamar out.
option_title_CHS: 手边有罗登家族的信物，就当为拉马报恩吧

text_EN:
"On the Rodin family name, I swear, they are one of ours."

We tried convincing them, but United Mining remained suspicious, and in the end, nothing came of it.
text_CHS:
「以罗登家族的名誉发誓，他们是自己人」

尽管我们这么说，但矿业联合只觉得可疑。最后整件事不了了之。

text_EN:
Using Red Chamber's tether, I carefully made my way to the center of the storm. The intensity of the storm caused the readings of the spacesuit to go off the charts and, in a daze, I slowly lost consciousness...

When I came to, I was inside Red Chamber, on the ground by Eda's side. "I'm so sorry... I shouldn't have let you go out there," Eda said. I could sense the regret in her voice.
text_CHS:
我在风暴中透过红楼的绳索小心前往风暴中心，剧烈的风暴让太空防护衣各种读数爆表，恍惚中我失去了意识...

等我醒来时，我回到了红楼，倒在艾妲身旁 「抱歉...不该让你冒险」她很愧疚地说。

segments: Using Red Chamber's tether, I carefully made my way to the center of the storm. The intensity of the storm caused the readings of the spacesuit to go off the charts and, in a daze, I slowly lost consciousness...

When I came to, I was inside Red Chamber, on the ground by Eda's side.

"I'm so sorry... I shouldn't have let you go out there," Eda said. I could sense the regret in her voice.
我在风暴中透过红楼的绳索小心前往风暴中心，剧烈的风暴让太空防护衣各种读数爆表，恍惚中我失去了意识...

等我醒来时，我回到了红楼，倒在艾妲身旁

「抱歉...不该让你冒险」她很愧疚地说。

option_title_EN: Have Jun head out into space and explore.
option_title_CHS: 请李莫前往太空探索看看...

text_EN:
Red Chamber moved in closer to where the electromagnetic waves were most intense. Flashes of electricity could be seen in the subspace rift...

Then, all of a sudden, a small fire broke out in Red Chamber, caused by some electromagnetic abnormalities.
text_CHS:
红楼顺着电磁波最强烈的地方靠近，亚空间裂口闪烁着雷光...

下一瞬间，红楼就因为电磁异常突然爆发了小型的火灾。

下一瞬间，红楼就因为电磁异常突然爆发了小型的火灾。

option_title_EN: See if Red Chamber can get any closer.
option_title_CHS: 试着让红楼靠近一点

text_EN: Red Chamber plowed ahead and managed to break free of the blockade set up by the patrol ship, but was hit multiple times on the way out.
text_CHS: 红楼加速闯越矿联巡逻船的封锁，但是被多次击中。

segments: Red Chamber plowed ahead and managed to break free of the blockade set up by the patrol ship, but was hit multiple times on the way out.
红楼加速闯越矿联巡逻船的封锁，但是被多次击中。

option_title_EN: We don't have the time for this. Charge out of here.
option_title_CHS: 管不了那么多，闯过去吧。

text_EN: We pulled out the forged visa and sent it to the patrol ship. The patrol captain thought it was a bit strange, but he didn't say much and just let us go.
text_CHS: 伪装的签证派上用场，巡逻船的船长虽然觉得奇怪，但是没多说什么，放我们过去了。

segments: We pulled out the forged visa and sent it to the patrol ship. The patrol captain thought it was a bit strange, but he didn't say much and just let us go.
伪装的签证派上用场，巡逻船的船长虽然觉得奇怪，但是没多说什么，放我们过去了。

option_title_EN: Used the forged visa we prepared.
option_title_CHS: 使用之前准备的伪装签证吧。

text_EN:
We thought we'd pulled one over on the patrol ship, but it turns out they were just waiting for us to get closer.

We avoided getting arrested, but Red Chamber was hit pretty bad.
text_CHS:
以为瞒过巡逻船了，没想到对方只是在等我们靠近。
我们逃脱追捕，红楼却受到严重损害。

segments: We thought we'd pulled one over on the patrol ship, but it turns out they were just waiting for us to get closer.
We avoided getting arrested, but Red Chamber was hit pretty bad.

以为瞒过巡逻船了，没想到对方只是在等我们靠近。
我们逃脱追捕，红楼却受到严重损害。

text_EN: Red Chamber tried to charge through the barrier. Even though they didn't pursue us, our ship was badly damaged.
text_CHS: 红楼尝试闯过舰队的拦阻，尽管对方没追上，却因此遭受严重的打击。

segments: Red Chamber tried to charge through the barrier. Even though they didn't pursue us, our ship was badly damaged.
红楼尝试闯过舰队的拦阻，尽管对方没追上，却因此遭受严重的打击。

option_title_EN: See if we can charge through!
option_title_CHS: 闯过去试试看吧！

text_EN: As always, we sent out a signal pretending to be United Mining nobles. They looked it over for a long time, and even though they weren't able to figure out why we'd be flying a civilian vessel, they eventually let us pass.
text_CHS: 老样子，我们打出讯号，谎称自己是矿联的贵族，对方研究了很久，无法理解为什么我们会开着民间船，最后还是放我们通行。

segments: As always, we sent out a signal pretending to be United Mining nobles. They looked it over for a long time, and even though they weren't able to figure out why we'd be flying a civilian vessel, they eventually let us pass.
老样子，我们打出讯号，谎称自己是矿联的贵族，对方研究了很久，无法理解为什么我们会开着民间船，最后还是放我们通行。

option_title_EN: We've got no choice but to try sending them a modified signal...
option_title_CHS: 但我们也只有伪造讯号这方法...

text_EN: Not long after we sent out the signal, the patrol ships sent a barrage of attacks our way. Perhaps they never even planned on letting us go.
text_CHS:
讯号出去没多久，巡逻舰的炮火就扫了过来，
或许打从开始，他们就没有打算放过我们。

segments: Not long after we sent out the signal, the patrol ships sent a barrage of attacks our way. Perhaps they never even planned on letting us go.

讯号出去没多久，巡逻舰的炮火就扫了过来，
或许打从开始，他们就没有打算放过我们。

text_EN:
The reporter was shocked after listening to the audio file, noting that these might be plans for war.

"Thank you so much. If this gets out, it'll be a serious blow to United Mining..." She then compensated us handsomely, as promised.
text_CHS:
对方听着音档的内容非常震撼，
直说这可能是战争前的计划，

「谢谢你的帮忙，如果这种消息公开出来，对矿业联合是一大打击...」，

事后她给了我们一笔丰厚的酬劳。

segments: The reporter was shocked after listening to the audio file, noting that these might be plans for war.

"Thank you so much. If this gets out, it'll be a serious blow to United Mining..."

She then compensated us handsomely, as promised.

对方听着音档的内容非常震撼，
直说这可能是战争前的计划，

「谢谢你的帮忙，如果这种消息公开出来，对矿业联合是一大打击...」，

事后她给了我们一笔丰厚的酬劳。

option_title_EN: I'm sure no one has heard about this...
option_title_CHS: 这内幕应该还没有人知道...

text_EN:
"Very interesting. But a history of the Rumani Clan would only go as gossip."

She smiled wryly, almost like she knew the old man who had given us the book. Still, she paid us a little bit.
text_CHS:
「吉普赛家族的故事很有趣，但只能当八卦新闻」

收货的对方苦笑，她似乎知道发送这本书的老人是谁，最后给了我们点酬劳。

segments:

option_title_EN: How about that Rumani history?
option_title_CHS: 或着老人给我们的吉普赛史...

text_EN: The video was seriously damaged, and the reporter said its content would make people feel sympathetic towards United Mining. She was not happy, but paid us anyway.
text_CHS: 影像残缺的片段太多，对方说大众看了只会同情矿业联合，不甚满意，最后给了我们点酬劳。

segments: The video was seriously damaged, and the reporter said its content would make people feel sympathetic towards United Mining. She was not happy, but paid us anyway.
影像残缺的片段太多，对方说大众看了只会同情矿业联合，不甚满意，最后给了我们点酬劳。

option_title_EN: How about that one time when United Mining was defeated?
option_title_CHS: 当年矿业联合陷落的数据...

text_EN:
I still remember the response they sent back... "Glory to the united. Honorable vessel, traveling from afar, we will escort you to a safe location."

For a second, I couldn't believe what was happening. Remi, on the other hand, was beaming with confidence.
text_CHS:
记得通讯传来了这样的信息：

「天佑矿联，尊贵而来的远方船只，我们会将您护送至安全的地点。」

我一时无法相信，菈米亚则露出了自信的微笑。

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#You're here to fix the memorial? Sorry, we don't have work for healthy folks like you.

Come back when life becomes too hard to handle.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#来修补纪念塔的吗？好手好脚的，这里没有你的空间

等哪天你困顿得过不了日子，再回来找我们

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#Hey! You a bunch of adventurers looking for lumen? Come in, have a drink, and tell us a tale!

Don't worry if you ain't got no story. If you got no luck cave running and you need a few coins, I've got plenty of work here!
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#你们！是寻找龙脉的冒险家吗？ 点一杯酒，和大家说说你的故事吧

没故事也不要紧，如果哪天探勘不顺的话，来帮我做事挣点钱吧！

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#Having fun in the City of Dreams?

If you spent all your money, we've got plenty of jobs. Just drop by when you need the credits.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#如何，在梦幻之城玩得愉快吗？

玩到没钱的话，我们也有不少工作可以让你帮忙，随时欢迎

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#If you ain't doing nothing, get the hell outta the way. I've gotta family to raise. Not like you rascals, running around doing nothing.

If you run out of cash and want to find a normal job, you just come on back to Trash Mountain.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#停泊的探勘人，没事就闪一边去，我还得工作养家，不像你们没事乱跑

你要是没钱，想找份正经的工作，再来垃圾山吧

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#Neverlasting paths. It's no coincidence that you've arrived here, young man.

The fact that we've met may mean we'll need you someday in the future. I hope when you receive a sign... you will return.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#二向无常，年轻人，会来到这里都不是偶然

今天我们的相遇，或许注定着未来我需要你的日子，希望征兆到来那天，你会来到我这里

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantA_N##NONAME#You're the Red Chamber crew, right? Better watch out, crime rate in Fortune 9 is at an all-time high.

Hey, I heard you guys busted a pirate operation at the Migrant's Bazaar back then.

You should come share your experience with us, once we have the budget to pay for your time, of course.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantA_N##NONAME#你们是红楼船队吧？提醒你，九禄这边什么人都有，犯罪活动抓不胜抓

听说你们当年在这交易广场识破了诈骗的信息

哪天等上头有预算下来，你也来分享点经验给我们吧，该付的佣金我们不会少给的

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantC_N##NONAME#Ah, the young'uns from the association? Look at you! Setting so many darn records at your age. Real talents, I'll tell you what.

I didn't have the time to properly thank you for helping with the rescue. If you're ever in a bind, you just come find me.

#AVATAR:Girl_Smile1#(Is she talking about the immigration convoy? How nice of her to remember us!)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantC_N##NONAME#龙脉协会的年轻人吗？年纪轻轻就创那么多纪录，现在真是人才辈出

上次协助搜救没什么空好好道谢，以后你遇到困难，记得让我还这人情

#AVATAR:Girl_Smile1#（是指不久前拯救移民团的事情吗，被记得真的太好了）

segments: Ah, the young'uns from the association? Look at you! Setting so many darn records at your age. Real talents, I'll tell you what.
I didn't have the time to properly thank you for helping with the rescue. If you're ever in a bind, you just come find me.
(Is she talking about the immigration convoy? How nice of her to remember us!)
龙脉协会的年轻人吗？年纪轻轻就创那么多纪录，现在真是人才辈出
上次协助搜救没什么空好好道谢，以后你遇到困难，记得让我还这人情
（是指不久前拯救移民团的事情吗，被记得真的太好了）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterManB_N##NONAME#You there, young man. This is a place for remembrance. If you have no business here, please be on your way.

If you're low on credits, we got plenty of work. But please don't disturb the solemnity of this space.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterManB_N##NONAME#年轻人，这里是凭吊死者的地方，没有要悼念谁，就快点离开吧

要是你缺钱，倒是有不少事让你做，但没事别在这肃穆的广场闲晃

segments: You there, young man. This is a place for remembrance. If you have no business here, please be on your way.
If you're low on credits, we got plenty of work. But please don't disturb the solemnity of this space.
年轻人，这里是凭吊死者的地方，没有要悼念谁，就快点离开吧
要是你缺钱，倒是有不少事让你做，但没事别在这肃穆的广场闲晃

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#You all interested in the launch platform, huh? Well, sorry. This isn't some toy that you can just screw around with.

But... we're short on workers around here. Maybe one day you'll have a chance to get up there.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#对发射台有兴趣吗？抱歉，这可不是给人随意欣赏的玩具

这里很缺临时工，搞不好哪天你会有攀上发射台的机会

segments: You all interested in the launch platform, huh? Well, sorry. This isn't some toy that you can just screw around with.
But... we're short on workers around here. Maybe one day you'll have a chance to get up there.

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantB_N##NONAME#Ah! The great Red Chamber crew, what brings you here? Shouldn't you be out looking for intel?

With the number of mines under your name, after your applications go through, I'm sure you'll be able to buy this place.

#AVATAR:Girl_Smile1#(We're doing pretty good right now. I don't think we need to take on any work. Best focus on finding Banshee.)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantB_N##NONAME#红楼商船队，你们不打听龙脉消息来这做什么？

大人物别来我们这种地方，哪天等你们的龙脉申请下来了，这些货柜可都你们的了

#AVATAR:Girl_Smile1#（船队目前很宽裕，应该没有需要找工作，专心寻找黑龙吧）

segments: Ah! The great Red Chamber crew, what brings you here? Shouldn't you be out looking for intel?
With the number of mines under your name, after your applications go through, I'm sure you'll be able to buy this place.

(We're doing pretty good right now. I don't think we need to take on any work.
Best focus on finding Banshee.)
红楼商船队，你们不打听龙脉消息来这做什么？
大人物别来我们这种地方，哪天等你们的龙脉申请下来了，这些货柜可都你们的了
（船队目前很宽裕，应该没有需要找工作，专心寻找黑龙吧）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUOfficerB_N##NONAME#Applying for mining rights? Fill in the documents over there. I'll notify you when we get any news.

If you're looking for work, we'll start hiring when the budget comes in. If you're not here for either, then get moving.
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUOfficerB_N##NONAME#要申请矿权认证吗？去那边填写文件，有消息会再通知你

如果来排工作的，预算下来我们才会增聘人员，如果两者都不是，请回吧

segments: Applying for mining rights? Fill in the documents over there. I'll notify you when we get any news.
If you're looking for work, we'll start hiring when the budget comes in. If you're not here for either, then get moving.
要申请矿权认证吗？去那边填写文件，有消息会再通知你
如果来排工作的，预算下来我们才会增聘人员，如果两者都不是，请回吧

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#Analyzing the incoming ship's ID...

Crap! More pirates. I bet they're here for the bounty!

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(I never thought messing with Bones would make things so difficult... What do we do?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#解析逼近的船体编号...又来了，是群山的海盗，应该又是奖金猎人！

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（没想到动到白牙会让事情这么麻烦...怎么办）

segments: Analyzing the incoming ship's ID...
Crap! More pirates. I bet they're here for the bounty!
(I never thought messing with Bones would make things so difficult... What do we do?)
解析逼近的船体编号...又来了，是群山的海盗，应该又是奖金猎人！
（没想到动到白牙会让事情这么麻烦...怎么办）

text_EN:
The ship took multiple hits as we charged through the enemy line.

After some panicked maneuvering, we managed to escape enemy fire.
text_CHS:
穿越的过程我们遭受数次射击，
一阵惊慌之下我们勉强穿过了火网。

segments:
The ship took multiple hits as we charged through the enemy line.

After some panicked maneuvering, we managed to escape enemy fire.

穿越的过程我们遭受数次射击，
一阵惊慌之下我们勉强穿过了火网。

option_title_EN: Should we try to charge through? Seems pretty dangerous...
option_title_CHS: 冲过去吗...但这实在太危险了

text_EN: From what I remember, the communications officer seemed confused about his mistake, so they just decided to let us go.
text_CHS:
印象中，对方通讯官发现自己弄错有点不解，
却依然放行了我们。

segments: From what I remember, the communications officer seemed confused about his mistake, so they just decided to let us go.

印象中，对方通讯官发现自己弄错有点不解，
却依然放行了我们。

option_title_EN: Pose as a civilian ship by sending a modified signal.
option_title_CHS: 试着发送伪装讯号过去，伪装自己是一般民间船

text_EN:
The old signal modifier failed to convince them. They immediately saw through the trick, and responded with a barrage of attacks.

Although we managed to escape, Red Chamber took quite a few hits.
text_CHS:
破旧的通讯器材似乎没有奏效
对方瞬间就拆穿了我们的伪装讯号，瞬间炮火齐上
虽然逃脱成功，红楼却受了严重的伤

segments:

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantD_N##NONAME#Hey there, you all need some help?

According to association regulations, if any member of your crew is a Thousand Peaks citizen, we will provide you with any assistance you need, no questions asked.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#It's the Lumen Association Patrol Squad! They asked if we need any help.#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantD_N##NONAME#探勘人，需要帮忙吗？依据龙脉公约，不论身份，只要船队有群山公民，我们将会提供人道支援#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#是龙脉协会的巡逻队，他们询问我们是否需要协助！#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#

segments: Hey there, you all need some help?
According to association regulations, if any member of your crew is a Thousand Peaks citizen, we will provide you with any assistance you need, no questions asked.
It's the Lumen Association Patrol Squad! They asked if we need any help.
探勘人，需要帮忙吗？依据龙脉公约，不论身份，只要船队有群山公民，我们将会提供人道支援
是龙脉协会的巡逻队，他们询问我们是否需要协助！

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#Endless lumen, light the way... Welcome... stranded comrades of the Peaks. We are always ready to assist those in need.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#I'm getting unidentified signals from a trading vessel claiming to provide fuel for stranded ships... What do we do?#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#龙脉常在，风水引路...欢迎...群山落难的伙伴...我们随时可以援助#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#一艘讯号无法辨识的商船，自称可以协助民间的落难船...这该怎么办？#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

segments: Endless lumen, light the way... Welcome... stranded comrades of the Peaks. We are always ready to assist those in need.
I'm getting unidentified signals from a trading vessel claiming to provide fuel for stranded ships... What do we do?
龙脉常在，风水引路...欢迎...群山落难的伙伴...我们随时可以援助
一艘讯号无法辨识的商船，自称可以协助民间的落难船...这该怎么办？

text_EN: Announcing that we were the Red Chamber crew was not only enough for the squad to escort us back for resupplies, they even offered us some fuel.
text_CHS: 察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅将我们带回补给处，更为我们将油量做了一定的补给

segments: Announcing that we were the Red Chamber crew was not only enough for the squad to escort us back for resupplies, they even offered us some fuel.
察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅将我们带回补给处，更为我们将油量做了一定的补给

option_title_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
option_title_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

text_EN: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end as they towed us back to the nearest space station. Dealing with stranded ships seemed to be a regular occurrence for them.
text_CHS: 通讯一段有着细碎的抱怨声，他们似乎很常处理这种遇难的船只，默默地将我们带回最近的空间站

segments: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end as they towed us back to the nearest space station. Dealing with stranded ships seemed to be a regular occurrence for them.
通讯一段有着细碎的抱怨声，他们似乎很常处理这种遇难的船只，默默地将我们带回最近的空间站

option_title_EN: Ask for assistance.
option_title_CHS: 请求对方的协助

text_EN: Eda was unable to convince them. For some reason it raised their suspicion, and after a brief moment of silence, they left without a word.
text_CHS: 艾妲交涉失败，对方认为我们可能是别有意图的民间船，沉默后自行离去。

segments: Eda was unable to convince them. For some reason it raised their suspicion, and after a brief moment of silence, they left without a word.
艾妲交涉失败，对方认为我们可能是别有意图的民间船，沉默后自行离去。

text_EN: As soon as we declined, we were met with a barrage of enemy fire. Fortunately this was expected, and the ship took minimal damage.
text_CHS: 我们一拒绝，对方的炮火就落了下来，但幸亏决定得早，红楼只有些许损伤。

segments: As soon as we declined, we were met with a barrage of enemy fire. Fortunately this was expected, and the ship took minimal damage.
我们一拒绝，对方的炮火就落了下来，但幸亏决定得早，红楼只有些许损伤。

option_title_EN: Better to decline the offer. They could be pirates...
option_title_CHS: 怕是海盗，不要贸然接受援助...

text_EN: We listened to them reminisce about their days in the military as they towed us back to a resupply point.
text_CHS: 商船将我们带回了可以补给的地方，运输红楼的过程中，电讯一端的对方聊着自己过往从军的经历。

segments: We listened to them reminisce about their days in the military as they towed us back to a resupply point.
商船将我们带回了可以补给的地方，运输红楼的过程中，电讯一端的对方聊着自己过往从军的经历。

option_title_EN: Let Remi do the negotiating.
option_title_CHS: 让菈米亚交涉看看

text_EN:
The pirates made their intentions clear, as their boarding vessel smashed into our ship.

While we managed to fight them off, the ship took considerable damage.
text_CHS:
那时红楼突然遭到登陆艇的撞击，是伪装的海盗。

尽管最后击退了对方，却受到了严重的伤害。

segments:
The pirates made their intentions clear, as their boarding vessel smashed into our ship.

While we managed to fight them off, the ship took considerable damage.

那时红楼突然遭到登陆艇的撞击，是伪装的海盗。

尽管最后击退了对方，却受到了严重的伤害。

text_EN:
#AVATAR:MountCaveRunnerA_N##NONAME#This is a warning to the lumen seeking vessel at 6 o'clock. The Mt. Aurora patrol squad is after us.

The product is with you. Toss it out and act like you don't know us.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#There's some unknown ship trying to get close to us. I'm guessing it's a smuggling vessel.

They're trying to frame us by sending a message to us on the public channel. I think we should just get out of here.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Leave? Isn't that going to make the patrol squad even more suspicious?

Let's clear this up ourselves. It won't be an issue.

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#(The patrol squad is already headed our way... What should we do?)
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountCaveRunnerA_N##NONAME#警告六点钟方向的龙脉探测船伙伴， 朝山巡逻队要逮到我们了

货都在你那里，快丢掉它们，假装我们不认识#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#有艘船籍不明的飞船接近，推测是走私船

他们想栽赃给我们，故意用公开频道对我们发送信息，建议是直接离开#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#离开...不就更让巡逻局误以为走私品在我们船上

我们主动澄清就好，不用担心

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#（巡逻队马上要来了， 听谁的比较好...）

我们主动澄清就好，不用担心

（巡逻队马上要来了，
听谁的比较好...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#Warning: Signal interferences have recently been on the rise.

Ever since a female singer sang the heretical scripture "Ignis' Genesis", a large number of people have been using illegal networks to listen to Rabbit Newswire.

Unison Telecom believes this woman is a witch. Anyone who can provide us with her information will be greatly appreciated.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Ignis' Genesis... Wasn't that what Eddie performed last time...?

#AVATAR:Girl_Unbelieve1#(Did I get her in trouble...? How am I going to clear this up...?)

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, calm down! It's got nothing to do with you!
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#公告：最近电波干扰频繁

自从一位女歌手颂唱伪神经典「烛龙创世经」，大量人透过非法通讯收听来自「兔窟」的节目...

通讯局怀疑歌手为女巫，如果能提供相关数据，行星通讯局感谢您的协助#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#「烛龙创世经」...难不成是姐姐那次帮忙造成的...

#AVATAR:Girl_Unbelieve1#（这是我害到她吗， 这要怎么澄清...）

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲你别冲动， 这跟你一点关系都没有！

Unison Telecom believes this woman is a witch. Anyone who can provide us with her information will be greatly appreciated.
Ignis' Genesis... Wasn't that what Eddie performed last time...?
(Did I get her in trouble...? How am I going to clear this up...?)

Eda, calm down!
It's got nothing to do with you!

通讯局怀疑歌手为女巫，如果能提供相关数据，行星通讯局感谢您的协助
「烛龙创世经」...难不成是姐姐那次帮忙造成的...

（这是我害到她吗，
这要怎么澄清...）

艾妲你别冲动，
这跟你一点关系都没有！

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterScavengerA_N##NONAME#Now what's a rusty, crusty lumen seeking vessel doing creeping into other people's airspace?

We're recycling here. So scram!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#Eddie, it's scavengers from Trash Mountain!

They found some valuable debris and are hogging the airspace, waiting for the disassembly crew to arrive.#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterScavengerA_N##NONAME#破烂的龙脉探测船，混到别人的空域做什么？

我们要在这里进行回收作业了，闪远点！#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#姐姐，是垃圾山的残骸搜寻队！

他们找到有价值的太空残骸后， 便会霸占空域，等待拆船队抵达#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Eddie, we're getting a weird signal. I'm gonna play it and you tell me if we should respond...

#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#Wahaha! My fellow Peakers... heading to Taoyuan to party?

Hehehe, boy is it fun. Hey, what? I'm fine, I'm fine! I can fly, trust me!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Blush#He looks like a good guy...

Wait... Is that the barkeep from Silk Oasis? Never thought I'd see a barkeep this drunk... What should we do?
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#姐姐，红楼收到奇怪的通讯，现在播放出来，请判断是否回覆...

#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#哈哈哈，敬告周遭的...平民？也是要去桃源乡玩的吗？

嘻嘻，那边可好玩了啊！什么？我很清醒！船我自己开就行了#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Blush#船名是「像我流浪的人」...

这不会是是丝洲酒吧的老板吧...卖酒的自己喝成这样...

这要怎么处理...

text_EN:
#AVATAR:CabyMerchantB_N##NONAME#Ignis above. Just like me, huh? We're united in so far as we're both runnin' from United, wouldn't you say?

Looks like your armor is a messy mess. I can help you fix that, if you let me wet my beak a little...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, I don't like the looks of this...

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#We know. Shut it already.#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:CabyMerchantB_N##NONAME#烛龙在上，是一样在回避矿业联合追捕的朋友吗？

看你们装甲七零八落的，我可以帮忙补给，只收一点点心意就好...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，这船有点可疑...

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#谁都知道很可疑，别多嘴#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

segments:
Ignis above. Just like me, huh?
We're united in so far as we're both runnin' from United, wouldn't you say?
Looks like your armor is a messy mess. I can help you fix that, if you let me wet my beak a little...
Eda, I don't like the looks of this...
We know. Shut it already.
烛龙在上，是一样在回避矿业联合追捕的朋友吗？
看你们装甲七零八落的，我可以帮忙补给，只收一点点心意就好...
艾妲，这船有点可疑...
谁都知道很可疑，别多嘴

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#There's an unidentified spaceship that has been trailing us for some time now.

They just sent us a message. I'm putting it through.

#AVATAR:MountCaveRunnerA_N##NONAME#Are you really the Red Chamber? Boy, have I been looking for you. You're the ones who wiped out the Bones Brigade, right?

I'm a new guy over at the Daily Lumen and am writing an article about you.

Could I come onboard and get a better understanding of the crew?#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Excited##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(I had no idea we'd gotten this famous...)#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#有一艘船籍不明的飞船尾随我们许久，刚刚要求通讯，现在接通

#AVATAR:MountCaveRunnerA_N##NONAME#你们就是传说中的红楼吗？ 我找你们好久，听说横行小行星带的白帮是你们瓦解的？

我是刚加入龙脉日报的新人，正在做一篇报导

愿意让我上船，多了解你们一点吗？#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Excited##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（不知不觉间，我们已经变得这么有名了吗...）#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

segments: There's an unidentified spaceship that has been trailing us for some time now.

They just sent us a message.
I'm putting it through.
Are you really the Red Chamber? Boy, have I been looking for you. You're the ones who wiped out the Bones Brigade, right?
I'm a new guy over at the Daily Lumen and am writing an article about you.
Could I come onboard and get a better understanding of the crew?
(I had no idea we'd gotten this famous...)
有一艘船籍不明的飞船尾随我们许久，刚刚要求通讯，现在接通

你们就是传说中的红楼吗？
我找你们好久，听说横行小行星带的白帮是你们瓦解的？
我是刚加入龙脉日报的新人，正在做一篇报导
愿意让我上船，多了解你们一点吗？
（不知不觉间，我们已经变得这么有名了吗...）

text_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#*Singing* Endless lumen, light the way~ That the belt may rise again one day!

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#Shhh! Someone's here.

Child, we kicked United Mining out of the belt long ago. What are you doing in a place like this? Shouldn't you be out having fun?

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(Just a minute ago, there was no one here. Where did these old Front veterans come from?)

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#Come now, us Peakers love ourselves a good adventure. Here, we gotta little gift for you...

This stuff right here... lumen fennel. We used this back in the war. Inhale just a little and you'll see wonderful things...#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#（歌声）龙脉常在，风水引路～ 小行星必将奋起！

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#你唱歌小声点，有人呢

孩子，矿业联合早被我们赶出去了小行星带，不去空间站享受，来这纪念碑做什么？

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（刚刚这里还没有人，这群星环自由战线的老兵是怎么靠近我的...？）

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#也罢，我们群山人就是热爱冒险， 来，给你个好东西...

这是刚燃烧的「龙茴香」，打仗时我们都靠这玩意，吸一口，它会让你看见最美好的事物...#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#

segments: *Singing* Endless lumen, light the way~ That the belt may rise again one day!
Shhh! Someone's here.
Child, we kicked United Mining out of the belt long ago. What are you doing in a place like this? Shouldn't you be out having fun?
(Just a minute ago, there was no one here. Where did these old Front veterans come from?)
Come now, us Peakers love ourselves a good adventure. Here, we gotta little gift for you...
This stuff right here... lumen fennel. We used this back in the war. Inhale just a little and you'll see wonderful things...

（歌声）龙脉常在，风水引路～
小行星必将奋起！
你唱歌小声点，有人呢
孩子，矿业联合早被我们赶出去了小行星带，不去空间站享受，来这纪念碑做什么？
（刚刚这里还没有人，这群星环自由战线的老兵是怎么靠近我的...？）

也罢，我们群山人就是热爱冒险，
来，给你个好东西...
这是刚燃烧的「龙茴香」，打仗时我们都靠这玩意，吸一口，它会让你看见最美好的事物...

text_EN:
A wave of dizziness came over me, and I saw the stars ablaze... the hazy silhouette of a young woman, and a booming starsong that resounded throughout the heavens...

I awoke, startled and frightened. My heart was wrapped in sorrow, and I turned my head to find the veterans, but not a shadow could be found.
text_CHS:
一阵晕眩中，我见到燃烧的星群...少女的朦胧身影，以及响彻穹苍的巨大龙鸣——

我吓得醒来，心里被满满忧伤包围， 就在我回头想找出那位星环老兵时， 却再也不见他的踪影。

segments: A wave of dizziness came over me, and I saw the stars ablaze... the hazy silhouette of a young woman, and a booming starsong that resounded throughout the heavens...
I awoke, startled and frightened. My heart was wrapped in sorrow, and I turned my head to find the veterans, but not a shadow could be found.
一阵晕眩中，我见到燃烧的星群...少女的朦胧身影，以及响彻穹苍的巨大龙鸣——

我吓得醒来，心里被满满忧伤包围，
就在我回头想找出那位星环老兵时，
却再也不见他的踪影。

option_title_EN: If it'll make me feel better, why not?
option_title_CHS: 无所谓吧，如果能让我开心点

text_EN:
I planned on leaving without looking back, but then I heard: "Children of the Peaks. Take care."

I turned my head, but besides a few wisps of smoke, not a soul was to be found.
text_CHS:
我头也不回的离去，直到对方说出 「保重了，群山的孩子们。」 我才默默回头。

但除了地上散落的龙茴香灰烬外， 却连一个人影也没有。

segments:
I planned on leaving without looking back, but then I heard:

"Children of the Peaks. Take care."
I turned my head, but besides a few wisps of smoke, not a soul was to be found.

我头也不回的离去，直到对方说出

「保重了，群山的孩子们。」
我才默默回头。

但除了地上散落的龙茴香灰烬外，
却连一个人影也没有。

option_title_EN: Get away from me! Only weak-minded people use that stuff.
option_title_CHS: 离我远点，唯有软弱的人才会吸食汜作物

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Surprised##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#An East Ocean shrine... not even slightly damaged, almost as if someone has been taking care of it all this time...

Is this some kind of miracle?
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Surprised##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#瀛海的神坛...完全没有被破坏的痕迹，像被人细心照料一样...

这是神迹吗？

segments: An East Ocean shrine... not even slightly damaged, almost as if someone has been taking care of it all this time...
Is this some kind of miracle?
瀛海的神坛...完全没有被破坏的痕迹，像被人细心照料一样...
这是神迹吗？

text_EN:
I implored Taiyang to grant me permission to enter this sacred ground. As I prayed, I felt as though I could hear the god whispering.

After I entered the shrine, I found a secret door that had not been opened. Inside was old tattered book...
text_CHS:
我向太乙求告，希望得到进入这片圣地的许可。
在冥思之中，我仿佛听见了神明的低语。
当我进入神坛后，发现一扇未被打开的密门，里面放着一本破旧的书...

segments:
I implored Taiyang to grant me permission to enter this sacred ground. As I prayed, I felt as though I could hear the god whispering.

After I entered the shrine, I found a secret door that had not been opened. Inside was old tattered book...

我向太乙求告，希望得到进入这片圣地的许可。
在冥思之中，我仿佛听见了神明的低语。
当我进入神坛后，发现一扇未被打开的密门，里面放着一本破旧的书...

option_title_EN: (Taiyang, watch over me...)
option_title_CHS: （太乙垂怜，李莫仅求保佑...）

text_EN: Many years later I thought back on that shrine, drifting in space. Could I return there now and stand proudly before the gods? I only hope that this tranquil piece of East Ocean is preserved into eternity...
text_CHS:
多年后我常回想起，
那漂浮于无重力空间的祭坛。
如今的我是否可以骄傲地回去呢？
只希望，那瀛海的宁静之地，
可以永远保持下去...

segments: Many years later I thought back on that shrine, drifting in space. Could I return there now and stand proudly before the gods? I only hope that this tranquil piece of East Ocean is preserved into eternity...

多年后我常回想起，
那漂浮于无重力空间的祭坛。
如今的我是否可以骄傲地回去呢？
只希望，那瀛海的宁静之地，
可以永远保持下去...

option_title_EN: (Before I restore my family's honor... I have no right to be here.)
option_title_CHS: （找到足够龙脉前，我没有资格在此...）

text_EN: Red Chamber quickly changed its route and put some distance between us and the vessel. When they found out we hadn't responded to their request, they slowly crept off.
text_CHS:
红楼迅速地改变航道，远离前方的船只。
对方发现通讯的请求没回应，默默的驶离了。

segments: Red Chamber quickly changed its route and put some distance between us and the vessel. When they found out we hadn't responded to their request, they slowly crept off.

红楼迅速地改变航道，远离前方的船只。
对方发现通讯的请求没回应，默默的驶离了。

option_title_EN: It's too dangerous, just don't respond.
option_title_CHS: 太危险了，不要回应对方通讯

text_EN:
The voice of an old man came through the comms system. I recognized it as the man from Shiratsuka, who I had given the Binarii prayer disc to.

He was hoping to thank me for what I had done. So, knowing I was from East Ocean, he brought me some treasure he had found years ago.
text_CHS:
一位老者的声音从通讯设备传来，
我认出那声音，
是之前收下引魂盘的白冢老人。

他说因为感谢我馈赠引魂盘，得知我是瀛海人，
特地带给我这几年他搜集的珍宝...

segments: The voice of an old man came through the comms system. I recognized it as the man from Shiratsuka, who I had given the Binarii prayer disc to.
He was hoping to thank me for what I had done. So, knowing I was from East Ocean, he brought me some treasure he had found years ago.

一位老者的声音从通讯设备传来，
我认出那声音，
是之前收下引魂盘的白冢老人。

他说因为感谢我馈赠引魂盘，得知我是瀛海人，
特地带给我这几年他搜集的珍宝...

option_title_EN: Request communication so we can identify them.
option_title_CHS: 要求跟对方通讯，辨明身份

text_EN: The message we tried to send got distorted traveling through the electromagnetic storm. As a result, we got mistaken for hackers and the vessel entered attack mode. We found ourselves face to face with a colossal monster, and had no choice but to scramble away.
text_CHS: 尝试发送的讯号强度在电磁风暴中出现异常，我们被当成是黑客，对方瞬间进入全副武装，而面对庞然巨兽，我们只能仓皇而逃。

segments: The message we tried to send got distorted traveling through the electromagnetic storm. As a result, we got mistaken for hackers and the vessel entered attack mode. We found ourselves face to face with a colossal monster, and had no choice but to scramble away.
尝试发送的讯号强度在电磁风暴中出现异常，我们被当成是黑客，对方瞬间进入全副武装，而面对庞然巨兽，我们只能仓皇而逃。

text_EN:
The patrol squad detained both the ships, and after a thorough inspection of Red Chamber, they realized we had been falsely accused. In order to prevent damaging the reputation of the patrol squad, they used part of their reserve funds to compensate us.

Although things turned out alright, Remi was still upset that Eda didn't listen to her.
text_CHS:
巡逻局扣押了我们两艘船，上红楼稽查后发现，这的确是误会一场。为了不要影响巡逻局的名声，他们运用局里的预备金，做了些补偿...

尽管结果不坏，
但当时菈米亚很不满艾妲没听她的。

segments: The patrol squad detained both the ships, and after a thorough inspection of Red Chamber, they realized we had been falsely accused. In order to prevent damaging the reputation of the patrol squad, they used part of their reserve funds to compensate us.
Although things turned out alright, Remi was still upset that Eda didn't listen to her.

巡逻局扣押了我们两艘船，上红楼稽查后发现，这的确是误会一场。为了不要影响巡逻局的名声，他们运用局里的预备金，做了些补偿...

尽管结果不坏，
但当时菈米亚很不满艾妲没听她的。

option_title_EN: Jun's right, let's clear our name.
option_title_CHS: 李莫说得对，正面跟对方澄清

text_EN: The patrol squad caught up to us, and in the process fired some artillery our way, damaging Red Chamber. In the end, we were able to prove we were innocent, but they argued they had reason to suspect us and refused to compensate us for the damage they had caused.
text_CHS:
巡逻局的船追上来，
在逮捕过程数度开火，红楼的船体损坏。
尽管最后证明无罪，
巡逻局却以干扰执法为由，拒绝赔偿。

segments: The patrol squad caught up to us, and in the process fired some artillery our way, damaging Red Chamber. In the end, we were able to prove we were innocent, but they argued they had reason to suspect us and refused to compensate us for the damage they had caused.

巡逻局的船追上来，
在逮捕过程数度开火，红楼的船体损坏。
尽管最后证明无罪，
巡逻局却以干扰执法为由，拒绝赔偿。

option_title_EN: Listen to Remi and let's get out of here.
option_title_CHS: 听菈米亚的，快走

text_EN: Eda almost ran up to United Mining and told them it was her. It reminded me that she was the kind of person who would make a scene at a press meeting.
text_CHS:
艾妲差点跑去跟矿联声称是她的歌声，
让我想起她是会在记者会冲出去的人。

segments: Eda almost ran up to United Mining and told them it was her. It reminded me that she was the kind of person who would make a scene at a press meeting.

艾妲差点跑去跟矿联声称是她的歌声，
让我想起她是会在记者会冲出去的人。

option_title_EN: Don't let Eda do anything stupid!
option_title_CHS: 阻止艾妲做出傻事！

text_EN:
Eda just straight up said that she had sung it. But after seeing her vocalizer, they politely thanked her for the tip and paid her. Then they waved her off.

After all, a witch who can't sing couldn't possibly be that singer. While I was grateful that nothing happened to her, for some reason, it didn't feel good.
text_CHS:
艾妲直接说那是她唱的，
但对方看到艾妲喉咙的辅具，
形式上给了点感谢通报的酬劳，
随手就将她打发。

毕竟不能唱歌的女巫，怎么可能是那位女歌手，
我庆幸没出事，但不知为何开心不起来

option_title_EN: Let Eda clear things up.
option_title_CHS: 让艾妲去理论

text_EN:
"Thanks for understanding. Otherwise, we'd have to scrap an extra ship, if ya know what I mean, hehe. Here, take this. Now don't go around saying we're hogging all the work!"

Despite their mocking tone, they did send us a container. I think they were just trying to get us out of there.
text_CHS:
「还好你们识相，不然我们打捞的残骸又要多一艘了，送你们一箱，别说我们抢生意。」

记忆中是个轻浮的声音，随后红楼船队收到了一箱抛射的货柜，船队似乎希望这能打发我们。

segments:

「还好你们识相，不然我们打捞的残骸又要多一艘了，送你们一箱，别说我们抢生意。」

记忆中是个轻浮的声音，随后红楼船队收到了一箱抛射的货柜，船队似乎希望这能打发我们。

option_title_EN: Okay, okay. Leave the airspace.
option_title_CHS: 听他们的，离开空域吧

text_EN: The small speeder suddenly ejected large amounts of debris that smashed into Red Chamber. The collision pushed us off our path, and we could hear them snickering as they apologized over the comms system.
text_CHS:
搜寻队的小型快艇突然弹射大量的残骸，
跟红楼撞了满怀，
冲击之下红楼偏离了轨道，
电讯中传出他们的笑声跟抱歉声，
显然是故意的。

segments: The small speeder suddenly ejected large amounts of debris that smashed into Red Chamber. The collision pushed us off our path, and we could hear them snickering as they apologized over the comms system.

搜寻队的小型快艇突然弹射大量的残骸，
跟红楼撞了满怀，
冲击之下红楼偏离了轨道，
电讯中传出他们的笑声跟抱歉声，
显然是故意的。

option_title_EN: Don't pay attention to them. Just continue on the same path.
option_title_CHS: 不用理他们，走我们的航道

text_EN:
Eda spoke highly of the other ship, and the barkeep was ecstatic. Soon after, a container was seen heading for Red Chamber. 

He said he regularly traded with Fortuna Entertainment, and that this was one of their better products.
text_CHS:
艾妲对着通讯简单说了点恭维的话。
酒吧老板乐不可支，不久，
对方船的气闸打出一个货柜，送往红楼，
他说那是定期跟桃源乡的贵人集团交易的好货。

记得里面装的是...

option_title_EN: I'll talk to him. Let me handle this.
option_title_CHS: 我来回覆他好了，通讯转给我

text_EN: Red Chamber remained silent, but the other side of the comms system was filled with alcohol-fueled hooting and hollering. After some time passed, things settled down and they turned off their mic.
text_CHS: 红楼沉默以对，通讯一端充满酒吧老板的叫嚣声，然后慢慢的就沉默了。

option_title_EN: (Tell Remi to ignore him.)
option_title_CHS: （叫菈米亚别理他）

text_EN:
The Capybara Merchant Society ship docked and rapidly helped us with the armor.

He said there were 66 members in the society. If we ever came across one of his brothers, he hoped we could pass on this message: ／ ｀ ｴ）
text_CHS:
豚鲸商社的船与我们接泊后，
动作迅速俐落的为我们补给。

他说他们商社有66位，
如果有缘遇到他们其他兄弟，
帮他说声好 ／ ｀ ｴ）

segments:

text_EN:
After we told him the whole story, he confessed that Bones had helped him a great deal. "Looks like you did Bones a big favor... Well, I'm glad I didn't have to do nothing to ya'll."

With a melancholy look on his face, he handed us a gift that was meant for Bones, saying that we deserved it for what we did.
text_CHS:
对方听我们说明事情的经过后，坦承其实白帮是他的恩人。

「看来你们还帮白大哥一把...不用动手太好了。」

他感伤地把一个礼物交给我们，说那原本要交给白老大，但既然你是白牙的恩人，那这就归你了。

text_EN:
"Bones Brigade, this is for you!!!!"

That was the last thing we heard before the signal cut out. The firepower on that trading vessel was not that of some common peddler. He unleashed a hail of gunfire, and Red Chamber was barely able to make it out.
text_CHS:
「白帮的弟兄，我来替你们报仇了！」

通讯切断前，我们只听到这个声明
那名商人的船上，有着超过普通行商的火力，他对着我们展开一阵炮轰，红楼差点支撑不住...

text_EN:
I remained silent at the time. Coming from East Ocean, I had my own thoughts about the war.

The old man shook his head in disapproval as he walked away.
text_CHS:
当时我没有回应，对于龙脉冲突，
瀛海人的心情其实是复杂的。
最后老人有些失望的摇了头，
转头离去。

text_EN:
"Well then, get out of the way. There are people in line."

The man behind the counter didn't want to waste anymore time on us. He turned away and continued on with some other work.
text_CHS:
「那就不要在这里挡路，后面还有很多人在等。」

办事员不想花心思理我们，回头继续和其他事。

The director looked a bit disappointed as he walked away.

经理无奈的离去。

text_EN:
"Well, if you change your mind, please come back. We need the help."

The woman didn't even look up as she waved us away. She just kept trudging away at the pile of applications in front of her.
text_CHS:
「改变主意可以来找我，我们非常缺人。」

专员头也不抬，挥手打发我们，低头继续处理那些数量庞大的申请文书。

text_EN: #AVATAR:Sister_Happy#It's the Lumen Association's solar patrol squad! They offered us fuel and a trip back to the Solar Alerting Post!#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#是龙脉协会的恒星巡逻队，他们说可以提供少量的油量补给

并接泊我们回恒星警报站！#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#

segments: It's the Lumen Association's solar patrol squad! They offered us fuel and a trip back to the Solar Alerting Post!
是龙脉协会的恒星巡逻队，他们说可以提供少量的油量补给
并接泊我们回恒星警报站！

text_EN:
We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end. Those that worshipped Ignis would risk their lives on pilgrimages that went dangerously close to the sun, and it was clear that it annoyed the rescue crew.

They gave us a little bit of fuel and said, "This is enough to get you to Guifang," before flying off in silence.
text_CHS:
通讯一端有着细碎的抱怨声，似乎很多崇拜太阳烛龙的信徒常会冒死前来朝圣，导致救援队不堪其扰。

他们给我们补给少量的油，「这够让你们飞到鬼方。」说完就默默离开了。

option_title_EN: We really have no choice but to beg them for help.
option_title_CHS: 只能哀求对方帮忙了

text_EN:
After learning that we were the Red Chamber crew, they not only repaired some of our armor, but also gave us some fuel after telling us that the solar flares around here were frequent.

"For the Red Chamber, this is the least we could do," they said.
text_CHS:
察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅协助我们修复部分装甲，直说这附近闪焰很频繁，希望能帮到你们，还为我们油量做了一定的补给。

「这是红楼应得的。」他们说。

「这是红楼应得的。」他们说。

option_title_EN: Announce our connection with the association.
option_title_CHS: 表明自己于协会的身份

text_EN:
"Ignis above. We're truly sorry."

24 hours later, we got sent the digital contract with the results. On it was the excavation route they had taken.

It appeared one of the tunnels they had dug out collapsed. Luckily no one died, but we didn't make any money on our investment.
text_CHS:
「烛龙在上，我们很遗憾。」

24时后，电子合同传送了结果，
上面标记了探勘的移动路线，
似乎是挖掘的坑道崩塌，尽管没人伤亡，
但我那次的投资是没有任何回报的。

text_EN:
I was in the cave for a long time, and the last thing I remember was waking up in the medical tent. I was pretty hard on myself, but Eda told me not to worry about it.

Excavation has always been a risky endeavor, but when I was younger I was unable to accept failure.
text_CHS:
那天我深入龙脉多时，最后的记忆却是躺在医护室，我很自责，但艾妲却叫我不要在意。

探勘多有风险，当年的我面对失败，有时还不能好好自处。

text_EN:
They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of enemy fire.

Even though we managed to charge through, the ship was severely damaged. We weren't even sure how much longer we'd be able to keep flying...
text_CHS:
讯号在瞬间被拆解出来，对方的火炮齐射。

尽管最后侥幸的冲过火网，但是船基本上受伤严重，当时我们都怀疑自己还能航行多久...

text_EN:
After a period of suffocating silence, we received a message: "Miss Eda, please forgive us for disturbing the journey of a First Class United Mining Officer."

Eda looked annoyed. Remi, on the other hand, was beaming with self-satisfaction.
text_CHS:
一阵令人窒息的沉默后，对方的通讯来电。

「尊贵的矿联一级士官，艾妲女士，请原谅我们打扰您的航行之旅。」

我记得艾妲一脸受不了，还有菈米亚得意的表情。

text_EN:
"Eda, as the captain, you have to pay more attention to these things. Since it's you and the crew... I'll give you some fuel." The doctor pulled us back to Guifang's Lumen Association, complaining the entire trip.

Eda, on the other hand, was smiling, clearly accustomed to the doctor's grumpy attitude.
text_CHS:
「艾妲，你作为船长，自己要注意点...看在是你们的份上，我会稍微补一些油」

艾妲过程中始终笑着，她觉得医生还是老样子。

"What a terrible excuse. I'll help you once... for Red."

text_EN:
Remi stormed away, but the elderly man kept on speaking: "If you come across one of the Rumani, please tell them our story... The princess was willing to sacrifice the clan... for her own, selfish love..."

Exasperated, the man hoped to ensure the true history of his clan was known. Given my situation, it wasn't difficult for me to feel for him.
text_CHS:
印象中菈米亚气得离去，老人却对着我滔滔不绝： 「如果你遇到流亡在外的吉普赛族人，把我们的故事告诉他...公主一人为了爱...宁可陪上全族的性命...」

老人上接不接下气的说着，希望为他的族人留下一点历史，我能体会那种心情。

"If you come across one of the Rumani, please tell them our story... The princess was willing to sacrifice the clan... for her own, selfish love..."
Exasperated, the man hoped to ensure the true history of his clan was known. Given my situation, it wasn't difficult for me to feel for him.

印象中菈米亚气得离去，老人却对着我滔滔不绝：

「如果你遇到流亡在外的吉普赛族人，把我们的故事告诉他...公主一人为了爱...宁可陪上全族的性命...」
老人上接不接下气的说着，希望为他的族人留下一点历史，我能体会那种心情。

option_title_EN: Oh, is that so? Why don't you two go back to East Ocean then?!
option_title_CHS: 你自己跟他滚回瀛海听！

text_EN: I wasn't sure why Remi got so upset. Maybe she just didn't want any trouble. After all, in United Mining territory, you had to be extra careful.
text_CHS:
当时我不清楚菈米亚为何如此愤怒，
或许是不愿惹上麻烦，
毕竟在矿业联合的地盘，凡事小心。

option_title_EN: This is the Peaks, geezer! Back off!

text_EN:
Inside the massive container were several smaller confiscated containers. One of the corners was marked with Red Chamber's name. There was also an envelope. Inside was surprisingly elegant handwriting.

"Jun, mate. Gotta step it up. I just might have to take Banshee before you do."

There's something about that guy. I miss him, and that's not for no reason.
text_CHS:
货柜里面是边境各种查禁的货柜，其中一块角落标记着红楼商船的名称。 以及一封信，内文的字体娟秀

"李莫妈，加油吧，最好动作比我快。 不然黑龙可会被我抢走。 "

那家伙会让我这么怀念，真的不是没有原因。

text_EN:
At least that's what I thought. Yet when Red Chamber docked, I found Remi sitting in front of a massive container.

"Tsk... I had no choice. Boy oh boy, what'd you do now?" She then stuffed an envelope into my pocket and turned away. Inside was surprisingly elegant handwriting.

"Jun, mate. Gotta step it up. I just might have to take Banshee before you do."

There's something about that guy. I miss him, and that's not for no reason.
text_CHS:
尽管当时那么想，但回到红楼停泊的宇宙港时，菈米亚却一个人坐在巨大的货柜之前。

「啐，我退不了，你又做了什么好事。」说完塞了封信给我就转身， 内文的字体娟秀。

"李莫妈，加油吧，最好动作比我快。 不然黑龙可会被我抢走。 "

那家伙会让我这么怀念，真的不是没有原因。

option_title_EN: You can't trust United Mining...
option_title_CHS: 矿业联合的话别采信...

text_EN:
"My master taught me everything I know about Myria. It's different from the commonly accepted, mainstream beliefs."

After leaving the students with that, we left.
text_CHS:
「我的万道是师父教我的，与普遍的信仰不同。」

记得艾妲如此说，我们就离开了当地。
