记得艾妲如此说，我们就离开了当地。

option_title_EN: Always believe what your teachers tell you.
option_title_CHS: 相信你们老师的故事就好

text_EN:
"Okay then. So, for the first class... we'll start by planting flowers."

The vice-president and the children didn't know what to make of that. Sometimes I forgot she had left the tower's teachings behind. To this day, I still remember what she taught the students.
text_CHS:
「好，那第一课，我们先从种花开始。」

艾妲的第一句话，让副会长跟小孩傻在当地，
我差点忘了她是离开巫塔的女巫...至今我都还记得她上课的内容。

option_title_EN: Tell them the truth about Myria.
option_title_CHS: 向他们介绍万道的真实

text_EN:
"Transfer the credits to the account provided. Thank you for your cooperation." Without even boarding the ship, they sent some personal bank account info via an encrypted message.

Once they received the payment, they left immediately. That's when I started to realize why Peakers were so opposed to United Mining.
text_CHS:
「汇款至下面帐号，感谢您的配合」

对方甚至不需要登船，直接加密信息将私人户头传送过来，打款完成后便快速离去。

我慢慢理解，为什么群山人对矿联多少都有敌意。

text_EN:
"You shouldn't be flying drunk... We have some equipment that will extract the alcohol from you. Would you like us to send it over?" It turned out that Eda wasn't any better than I was at handling situations like that.

The barkeep felt humiliated, so he turned on his ship's defense system and fired a few rounds at Red Chamber before heading off.
text_CHS:
「喝酒驾驶很危险，需要我们提供醒酒设备吗？」

我印象很深刻，艾妲跟我一样很不擅长这类沟通，觉得被污辱的对方打开了防御系统，追着红楼一阵扫射才结束。

我向太乙求告，希望得到进入这片圣地的许可。
但没有任何回应，或许太乙认为我还没有准备好。

尽管我什么都没找到，但艾妲也没责怪我，

到底是什么。

text_EN: Red Chamber's communication module was basically an antique. Remi spent a lot of time trying to connect the two signals, but it ended up taking too long and we missed the show's broadcast time.
text_CHS: 由于红楼的通讯阀是老旧的古董，菈米亚花了很多时间希望把两边的讯号接起，但缓不济急，最后错过了节目播出时间。

text_EN: Remi seemed to have been looking for us for a long time. As soon as we returned, she told me to get the hell away. But she was even angrier at Eda for not responding to her message and missing some interview.
text_CHS: 菈米亚似乎找我们很久，一等到我跟艾妲两人回去时，她除了叫我滚开外，更强烈抱怨艾妲没有听到她的通讯，导致错过了一则采访。

菈米亚似乎找我们很久，一等到我跟艾妲两人回去时，她除了叫我滚开外，更强烈抱怨艾妲没有听到她的通讯，导致错过了一则采访。

text_EN:
Hearing that I was heading to the betting tables, Remi did something she never did: came to my side and offered me some advice.

We didn't win much, but it definitely made me feel better.
text_CHS:
听到我要上赌桌，
菈米亚难得凑在我旁边给了一堆意见，
虽然没有赚到多少，但当下我的确忘了悲伤。

option_title_EN: Let's bet like a Peaker. Not too much and not too little...

text_EN:
I didn't know what came over me. When Eda heard how much I wanted to bet, she raised her eyebrows. The bets got larger and larger, and just when I thought I was going to lose it all...

My luck turned around and I pulled it together. Still, the less betting the better.
text_CHS:
当时我不知道我怎么了， 听到我想赌这么大，艾妲皱了下眉头， 结果真的越输越大，就在我以为要输光的时候...

最后我成功翻了盘， 但赌博这种事，还是少做为妙。

text_EN: As I searched for a seat, a flood of people completed engulfed me. By the time I sat down, I couldn't even see the stage.
text_CHS: 就在我寻找位置时，排山倒海的人群将我淹没，等我坐下时，已经远得连舞台都看不见了。

option_title_EN: It's pretty crowded. I'm going to find a seat somewhere else.
option_title_CHS: 有点挤，我另外去找个空位看好了

text_EN:
Eda seemed to be lost in memory, as she closed her eyes to resonate with the lumen. I didn't want to interrupt. 

She then shook her head, and stopped exploring.
text_CHS:
艾妲仿佛沉浸在过往的回忆般，闭着眼感应汜气好一阵子，我不好打扰。
之后她只是摇摇头，放弃了探索。

option_title_EN: It belongs to the Red Chamber, I can't just give it away...
option_title_CHS: 这都是红楼的资产...不能给人...

text_EN:
"Just as I thought... I can't give up just yet." A look of appreciation came across the old man's face as he carefully hung the prayer disc on the wall and began telling us his story.

"Ah yes, Binarii... So this was hanging in the East Ocean Interstellar Transport Station. In Myrian belief, Binarii guards the gates of space and time... If you are pious enough, those that you wish to see will wait for you behind those gates." He left us contemplating his abstruse statement.
text_CHS:
「果然...我还不能放弃...」 老人露出感激的表情，小心翼翼地将它挂在墙面上，缓缓说起了故事，

「你这尊二向，原本是挂在瀛海传送港的神，在万道信仰中，它负责镇守时空之门...如果够虔诚，迟早你想见的人，就会在门后等你。」 他留下这句若有深思的话，离开了现场。

text_EN:
"Pfffft! Ridiculous! I know James. That bugger has so much damn energy there's no way he's dead."

I felt terrible, but the nurse and his family couldn't stop laughing. To thank me for providing them with the information, the family gave me a small reward. They seemed in high spirits, but I noticed that they were clutching tightly to the recorder.
text_CHS:
「别说傻话了，那精力旺盛的家伙怎么可能死掉？」

一反我的悲伤，护士跟家属反而笑得开心，为了答谢找到线索，家属给了我们些报酬，但我只注意到，家属胸口握得紧紧的录音笔。

一反我的悲伤，护士跟家属反而笑得开心，为了答谢找到线索，家属给了我们些报酬，但我只注意到，家属胸口握得紧紧的录音笔。

option_title_EN: If I'm not mistaken, this is the last recording he made...
option_title_CHS: 如果没错，这是他最后的录音...

text_EN: The woman kept saying what a shame it was and asked Eda if there was some way to contact her, but Eda politely refused.
text_CHS: 对方不断说着这有多可惜，希望艾妲留下联络方式，但还是被婉拒了。

segments: The woman kept saying what a shame it was and asked Eda if there was some way to contact her, but Eda politely refused.
对方不断说着这有多可惜，希望艾妲留下联络方式，但还是被婉拒了。

option_title_EN: This won't do us any good. Let's go.
option_title_CHS: 太胡闹了，走了

text_EN:
#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#Jun, Remi didn't mean what she said.

She grew up with me. That's just how she talks.

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#I know. I really like both of you, and I know Remi didn't mean it...

It's... I just don't like people bringing up my clan...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#Well, I just want to apologize on her behalf...

...You know...

I kind of regret coming here. It's just... a farm. There's no way there's any lumen intel here—

Somebody's coming!

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerB_N##NONAME#Citizens of Ironwind! Let's go!

The flaming hammer will be coming in from sector one. Don't let us miss it!

Who's loading up container 21? You two, why the hell are you just standing there? Get moving!#AVATAR:Girl_Unbelieve1#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#李莫，我还是想说，菈米亚无心的

她从小跟我长大，嘴巴就那样

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#我知道，我喜欢你们，我也不认为菈米亚会做那种事...

只是不喜欢被提到我的家...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#替她抱歉了...

........是说

我有点后悔来这里打听情报，只有生化果园...跟龙脉绝对不会有关联——

有人来了！

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerB_N##NONAME#动起来，铁岚城的市民们！

铁火大锤远从第一星区运来，别让我们错过了！

第二十一号货柜的缺口谁要补，你们两个愣在那做什么，动起来啊！#AVATAR:Girl_Unbelieve1#

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#Sir, the higher-ups said we need to adjust the refinement procedures according to the research presented at the conference!

We've got to remove the interference caused by consciousness and increase the purity by 0.5 percent.

#AVATAR:PMUCitizenA_N##NONAME#We didn't all go to the conference! Who knows how to do that? They can't just tell us to adjust the procedures!

Who can tell us what happened at the conference? I don't care how much top-secret information I need to leak to fix this...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#Conference? I think we went to that... Maybe we should try to get some Banshee intel?#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#长官，上头说精练的步骤，需要依照研讨会的内容修正！我们必须去除意识扰动的现象，提高纯度0.5个百分点

#AVATAR:PMUCitizenA_N##NONAME#研讨会又不是每个人都去，谁知道怎么做...临时修改制程不说清楚，真是够了

铁火之神，谁来告诉我们研讨会的内容吧，只要有数据，要我泄漏多少机密都可以...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#研讨会...这我好像听过...要不要用这机会交换黑龙的相关情报？#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

研讨会...这我好像听过...要不要用这机会交换黑龙的相关情报？

text_EN: They stuffed Red Chamber with containers, most of which were full of alcohol and food. The fact that United Mining was the food supplier for the Peaks was probably their greatest means of control.
text_CHS:
对方将大量的货柜送上红楼，
里面是满满的酒水与食物，
作为群山粮食供应商的矿业联合，
这或许才是他们最大的统治武器。

这或许才是他们最大的统治武器。

option_title_EN: (Let's just help out to avoid running into any trouble.)
option_title_CHS: （先接下来再说，免得出事）

text_EN:
"Hmm... Didn't hear anything about the media coming..."

They didn't think much more about it. The security inside wasn't nearly as intense as outside, and we luckily got by without them discovering our true identities.
text_CHS:
「没听说有媒体要来这里啊...奇怪」

对方似乎不疑有它，
农场内部的保全不如外面森严
让我们躲过一劫，
幸好没有发现我们的身份。

让我们躲过一劫，
幸好没有发现我们的身份。

option_title_EN: We're with the Daily Lumen. We were granted access here...
option_title_CHS: 我们是龙脉日报，授权来这里采防...

text_EN:
"May fire and iron light the stars." The woman eagerly took the presentation and was happy to listen to Eda's request.

Unfortunately, she was unable to find any information on Eda's master or Banshee. Still, the woman was kind enough to give us some credits to thank us.
text_CHS:
「愿铁火于星辰闪耀」，对方感激地接受了研讨会的简报，接受艾妲的访问

可惜的是，却没有调查到任何师父与黑龙的情报。对方理解这点，给了我们些信用点作为补偿

option_title_EN: Give her the presentation from the conference.
option_title_CHS: 把上次听过的简报内容给对方

text_EN: Eda left in a hurry. She was frightened by the progress of lumen refinement procedures in recent years. Since it destroyed the starsongs emitted by the lumen, it seemed to her like something was killed in the process.
text_CHS: 艾妲很快的离开了现场，汜精炼的步骤这几年让她觉得恐怖，因为过程逐渐破坏了汜传出的龙鸣声，对她来说像是扼杀了某种灵魂。

option_title_EN: No... We can't keep getting distracted by these tasks.
option_title_CHS: 算了，别节外生枝

text_EN:
Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.

That day we were unfortunate enough to experience this firsthand.
text_CHS: 群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有愤怒与天罚的神话，我们终于体会到了。

option_title_EN: Raise the shields to full power!
option_title_CHS: 启动汜气装甲最大电磁输出功率！

text_EN:
Thanks to Eda's quick thinking, we were able to avoid getting hit.

Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.
text_CHS:
所幸艾妲即时反应，我们才躲过一劫。

群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有它愤怒与天罚的神话。

option_title_EN: Hide behind an asteroid. We'll be fine.
option_title_CHS: 立刻躲进小行星的暗面，没事的

text_EN: Eda never cared about dealings like this, so we just left in silence.
text_CHS: 艾妲向来对这些事没很关切，我们默默就离开了。

segments: Eda never cared about dealings like this, so we just left in silence.
艾妲向来对这些事没很关切，我们默默就离开了。

option_title_EN: We need to be looking for Banshee.
option_title_CHS: 寻找黑龙才是当务之急

text_EN:
"Oh what shame, what a shame. The Capybara Merchant Society is filled with nothing but kind souls. How could you not trust us..."

Then the comms system cut off.
text_CHS:
太可惜了，我们豚鲸商社都是好人，怎么不相信我们呢...
对方说完后，切断了通讯。

Then the comms system cut off.

option_title_EN: ...Don't risk it.
option_title_CHS: ...别冒无谓的风险

text_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#This is a warning to the vessel ahead. You have entered United Mining airspace. Please leave immediately.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#(Why are there even troops stationed at the border sentry station...)#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#
text_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#警告，前方的龙脉探测船，你已经步入了矿联的合法领空，请立刻离开#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#（怎么连边境的哨站也有驻军防守...）#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

segments: This is a warning to the vessel ahead. You have entered United Mining airspace. Please leave immediately.
(Why are there even troops stationed at the border sentry station...)
警告，前方的龙脉探测船，你已经步入了矿联的合法领空，请立刻离开
（怎么连边境的哨站也有驻军防守...）

text_EN:
After a period of suffocating silence, we received a message: "Miss Eda, please forgive us for disturbing the journey of a First Class United Mining Officer."

Eda looked annoyed. Remi, on the other hand, was beaming with self-satisfaction.
text_CHS:
一阵令人窒息的沉默后，对方的通讯来电：

「尊贵的矿联一级士官，艾妲女士，请原谅我们打扰您的航行之旅。」

我记得艾妲一脸受不了，还有菈米亚得意的表情。

segments:
After a period of suffocating silence, we received a message:

"Miss Eda, please forgive us for disturbing the journey of a First Class United Mining Officer."
Eda looked annoyed. Remi, on the other hand, was beaming with self-satisfaction.

一阵令人窒息的沉默后，对方的通讯来电：

「尊贵的矿联一级士官，艾妲女士，请原谅我们打扰您的航行之旅。」

我记得艾妲一脸受不了，还有菈米亚得意的表情。

option_title_EN: Send a modified signal to make them think we're also a United Mining vessel.
option_title_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为我们也是矿业联合船舰

text_EN:
They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of enemy fire.

Even though we managed to charge through, the ship was severely damaged. We weren't even sure how much longer we'd be able to keep flying...
text_CHS:
讯号在瞬间被拆解出来，对方的火炮齐射。

尽管最后侥幸的冲过火网，但是船基本上受伤严重，当时我们都怀疑自己还能航行多久...

segments: They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of enemy fire.
Even though we managed to charge through, the ship was severely damaged. We weren't even sure how much longer we'd be able to keep flying...

讯号在瞬间被拆解出来，对方的火炮齐射。

尽管最后侥幸的冲过火网，但是船基本上受伤严重，当时我们都怀疑自己还能航行多久...

text_EN:
For a while, we thought we had gotten lucky and passed through enemy lines, but a rail cannon sniped us from a distance.

The last thing I remember was a blinding flash of light...
text_CHS: 我们一度以为侥幸的冲过火网，但是巨大的磁轨炮却从远方狙击而来，我印象只剩一片红色的闪光...

segments: For a while, we thought we had gotten lucky and passed through enemy lines, but a rail cannon sniped us from a distance.
The last thing I remember was a blinding flash of light...
我们一度以为侥幸的冲过火网，但是巨大的磁轨炮却从远方狙击而来，我印象只剩一片红色的闪光...

option_title_EN: We have no choice but to take damage. Enter hyper travel and charge through!
option_title_CHS: 顾不得损伤，进入超加速冲过去了！

text_EN:
I was not expecting the work to be... that. However, the officials were very satisfied with the services we provided.

I try not to think about that experience.
text_CHS:
工作跟我想像的不同，
但大官们似乎很开心，

我想...这件事我就不特别回忆了。
